Evaluating on a diverse internal dataset of 1254 labeled sequences and 4 million unlabeled camelid-derived antibodies, we show that our method consistently outperforms baselines on most metrics. Our results demonstrate that preference learning can effectively learn from weak supervision, providing a scalable solution for antibody expressibility optimization in data-constrained settings. Project page: https://kisoji-biotechnology-inc.github.io/Preference-Expression-Ranking/.

</details>


### [289] [PsiLogic: Chaos-Aware Active Cancellation for Adam with a Fair Cross-Domain Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16268)
*Ali Sultonov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出 PsiLogic 优化器，通过在 Adam 中增加基于双重指数移动平均的主动抵消项，自动检测训练混沌阶段并动态调整阻尼，无需手动预热调度。实验表明在 NLP、ViT、ResNet 任务上显著优于 Adam/AdamW/Lion，且内存开销相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Adam 等自适应优化器在训练早期混沌阶段和接近收敛时使用相同的更新规则，缺乏动态调整能力，需要手工调度的预热（warmup）机制。

Method: 在 Adam 基础上引入 Active Cancellation Term，通过双重 EMA 监测归一化梯度范数来构建混沌检测器（chaos detector），在梯度不稳定时增强阻尼，训练稳定后衰减至零，实现隐式预热。

Result: 在 FairBench 基准上，PsiLogic 在 NLP（困惑度 7.79 vs 8.17, p=0.049）、ViT（准确率 0.244 vs 0.223, p=0.015）、ResNet（准确率 0.222 vs 0.172, p=0.001）三项显著优于对比方法；扩散任务统计持平；GPU 内存相当，但部分任务有 1.2-1.8 倍时间开销。

Conclusion: PsiLogic 通过动态混沌检测机制有效替代了手工预热调度，在多个任务上取得显著提升，开源实现支持可复现验证。

Abstract: Adaptive optimizers such as Adam and AdamW apply the same update rule regardless of whether training is in a chaotic early phase or near convergence. We introduce PsiLogic, an optimizer that augments Adam with a dynamic Active Cancellation Term gated by a dual exponential moving average (EMA) of scale-normalized gradient norms. The resulting chaos detector strengthens damping when gradient statistics are unstable and fades to zero as training stabilizes, providing an implicit warmup without a hand-tuned schedule.
  We evaluate PsiLogic against Adam, AdamW, and Lion using FairBench -- a reproducible benchmark protocol with per-optimizer learning-rate sweeps, identical initialization per seed, and Welch t-tests. On an NVIDIA H100 80GB reference run (4 arenas, 3 seeds, 2000 steps, bf16 AMP), PsiLogic achieves the best validation metric in three of four arenas: NLP perplexity 7.79 +/- 0.18 vs. 8.17 +/- 0.08 (AdamW, p = 0.049), ViT top-1 accuracy 0.244 +/- 0.006 vs. 0.223 +/- 0.002 (AdamW, p = 0.015), and ResNet top-1 accuracy 0.222 +/- 0.001 vs. 0.172 +/- 0.004 (Adam, p = 0.001). On diffusion, validation MSE is statistically tied with Adam/AdamW (p = 0.49). ResNet accuracy vs. AdamW is a numerical tie without significance at three seeds (p = 0.44). Peak GPU memory is comparable across optimizers; PsiLogic incurs 1.2--1.8x wall-clock overhead on transformer-heavy arenas (implementation-bound).
  We release an open-source PyTorch implementation, the full FairBench harness, and all raw CSV outputs to support independent verification.

</details>


### [290] [A Predict-then-Correct Loop Based on Few-Shot Continuous Contextual Bandit for Demand Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16354)
*Zhiwei Lei,Benedict Jun Ma,Ilya Jackson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种"先预测再纠正"(PtC)框架，通过保留第一阶段机器学习预测，再应用少样本连续上下文赌博机纠正策略（结合相似SKU增强和top-p掩码更新）来改进零售需求预测。在沃尔玛数据和饮料数据集上，该方法显著降低了MAPE、MAE和RMSE，平均RMSE比纯ML基线提升9.52%，并在库存成本上优于多种基准策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 零售需求预测面临两大挑战：需求变化速度快于静态模型的重训练速度，特别是在早期需求周期中新观测标签稀疏。现有方法无法有效利用稀疏反馈进行实时自适应调整。

Method: 提出Predict-then-Correct (PtC)框架：第一阶段保留ML基础预测模型输出的预测值，第二阶段应用few-shot连续上下文赌博机纠正策略，通过similar-SKUs数据增强和top-p掩码更新机制对基础预测进行在线纠偏，无需完全重训练基础模型。

Result: 在沃尔玛零售数据和专属饮料数据集上，PtC在稳定高销量、稳定低销量、不稳定间歇性三种需求模式下均显著降低MAPE、MAE和RMSE；消融实验中平均RMSE比纯ML基线提升9.52%；在测试的提前期设置下，库存成本低于base-stock、PPO和SAC策略。

Conclusion: 在线预测纠偏方法能够弥合离线需求学习与实时零售决策之间的鸿沟，通过适应稀疏反馈来提升预测精度，且无需完全重新训练基础预测模型，为实际零售场景提供了高效的自适应预测方案。

Abstract: Retail demand forecasting remains difficult when demand shifts faster than static forecasting models can be retrained, especially in early demand cycles where newly observed labels are sparse. To address this, this study aims to improve adaptive retail forecasting by proposing a predict-then-correct (PtC) framework that retains a first-stage machine learning (ML) forecast and applies a few-shot continuous contextual bandit correction policy with similar-SKUs augmentation and top-p masked updating. Across Walmart retail data and an exclusive beverage dataset, PtC delivers statistically significant reductions in MAPE, MAE, and RMSE across stable & high volume, stable & low volume, and erratic & intermittent demand patterns, improves average RMSE by 9.52% over the ML-only baseline in the ablation study, and yields lower inventory costs than base-stock, proximal policy optimization, and soft actor-critic policies under the tested lead-time settings. These findings show that online forecast correction can bridge offline demand learning and real-time retail decision-making by adapting to sparse feedback without fully retraining the base forecasting model.

</details>


### [291] [Scaling Limits of Constant-Stepsize SGD at Flat Minima](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16384)
*Jingyi Zhang,Cheng Mao,Debankur Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了SGD在具有平坦极小值的凸目标函数下的不变分布行为，发现当极小值局部平坦指数m≥2时，不变分布集中在α^(1/m)尺度上，且重缩放后的迭代弱收敛到非高斯平稳分布，这与二次情形的√α尺度和高斯极限有本质不同。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统SGD理论通常假设目标函数强凸，得到√α尺度和高斯极限。但在深度学习等实际场景中，目标函数常具有平坦极小值（如锐度极小化发现），其局部行为与强凸情形迥异。作者旨在揭示SGD在平坦极小值下的不变定律，填补理论空白。

Method: 考虑带有马尔可夫噪声（由收缩驱动链生成）的SGD，对充分小的常数步长α，证明在α依赖的Wasserstein度量下不变测度的存在性、唯一性和几何收敛性。利用局部平坦指数m刻画极小值处Hessian行为，建立收缩因子1-cα^(m-1)。通过重缩放（尺度α^(1/m)）分析小步长极限，证明弱收敛到SDE的平稳分布。

Result: 1) 证明了不变测度存在唯一且几何收敛；2) 当m=2时恢复经典结果（因子1-cα）；3) 平坦情形(m>2)下不变分布集中在α^(1/m)尺度，而非√α；4) 重缩放极限为非高斯平稳分布，由SDE dY_t = -h_0(Y_t)dt + Σ^(1/2)dB_t给出；5) 推广到坐标可分离且各方向平坦指数不同的情形。

Conclusion: SGD在平坦极小值下的渐近行为与强凸情形存在根本性差异：步长尺度由1/m次方决定而非1/2次方，极限分布一般非高斯。这一发现对理解深度学习优化中SGD的行为（如泛化与锐度的关系）具有重要理论意义。

Abstract: For stochastic gradient descent (SGD) with a constant stepsize $α$, the invariant law of the iterates, centered at a minimizer, describes the behavior of the algorithm over long time horizons. In the strongly convex case, this invariant law has the familiar $\sqrtα$ scaling and a Gaussian limit as $α\downarrow 0$. We show that this behavior changes fundamentally for convex objectives $H$ with flat minima and (sub)quadratic tails.
  More specifically, we study SGD with Markovian noise generated by a contractive driving chain. For every sufficiently small constant stepsize $α$, we prove existence, uniqueness, and geometric convergence to an augmented invariant law in a Wasserstein distance induced by an $α$-dependent metric. When the minimizer $x_\star$ has local flatness exponent $m\ge2$, meaning that $\nabla^2 H(x)\asymp \lVert x-x_\star\rVert^{m-2} I_d$ as $x\to x_\star$, we obtain a contraction bound with factor $1-cα^{m-1}$, where $c>0$ is a constant. This recovers the factor $1-cα$ in the quadratic case $m=2$. We then analyze the small-stepsize scaling limit. We show that the invariant law concentrates on the scale $α^{1/m}$ and that the rescaled iterates converge weakly to the stationary distribution of the stochastic differential equation $$
  dY_t=-h_0(Y_t)\,dt+Σ^{1/2}\,dB_t , $$ where $h_0$ is the limiting drift at the minimizer and $Σ$ denotes the asymptotic covariance. This recovers the Gaussian limit when $m=2$ and gives generally non-Gaussian stationary limits in the flat case $m>2$. Finally, we give corresponding results for coordinate-separable objectives with unequal flatness exponents.

</details>


### [292] [Retrieval is Enough: Training-Free Interpretability with a Tool-Using Agent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16448)
*Sriram Balasubramanian,Soheil Feizi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HARP方法，通过LLM智能体结合激活值向量数据库与操作工具，以无需训练的方式实现概念发现、模型引导等任务，性能超越基于训练的方法（如SAE和激活oracle），表明现有训练方法并未从训练数据中提取出超越数据本身的洞察。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究基于训练的可解释性方法（如SAE、激活oracle）是否真正发现了超越训练数据集本身所能恢复的洞察，并验证能否通过一种更廉价、无需训练的方法达到甚至超越这些训练方法的性能。

Method: HARP方法：为LLM智能体配备激活值-文本上下文向量数据库，以及操作激活值的工具（投影消除潜在空间方向、计算激活差值和平均值）。智能体迭代查询数据库，从检索样本中形成假设，并通过构建线性探针验证假设，整个过程无需训练。

Result: HARP在概念发现、概念检测、模型引导和秘密提取任务上均优于激活oracle和SAE-based方法，且成本更低、更灵活（可按需索引新数据集）。

Conclusion: 当前基于训练的可解释性方法并未提取出超越其训练数据的洞察，需建立明确要求可解释性方法展示此类洞察的基准测试。

Abstract: Interpretability methods for neural network activations span a wide cost spectrum, from cheap, training-free techniques (such as linear probes, PCA, SVD) to more expensive training-based ones (such as SAEs and activation oracles). Training-based methods are typically more powerful, in part because they leverage large activation datasets during training. This raises a natural question - do they actually surface insights that go beyond what is recoverable from the training dataset itself? To address this, we equip an LLM agent with a vector database of activations paired with their textual contexts, along with tools for manipulating activations - projecting out directions in latent space, computing activation differences and averages. The agent iteratively queries the database, forms hypotheses from the retrieved samples, and validates them by constructing linear probes. We call this method HARP, for Hypothesis-driven Agentic Retrieval and Probing. Despite not involving any training, HARP outperforms both activation oracles and SAE-based agents on concept discovery, concept detection, model steering, and secret elicitation. The training-free design also makes HARP substantially cheaper and more flexible: new datasets can be indexed on demand whenever existing ones prove insufficient. More broadly, our results suggest that current training-based methods do not yet extract insights beyond their training data, and motivate benchmarks that explicitly require interpretability methods to demonstrate such insights. We release our code at https://github.com/SriramB-98/HARP

</details>


### [293] [EA-RMENet -- Path Loss Prediction in Urban Environments using Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16449)
*Jonathan O'Shea,Conor Brennan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EA-RMENet，一种基于U-Net框架融合EfficientNetB5编码器、注意力门控跳跃连接和ASPP的深度学习模型，用于高效精准的无线电地图估计，在RadioMapSeer3D数据集上达到0.0334 RMSE，推理时间仅0.022秒/样本，并在ICASSP 2023挑战赛中获得第三名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有路径损耗预测方法难以兼顾精度与计算效率，亟需一种既能保持高预测精度又具备实时推理能力的解决方案。

Method: 采用U-Net架构，以EfficientNetB5为编码器（通过复合缩放平衡精度与效率），引入注意力门控跳跃连接抑制无关特征，并利用空洞空间金字塔池化捕获多尺度上下文信息。

Result: 在RadioMapSeer3D数据集上测试RMSE为0.0334，推理时间0.022秒/样本；在ICASSP 2023挑战赛中以0.0406 RMSE位列第三。

Conclusion: EA-RMENet在保证高预测精度的同时实现了极快的推理速度，具备实际部署于无线网络规划的潜力。

Abstract: Accurate path loss prediction is a critical component of wireless network planning. Current path loss prediction methods typically struggle to balance the trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency. This paper proposes the Efficient Attention Radio Map Estimation Network (EA-RMENet) which is an image data-driven, deep learning (DL) model designed for radio map estimation (RME). EA-RMENet uses a U-Net framework with an EfficientNetB5 encoder, Attention Gated (AG) skip connections, and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP). The EfficientNet encoder uses compound scaling to balance accuracy and efficiency. AG skip connections suppress irrelevant features, and the ASPP captures a multi-scale context. The model has a test prediction RMSE of 0.0334 on the RadioMapSeer3D dataset with an inference time of 0.022 seconds/sample. In the ICASSP 2023 Radio Map Prediction Challenge, the model ranks third with a competitive RMSE of 0.0406 this highlights the models potential for real-world RME.

</details>


### [294] [Compact convolutional neural networks for AI-based drone detection system](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16455)
*Gábor Farkas,Gábor Fazekas,Karakai Patrik,András Németh,Gábor Farkas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用轻量级卷积神经网络，将无人机射频信号转换为时域图像进行实时检测，在保证高精度的同时显著降低计算成本，适用于嵌入式电子战系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代冲突中第一人称视角无人机（FPV）广泛应用，需要紧凑、可靠的检测系统在复杂电磁环境中运行，而现有频域方法预处理开销大，不适合嵌入式部署。

Method: 使用软件定义无线电（SDR）采集无人机射频信号，将样本转换为栅格化时域图像作为输入；设计多种轻量级CNN架构，通过约4万张标注图像进行训练和评估；模型集成到GNU Radio信号处理链中实现实时检测。

Result: 紧凑模型在保持高检测精度的同时，计算需求低，适用于嵌入式射频监控；相比基于频谱图的射频检测方法，消除了频域预处理，计算开销显著降低，精度相当。

Conclusion: 时域图像结合轻量级CNN是替代传统频谱图方法的有效方案，在嵌入式电子战系统中具有良好应用前景。

Abstract: The increasing use of first-person-view drones in modern conflicts has created a demand for compact and reliable detection systems capable of operating in complex electromagnetic environments. These drones continuously transmit video signals through onboard video transmitters, generating radio-frequency emissions that can be exploited for early detection. This study investigates the use of lightweight convolutional neural networks for automated detection of drone signals captured by a software-defined radio-based electronic warfare framework. Samples are converted into rasterized time-domain images, providing a computationally efficient input representation suitable for embedded systems. Several custom model architectures were designed and benchmarked in terms of accuracy, model size, and inference performance using a dataset containing approximately 40,000 labeled images. In addition to offline testing, the models were integrated into a GNU Radio signal processing chain for real-time evaluation. The results show that compact models can achieve high detection accuracy while maintaining low computational requirements, making them suitable for embedded radio-frequency monitoring applications. Compared with existing spectrogram-based RF detection methods, the proposed approach eliminates frequency-domain preprocessing and achieves comparable accuracy with significantly reduced computational cost.

</details>


### [295] [K-IPO: Kendall-constrained Importance Preserving Oversampling for Imbalanced Tabular Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16478)
*Marios Tyrovolas,Argiris Sofotasios,Dimitris Metaxakis,Georgios Mermigkis,George Georgoulas,Panagiotis Hadjidoukas,Chrysostomos Stylios*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出K-IPO框架，在过采样过程中通过Kendall's tau约束保护原始特征重要性排序，在20个数据集上实现了特征重要性保持、解释一致性和分类性能的平衡提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有过采样方法虽能缓解类别不平衡，但会扭曲特征重要性排序，影响模型可解释性；此前研究仅量化了这种扭曲，未能主动预防。

Method: 提出"先生成后选择"框架K-IPO，迭代生成少数类候选样本，仅当加入后与原始特征重要性排名的Kendall's tau相关系数满足用户定义阈值时才接受，并可对高重要性特征施加更严格约束。

Result: 在20个不平衡二分类数据集上，K-IPO在特征重要性保持、解释一致性和类别可分性方面多数达到最优或并列最优，同时一般能提升预测性能并保持可接受的运算开销。

Conclusion: K-IPO是一种生成器无关的通用框架，能够在过采样中有效保护特征重要性排序，兼顾可解释性与预测性能。

Abstract: Oversampling is widely used to address class imbalance in tabular classification, but existing methods can distort the feature importance ranking underlying model explanations. Although recent studies have quantified this distortion by comparing real and synthetic data, none have actively sought to prevent it. In this paper, we introduce Kendall-constrained Importance-Preserving Oversampling (K-IPO), a generator-agnostic, "generate-then-select" framework that preserves the original data's feature importance ranking during augmentation. K-IPO iteratively generates minority-class candidates and accepts them only if their inclusion maintains a user-defined minimum Kendall's tau (τ) correlation with the reference ranking. Optionally, stricter constraints can be applied to the highest-ranked features. We evaluated K-IPO on 20 imbalanced binary classification datasets using three classifiers and multiple explanation methods. In most cases, K-IPO achieved the best or tied-best results in feature importance preservation, explanation consistency, and class separability. It also generally improved predictive performance while maintaining competitive computational overhead.

</details>


### [296] [Leakage-Robust Evaluation and Data-Scale Sensitivity of Attention-Enhanced Multi-Task Learning for Joint Fault Diagnosis and Remaining Useful Life Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16493)
*Md Mahamudur Rahaman Shamim,Md. Nuruzzaman,Zannatul Ferdus,Md Rajib Ahmed,Abieer Nwshad Anward,Mohammad Tooneer,Johir Uddin Khan,Khalid Hossen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多任务深度学习模型在故障分类和剩余寿命预测联合任务中的数据划分问题，发现随意划分可使准确率从20-60%膨胀到99.9%或降低到0%。提出了一种基于分块的无泄漏划分协议，并在三个公开数据集上验证了AMTLNet模型性能。实验表明，在无泄漏设置下AMTLNet分类准确率达84.12%，R2达0.86；多头注意力机制是回归稳定性的主要贡献者。研究还发现任务稳定性更多取决于标签来源而非任务类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多任务深度学习模型在预测性维护中越来越常用，但滑动窗口序列的训练/测试集划分方式会严重影响报告的性能，现有方法存在数据泄露导致评估结果虚假膨胀的问题，亟需一种无泄漏的评估协议来获得真实可信的性能指标。

Method: 采用AMTLNet（注意力增强的多任务架构），提出基于分块的无泄漏划分协议，使用五个随机种子、单因素方差分析和Tukey HSD检验进行统计评估，并在NASA C-MAPSS、NASA IMS和UCI液压系统三个公开基准上验证。

Result: 在C-MAPSS上，AMTLNet分类准确率84.12±0.96%，R2为0.86±0.01，与单任务CNN-LSTM基线相当；在小数据集上多任务训练不稳定；去除多头注意力分支使R2从0.861降至0.766，分类方差翻倍。

Conclusion: 提出了可复用的无泄漏审核协议和种子透明的评估方法，发现任务特定稳定性更多取决于标签来源而非任务类型，并为数据稀缺时是否适用联合训练提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Multi-task deep learning models that jointly perform fault classification and remaining useful life (RUL) regression are increasingly used in predictive maintenance, yet reported performance can be strongly affected by how sliding-window sequences are split into training and test sets. We investigate this issue using AMTLNet, an attention-enhanced multi-task architecture, on three public benchmarks: NASA C-MAPSS, NASA IMS, and the UCI Hydraulic System dataset. We show that naive splitting can inflate classification accuracy from a genuine 20-60 percent to 99.9 percent, or reduce it to 0 percent through degenerate class representation. To address this, we introduce a chunk-based, leakage-audited splitting protocol and evaluate all models using five seeds, one-way ANOVA, and Tukey HSD tests. On C-MAPSS, with 19,976 leakage-free training windows, AMTLNet matches a single-task CNN-LSTM baseline in classification, achieving 84.12 +/- 0.96 percent accuracy with Tukey p = 1.0, and reaches an R2 of 0.86 +/- 0.01 while significantly outperforming a naive multi-task baseline. On the smaller Bearing and Hydraulic datasets, multi-task training is unstable, but the failure mode differs: classification degrades for Bearing, whereas regression degrades for Hydraulic. We relate this asymmetry to label provenance and propose a practical framework for deciding when joint training is appropriate under data scarcity. Ablation results show that the multi-head attention branch is the main contributor to regression stability. Removing it reduces R2 from 0.861 to 0.766 and more than doubles classification variance, whereas the convolutional branch contributes little to regression despite using about one-third of the parameters. This study contributes a reusable leakage-audit protocol, seed-transparent evaluation, and evidence that task-specific stability depends more on label provenance than on task type.

</details>


### [297] [Feedback Attribution and Representation Geometry: Metrics for Comparing Individual and Shared Rewards in MARL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16524)
*Tasha Pais,Richard Higgins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究多智能体强化学习中，团队平均奖励与个体贡献奖励对智能体表征的影响。提出EffRank/n和D_act作为低开销诊断指标，在SMACv2上实验发现：表征几何结构主要由观测信息（如单位类型）决定，而非奖励分配方式；个体奖励主要在行为层面（D_act）体现差异，而非表征几何结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究多智能体强化学习中，团队平均奖励（忽视个体贡献差异）是否会在智能体的表征几何结构或行为上留下可测量的特征痕迹。

Method: 提出两个低开销诊断指标：EffRank/n（按智能体数量归一化的有效秩）和D_act（智能体间动作分布的平均KL散度）。在SMACv2的protoss_5_vs_5场景中，使用MAPPO算法，进行观测（单位类型可见/掩码）×奖励（个体伤害贡献奖励/共享团队奖励）的对比实验。

Result: 1）表征几何结构（EffRank/n、探针准确率）主要由观测信息主导，而非奖励分配方式；2）共享奖励与个体奖励下的EffRank/n相似（0.31 vs 0.29），探针准确率均远高于随机水平（0.75 vs 0.73）；3）个体奖励下D_act更高（1.23 vs 1.07），表明行为差异更明显；4）掩码单位类型后，探针信号大幅下降至0.49；5）两个指标的开销均小于5%。

Conclusion: 个体奖励下的智能体在能力上不逊于共享奖励，且角色可分；但SMACv2上表征几何结构由观测信息解释，奖励分配的影响主要体现在行为层面。几何诊断必须控制观测中的角色信息，并测试非直接观测的持久角色。EffRank/n和D_act是低开销的有效诊断工具。

Abstract: Cooperative multi-agent RL systems routinely use team-averaged rewards, a feedback-attribution choice that gives each agent the team outcome regardless of its individual contribution. We ask whether this leaves a measurable signature, geometric or behavioral, on learned representations. We propose EffRank/$n$ (effective rank normalized by agent count) and $D_\text{act}$ (mean pairwise KL divergence between agents' action distributions) as low-overhead diagnostics for reward-attribution effects, then test them on competent MAPPO agents in SMACv2 \texttt{protoss\_5\_vs\_5}, where unit type is encoded in the observation. In an observation $\times$ reward-attribution comparison (unit type observed vs.\ masked; individual damage-contribution reward vs.\ shared team reward), geometry follows observation rather than reward. With unit type observed, shared and individual rewards have similar EffRank/$n$ ($0.31{\pm}0.03$ vs.\ $0.29{\pm}0.02$) and probe accuracy ($0.75{\pm}0.05$ vs.\ $0.73{\pm}0.05$, both $\gg 1/3$ chance), while $D_\text{act}$ leans higher under individual rewards ($1.23{\pm}0.06$ vs.\ $1.07{\pm}0.20$). Masking unit type cuts the above-chance probe signal by more than half, to $0.49$ in both reward arms. In short: individually rewarded agents are competent and separable by role, but on SMACv2 the observation explains the geometry and reward attribution shows up mainly in behavior. Thus geometric diagnostics must control for observed role information and test persistent roles that are not directly observed. EffRank/$n$ and $D_\text{act}$ add $<$5\% overhead.

</details>


### [298] [Hierarchical Domain Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16528)
*Chenxiao Yang,Zhiyuan Li,Shai Ben-David,Nathan Srebro*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究探讨层次域泛化问题，指出除了假设类的复杂性外，训练/测试域的划分方式也是影响泛化能力的核心障碍。即使假设类很小、训练数据很大，某些域划分仍会导致泛化失败，表明域结构应成为现代泛化理论的首要关注对象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统泛化理论假设数据独立同分布，但现实中的域结构常常呈现层次化组织（如不同医院、不同地区的数据分布）。作者试图理解在有限观测区域外推至整个实例空间时，域层次结构如何影响泛化性能。

Method: 通过理论分析，将层次域泛化形式化为从有限观测区域到整个实例空间的外推问题，研究训练/测试域划分对泛化失败的影响，并证明即使假设类复杂度很低、训练样本很大，某些域划分仍不可避免泛化失败。

Result: 发现泛化失败的核心障碍不仅来自假设类的复杂度（即模型容量），更来自训练域与测试域的划分方式。无论假设类多小、训练数据多大，某些域划分方式总会导致某些目标域泛化失败。

Conclusion: 域结构应被纳入现代泛化理论的核心框架，成为与假设类复杂度同等重要的"一等公民"对象。

Abstract: We study hierarchical domain generalization as a problem of extrapolation from finite observed regions to an entire instance space, replacing i.i.d. sampling with arbitrary domain hierarchies. We show that the central obstruction is not only the complexity of the hypothesis class, but the train/test domain partition through which evidence is revealed. In particular, no matter how small the class or how large the training size, some partition makes generalization fail for some target. These results suggest that modern generalization theory must treat domain structure as a first-class object.

</details>


### [299] [Building2Building: A Large Scale Benchmark for Generalizable Real-World Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16534)
*Vincent Taboga,Justin Veilleux,Doseok Jang,Anushree Rankawat,Pierre-Luc Bacon*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了Building2Building (B2B)，一个基于EnergyPlus的大规模、多样化的HVAC控制环境套件，用于系统研究强化学习中的泛化、迁移和多任务学习等开放挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL策略在实际部署中对环境变化（动力学、动作空间、观测空间、目标）非常脆弱，而现有基准测试缺乏多样性和复杂性，难以系统研究迁移学习、多任务学习和元学习。

Method: 基于EnergyPlus构建了B2B套件，兼容Gymnasium接口，包含参数化建筑生成器，可系统生成具有异构观测和动作空间的多样化建筑配置。

Result: 定义了针对RL关键挑战的基准任务，包括目标适应、动力学适应、动作空间迁移和跨域迁移，提供了标准化评估协议。

Conclusion: B2B作为大规模、多样化、物理真实的测试平台，有助于系统研究连续控制中的泛化和迁移问题，同时通过改进HVAC控制具有重要的社会应用价值。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has achieved strong results in control, yet learned policies remain brittle to changes in dynamics, action spaces, observation spaces, or goals, a critical limitation for real-world deployment. Existing benchmarks offer limited diversity and complexity, making it difficult to rigorously study transfer, multi-task learning, and meta-learning in RL. We introduce Building2Building (B2B), a large-scale suite of realistic Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning (HVAC) control environments built on EnergyPlus, a state-of-the-art building simulator. B2B is fully compatible with the Gymnasium interface and features a parametric building generator, enabling the systematic generation of diverse building configurations with heterogeneous observation and action spaces. Based on this suite, we define benchmark tasks targeting key open challenges in RL, including goal adaptation, dynamics adaptation, action-space shifts, and cross-domain transfer. By providing a large-scale, diverse, and physically grounded testbed with standardized evaluation protocols, B2B enables systematic investigation of generalization and transfer in continuous control. Beyond advancing research on generalization in RL, this new benchmark also carries significant societal implications by enabling improved HVAC control at scale, one of the most energy-intensive systems in buildings.

</details>


### [300] [Discrete Ricci Curvature on Protein Contact Graphs for Lightweight Fold Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16553)
*Jianru Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了离散Ricci曲率作为轻量级结构描述符在蛋白质折叠分类中的应用，仅用22维特征（ESM-2的3.4%）即可超越平均池化的ESM-2嵌入，与持续同调结合后性能最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管蛋白质折叠分类可采用基于序列或结构的方法，但轻量级手工描述符与预训练蛋白质语言模型嵌入之间的直接比较尚不充分，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 提取Cα接触图的Ollivier-Ricci和Forman-Ricci边曲率分布的总结统计量与分位数，构建22维固定长度特征向量，在CATH和SCOPe基准上对比几何特征、图统计、持续同调及ESM-2（150M）基线。

Result: 仅22维的Ricci描述符在两个数据集上均超越平均池化的ESM-2嵌入；与持续同调结合后，在CATH上macro-F1达0.71，SCOPe上达0.68（112维特征），性能最优。

Conclusion: 存在一个适用场景，轻量级可解释图描述符可作为预训练蛋白质语言模型嵌入的实用替代方案。

Abstract: Protein fold classification can be approached via sequence-based representations or structural descriptors, but direct comparisons between lightweight handcrafted descriptors and pretrained protein language model embeddings remain limited. We investigate discrete Ricci curvature on Calpha contact graphs as a lightweight structural descriptor for fold classification. Each protein domain is represented by a 22-dimensional fixed-length feature derived from summary statistics and quantiles of Ollivier-Ricci and Forman-Ricci edge curvature distributions. We evaluate on CATH top-10 Topology classification and on the ASTRAL 40%-identity SCOPe top-10 Fold benchmark, comparing against geometry, contact-graph statistics, persistent homology, and mean-pooled ESM-2 (150M) baselines. On both datasets, lightweight structural descriptors substantially outperform mean-pooled ESM-2 embeddings, with a larger performance gap on the ASTRAL 40% SCOPe benchmark. Ricci alone uses 22 dimensions, or 3.4% of the ESM-2 baseline dimensionality, and already outperforms mean-pooled ESM-2 on both datasets. Combining Ricci with persistent homology yields the strongest performance, achieving macro-F1 of 0.71 on CATH and 0.68 on SCOPe with a 112-dimensional feature vector. These results identify a regime where lightweight interpretable graph descriptors offer a practical alternative to pretrained protein language model embeddings.

</details>


### [301] [FailureAtlas: A Taxonomy of Failure Modes in Multi-Provider LLM Serving Infrastructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17525)
*Vishal Pandey,Gopal Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个针对多提供商LLM网关故障的两轴分类法（按起源层和可检测性分类），发现最严重的故障是"静默故障"——返回HTTP 200、通过健康检查但破坏应用状态，并首次发现了并发竞争导致历史丢失和流式索引冲突导致工具调用损坏两种静默故障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多提供商LLM网关已成为生产基础设施，但其特定的故障模式缺乏系统性记录和统一的分析框架，故障信息散落在issue追踪和事故报告中，亟需一个结构化的分类体系。

Method: 提出了一个双轴分类法，按故障起源层（网络/传输、流式/协议、状态/会话、模型行为、治理/成本）和可检测性（显式vs.静默）两个维度对故障进行分类。通过公开bug报告和一手压力测试收集了5个经过验证的故障条目，并进行了机制性根因分析。

Result: 发现最具有操作严重性的故障是静默故障——返回HTTP 200、通过所有标准健康检查，但以需要语义级可观测性才能检测的方式破坏应用状态。首次发现了并发竞争导致历史丢失和流式索引冲突导致工具调用损坏两种静默故障，并提供了3个可复现的脚本。

Conclusion: LLM网关的静默故障是运营中最危险的一类故障，现有检测手段（标准健康检查）无法有效发现，需要语义级可观测性。该分类法为后续的系统性防御和监控提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Multi-provider LLM gateways reverse proxies that route, load-balance, and rate-limit requests across foundation-model APIs have become critical production infrastructure. Yet the failure modes specific to this architectural layer remain undocumented, scattered across issue trackers and post-mortems with no unifying framework. We introduce \fa{}, a two-axis taxonomy that classifies failures by their \emph{origin layer} (Network/Transport, Streaming/Protocol, State/Session, Model~Behavior, Governance/Cost) and their \emph{detectability} (Loud vs.\ Silent). We populate this taxonomy with five verified catalog entries sourced from public bug reports and first-hand stress testing, each accompanied by a mechanistic root-cause analysis. Three entries include standalone reproduction scripts. Our principal finding is that the most operationally severe failures are \emph{silent}: they return HTTP~200, pass every standard health check, and corrupt application state in ways that require semantic-level observability to detect. Two such silent failures a concurrency race condition causing history loss and a streaming index collision corrupting tool-call payloads were discovered first-hand during \cb{} evaluation campaigns.

</details>


### [302] [Capacity and Redundancy Trade-offs in Multi-Task Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16554)
*Asif Khan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出容量-冗余恒等式分解多任务学习中的负迁移，并证明聚类共享优于全局共享的条件，以及梯度与总相关之间的理论联系。实验表明聚类LoRA能有效降低残差耦合，带来显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多任务学习中负迁移现象常被归因于优化问题，但本文试图从容量限制和任务冗余不足的角度理解其根本原因。

Method: 提出容量-冗余恒等式，将任务预测信息分解为联合预测信息（含标签总相关）和残差耦合项；推导聚类间隔分解以给出聚类共享优于全局共享的充要条件；在高斯多任务模型中建立梯度与总相关之间的桥梁。

Result: 提出残差耦合Δ的验证集估计方法，实验表明聚类LoRA显著降低Δ，优于随机划分，且统计显著。

Conclusion: 聚类共享策略能有效减少任务间干扰，基于总相关的梯度相似度可作为任务冗余排序的合理代理。

Abstract: In multi-task learning (MTL) negative transfer is often considered as an optimization artifact, but it can also be viewed as a consequence of limited shared capacity and weak task redundancy. We investigate this effect through a Capacity--Redundancy (CR) identity that decomposes the sum of per-task predictive informations into joint predictive information that includes label redundancy defined via total correlation (TC), and a residual coupling term that quantifies interference left unresolved by the shared representation. Additionally, we show two key results: (i) a clustering-gap decomposition that gives a necessary and sufficient condition for clustered sharing to outperform global sharing, and (ii) a gradient--TC bridge in a Gaussian multi-task model that formally justifies gradient cosine similarity as a proxy for redundancy ordering. Empirically, we estimate the residual coupling $Δ$ from validation residual correlations, showing that clustered LoRA substantially reduces $\widehatΔ$, outperforms size-matched random partitions, and results in statistically significant gains with multi-seed confidence intervals.

</details>


### [303] [Learning from World Feedback: Why Model Uncertainty Fails as a Risk Signal in Model-Based RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16591)
*Zhaohui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RLxF范式，主张学习信号应来自世界反馈而非内部模型代理。在安全模型预测控制中，通过三个设计原则证实：基于动力学的模型不确定性惩罚反而增加碰撞率（26%→34%），而来自世界的三个反馈信号（激光雷达裕度、碰撞时间、基于碰撞标签训练的结果监督反馈模型）可将碰撞率降至1-14%。其机制在于模型不确定性与任务风险在支持空间上几乎不相关（r < 0.15），并论证该原则同样适用于LLM对齐中的验证器或RLHF方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前安全模型预测控制中广泛使用基于世界模型内部的不确定性代理作为安全信号，但作者发现这种内部代理与实际安全之间存在反相关关系，亟需建立更有效的学习信号范式。

Method: 1）提出RLxF三原则：在真实世界结果中扎根风险、部署前验证代理、当直接世界信号不可用时使用基于结果训练的反馈模型；2）在四种世界模型架构上对比内部代理信号（模型不确定性）与三种世界反馈信号（激光雷达最小距离裕度、碰撞时间、基于碰撞标签训练的g_psi模型）；3）使用TOST统计等价检验和相关性分析验证。

Result: 1）四种世界模型架构的MPC规划统计等价（TOST, n=200）；2）基于动力学的模型不确定性惩罚使碰撞率从26%升至34%；3）世界反馈信号将碰撞率降至1-14%；4）模型不确定性与任务风险的相关性r < 0.15，说明二者支持空间几乎不重叠。

Conclusion: RLxF范式从根本上优于内部模型代理信号，其机制是结构性而非经验性。该方法不仅适用于安全模型预测控制，也适用于LLM对齐中的RLHF和验证器方法，为设计更安全、更可靠的AI系统提供了通用指导原则。

Abstract: The RLxF programme argues that learning signals should come from world feedback rather than from internal model proxies. We instantiate this position in safe model-based control and distil it into three concrete design principles. Empirically, across four world-model architectures spanning a 2x MSE range, MPC planning is statistically equivalent (TOST, n=200), and dynamics-based uncertainty penalties increase collision rates from 26% to 34%: the standard MBRL safety proxy is anti-correlated with safety in this regime. Replacing the model-internal proxy with three world-feedback signals (a sensor-derived margin via minimum lidar, a temporal signal via time-to-collision, and an outcome-supervised feedback model g_psi trained on prior collision labels, structurally analogous to outcome-trained reward models in RLHF) reduces collisions to 1-14% without retraining the world model or the planner. The mechanism is structural: model uncertainty has support over state-prediction space, whereas task risk has support over constraint boundaries, with empirical correlation r < 0.15. From this we extract three RLxF principles (ground risk in world outcomes, validate proxies before deployment, and substitute outcome-trained feedback models when direct world signals are unavailable) and argue they apply equally to model-based control and to verifier-based or RLHF approaches in LLM alignment.

</details>


### [304] [Privacy Cost as Equity Input: A Group Fairness Criterion for Differentially Private Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16620)
*Rakshit Naidu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出隐私-公平性度量指标PCER（隐私成本公平比率），用于评估差分隐私机器学习系统中不同群体承担的隐私暴露成本与获得的预测收益是否成比例。实验表明，现有公平性指标可能掩盖受保护群体同时面临更高隐私风险和更差预测结果的双重劣势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究将差分隐私的公平性问题局限于预测结果层面的差异，忽视了隐私成本本身也是一种伤害。作者认为，若某个群体非自愿地承受更大的隐私暴露，则应获得成比例的系统收益，从而将补偿性公平框架引入隐私保护系统审计。

Method: 定义PCER为群体正预测率除以该群体的过拟合差距（过拟合差距通过成员推断攻击上界衡量隐私暴露）。该方法仅需每组训练集和测试集准确率，无需影子模型，可作为后验审计工具。在六个基准任务（含表格数据和NLP领域）上，与标准公平性指标对比评估。

Result: 在COMPAS数据集上，PCER揭示了受保护群体同时面临更高隐私暴露和更差预测结果的双重劣势，而人口统计均等性指标完全掩盖了这一现象。敏感性分析显示，极强的隐私保证会使所有群体的过拟合降至数值下限，导致基于暴露的审计在该区间失效。

Conclusion: 隐私保护系统的公平性审计必须同时考虑谁承担了保护成本，而不仅仅是谁从结果中受益。PCER提供了一种实用的工具来揭示传统结果导向指标无法捕捉的隐私-公平性权衡。

Abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is increasingly deployed to limit membership inference risk in machine-learning systems. Prior work has shown that DP-SGD can widen accuracy disparities across demographic groups, but this framing treats fairness as a purely outcome-side concern. We argue that privacy cost, the information leakage borne by each group, is itself a form of harm, and adopt a compensatory-fairness framework in which a group that involuntarily bears greater privacy exposure is owed proportionally greater benefit from the system. From this principle we derive the \emph{Privacy-Cost Equity Ratio} (PCER), a group fairness metric defined as a group's positive prediction rate normalized by its per-group overfitting gap. By a standard membership inference bound, this overfitting gap upper-bounds each group's vulnerability to inference attacks, making PCER a conservative measure of benefit relative to exposure. PCER needs only per-group train and test accuracy (no shadow models), making it a practical post-hoc audit tool. We evaluate PCER alongside standard fairness metrics across six benchmark--attribute combinations spanning tabular and NLP domains, under DP-SGD at a range of privacy budgets, and validate the overfitting-gap proxy against a direct threshold membership-inference attack. The results reveal patterns that outcome-based metrics miss. On COMPAS, PCER uncovers a persistent double disadvantage: the protected group bears both greater privacy exposure and worse predictive outcomes, something demographic parity gap masks entirely. Sensitivity analysis shows very strong privacy guarantees collapse both groups' overfitting to a numerical floor, rendering exposure-based audits uninformative in that regime. Together, these findings show that fairness audits of privacy-preserving systems must account for who bears the cost of protection, not only who benefits from its outcomes.

</details>


### [305] [Multimodal Attention-based Deep Learning for Emergency Triage with Electronic Health Records](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16662)
*Hazqeel Afyq Athaillah Kamarul Aryffin,Kamarul Aryffin Baharuddin,Mohd Halim Mohd Noor*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种多模态深度学习架构，通过自注意力机制融合文本主诉与数值生命体征数据用于急诊分诊决策，在马来西亚一所大学医院数据集上验证，相比基线模型准确率提升1.95%，F1分数提升2.49%，ROC AUC提升1.41%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确的急诊分诊决策对避免临床恶化、发病率和死亡率至关重要。现有机器学习分诊系统需要同时处理文本主诉和数值生命体征数据，但如何有效建模两种数据类型的时序结构和依赖关系仍是一大挑战。

Method: 提出多模态深度学习架构，同时处理表格数据（生命体征）和文本数据（主诉），利用自注意力机制捕捉特征间的局部和全局关系。数据集包含11,102条来自马来西亚理科大学医院急诊科的分诊记录。

Result: 相比基线模型，准确率提升1.95%，F1分数提升2.49%，ROC AUC提升1.41%。

Conclusion: 实验结果表明所提出的多模态模型在预测分诊决策方面具有潜力，通过融合文本和数值信息并利用自注意力机制，能有效提升分诊准确性。

Abstract: Accurate emergency triage decision is critical to avoid clinical deterioration, morbidity, and mortality. Machine learning-based triage system involves acquiring the main presenting complaint in text form and assessing vital signs in numerical data, enabling an automated and efficient analysis of patient information for timely and accurate prioritization of medical attention. However, modelling the intricacies of both data types requires a comprehensive understanding of the temporal structure and dependencies within the data. Thus, the aim of this study is to propose a multimodal deep learning architecture that can effectively handle both tabular and textual data. Furthermore, the proposed model exploits self-attention to to capture both local and global relationships between the features. A dataset consisting of 11,102 triage data collected from emergency department of Hospital Universiti Sains Malaysia is used for model development and validation. The proposed model demonstrated an increase of 1.95% in accuracy, 2.49% in F1-score, and 1.41% in ROC AUC compared to the baseline model. The experimental results demonstrated the potential of the proposed model in predicting triage decisions.

</details>


### [306] [CLDRoute: Conditional Latent Diffusion for Routability Map Generation in Physical Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16674)
*Kiran Thorat,Nicole Meng,Caiwen Ding,Yingjie Lao,Zhijie Jerry Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CLDRoute，将可布线性估计从确定性预测重构为条件生成问题，使用潜扩散模型同时生成布线拥塞和DRC违规的空间分布图及其不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统物理设计中的可布线性估计采用确定性预测方法，只能输出单一结果，无法捕捉实际布线过程的随机性和不确定性，导致事后布线迭代代价高昂。

Method: 将可布线性估计建模为条件生成问题，使用条件潜扩散模型(CLDRoute)，通过物理感知条件注入和任务特定潜空间建模，分别处理拥塞图和DRC图的不同特征，支持基于采样的推理输出均值预测和空间不确定性估计。

Result: 在CircuitNet 2.0(N28)上，DRC违规生成SSIM=0.9678, MAE=0.0028, TopK@1%=0.3494；拥塞生成SSIM=0.9031, MAE=0.0286, NZ-Pearson=0.3692。

Conclusion: CLDRoute框架通过在布局阶段同时生成期望结果及其不确定性，提供了更实用的可布线性视图，有助于减少后续布线迭代成本。

Abstract: Accurate routability estimation during physical design is important for reducing costly post-routing iterations. Prior learning-based methods treat this task as deterministic prediction, mapping placement-stage features to a single congestion or DRC outcome. We instead formulate routability estimation as a conditional generation problem, where both routing congestion and DRC violations are modeled as spatially structured routability fields. Our framework, Conditional Latent Diffusion for Routeability estimation (CLDRoute), uses physics-aware conditioning and task-specific latent modeling to handle the different characteristics of congestion and DRC maps. This allows our method to supports sample-based inference, producing both a mean prediction and a spatial uncertainty estimate for the same input design. On CircuitNet 2.0 (N28), our method achieves, for DRC violation generation, an SSIM of 0.9678, an MAE of 0.0028, and a TopK@1% of 0.3494; for congestion generation, it achieves an SSIM of 0.9031, an MAE of 0.0286, and an NZ-Pearson of 0.3692. Overall, our framework provides a more practical view of routability at placement by generating both the expected outcome and its uncertainty.

</details>


### [307] [A Framework for Early Sepsis Prediction via Self-Supervised (JEPA) and Federated Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16681)
*Umair bin Mansoor,Munaf Rashid,Roomi Naqvi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了四种建模范式（JEPA、VICReg、半监督微调VICReg、TCN）用于早期脓毒症预测，发现JEPA+XGBoost+均值池化在仅用17%的生物标志物下达到接近SupMix的AUPRC（0.636 vs 0.667），而VICReg预训练+半监督微调+XGBoost在预测时间鲁棒性上表现最佳（H0到H10仅衰减16.8%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录中的早期脓毒症预测面临不规则采样、高缺失率和类别不平衡三大挑战，现有方法缺乏对不同建模范式的系统性比较，尤其是自监督学习在该场景下的潜力尚未充分探索。

Method: 采用统一的预处理流程（每小时分箱+前向填充），从MIMIC-III数据集中通过稀疏性分析选取7种生物标志物，系统比较JEPA（掩码隐空间预测）、VICReg（方差-不变性-协方差正则化+双视角增强）、半监督微调VICReg编码器、有监督TCN以及原始特征基线。

Result: JEPA+XGBoost+均值池化在发病时刻AUPRC达0.636（SupMix为0.667，生物标志物少83%）；VICReg预训练+半监督微调+XGBoost的AUPRC为0.510（比原始特征提升3.1倍，比TCN提升7.6%）；微调VICReg编码器从H0到H10仅衰减16.8%，远优于TCN的47.5%和JEPA的65.3%。

Conclusion: 自监督预训练结合任务感知微调能产生既在发病时刻精准、又跨预测时间窗口鲁棒的特征表示，JEPA架构在资源受限场景下表现出色，而VICReg微调方案在时间持久性上最优。

Abstract: Early sepsis prediction from electronic health records is challenged by irregular sampling, high missingness, and class imbalance. We systematically compare four modeling paradigms -- self-supervised Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (JEPA) via masked latent prediction, self-supervised VICReg (variance-invariance-covariance regularization) with two-view augmentation, semi-supervised fine-tuning of a VICReg-pretrained encoder, and supervised Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) -- alongside raw-feature baselines. All models share a common preprocessing pipeline of hourly binning with forward-fill imputation applied to 7 biomarkers selected via sparsity analysis from the MIMIC-III dataset. Our best model (JEPA + XGBoost + mean pooling) achieves AUPRC 0.636 at the time of onset (H0), approaching the SupMix benchmark (0.667) while using 83\% fewer biomarkers. The Tier 1 pipeline -- VICReg pretraining followed by semi-supervised fine-tuning and XGBoost -- achieves AUPRC 0.510 at H0, a 3.1$\times$ improvement over the raw-feature baseline (0.165) and a 7.6\% improvement over the end-to-end supervised TCN (0.474). Crucially, the fine-tuned VICReg encoder exhibits the most temporally persistent representations, degrading only 16.8\% from H0 to H10 compared to 47.5\% for supervised TCN and 65.3\% for JEPA, demonstrating that self-supervised pretraining with task-aware fine-tuning yields features that are both sharp near onset and robust across prediction horizons.

</details>


### [308] [Building a Neural Network from Scratch: Implementation, Evaluation, and Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16682)
*Yuanzhe Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从头实现了一个不依赖自动微分或深度学习库的神经网络框架，涵盖多层架构、激活函数、正则化技术和优化器，旨在弥合深度学习实践与底层原理之间的鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高级深度学习库的广泛使用虽然加速了模型开发，但也使得神经网络内部机制被高度抽象，导致实践者对其底层原理理解不足。作者希望提供一个透明的、自包含的实现来弥补这一认知差距。

Method: 从零实现完整的神经网络框架，不借助自动微分或预构建的深度学习模块，包含多层架构、多种激活函数、正则化技术及先进优化器，并通过多分类任务验证其性能。

Result: 该框架在多类分类任务上表现出色，验证了其正确性、数值稳定性和泛化能力，能够在多种配置下稳定运行。

Conclusion: 该框架不仅作为教学工具能够清晰展示前向/反向传播、梯度动态和优化景观等核心概念，其可扩展的模块化设计也使其成为教育目的和未来研究的可靠基准。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of high-level deep learning libraries, while accelerating model development, has increasingly abstracted away the internal mechanics of neural networks, creating a gap between practical usage and fundamental understanding. To address this, the paper presents a self-contained neural network framework implemented entirely from scratch -- without relying on automatic differentiation or pre-built deep learning modules. The implementation encompasses all essential components, including multi-layer architectures, diverse activation functions, regularization techniques, and state-of-the-art optimizers. Beyond serving as a pedagogical instrument that demystifies forward/backward propagation, gradient dynamics, and optimization landscapes, the framework demonstrates robust performance when applied to a multi-class classification task, successfully validating its correctness, numerical stability, and generalization across varied configurations. The extensible design and clean modularity further position it as a reliable baseline for educational purposes and future research exploration.

</details>


### [309] [Effects of width-dependent model hyperparameters and $\ell_2$-regularization on the loss landscape of two-layer ReLU networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16720)
*Haruka Eshima,Makoto Yamada*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了带权重衰减（L2正则化）的两层ReLU网络的全局最优解特性，发现特定超参数设置会导致全局最小值坍缩到零解；实验表明AdamW优化器能防止这种坍缩而SGD不能；当输入维度为1时推导出了全局最优参数的解析解，并揭示了L2正则化对网络连通性的宽度不变效应及其随宽度增加而增强的降维效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络的理论性质（尤其是两层ReLU网络在权重衰减下的行为）仍不清晰，理解这些理论性质是机器学习领域的核心挑战。

Method: 1) 推导了超参数设置下全局最小值坍缩到零解的充分条件；2) 通过实验对比AdamW和SGD优化器对参数坍缩的影响；3) 在一维输入情况下，推导了两层ReLU网络全局最优参数集的解析解，并分析了L2正则化对网络连通性和降维效应的影响。

Result: 1) 找到了导致全局最小值坍缩到零解的超参数充分条件；2) AdamW能防止参数坍缩而SGD不能；3) 一维情况下获得了全局最优参数的解析解；4) L2正则化的连通性效应与宽度无关，但降维效应随宽度增加而增强。

Conclusion: 这些结果为理解宽度相关超参数如何影响正则化损失景观的几何结构提供了重要洞见，并有助于解释AdamW在深度学习训练中的成功。

Abstract: Understanding deep neural networks remains a central challenge in machine learning. In particular, the theoretical properties of even two-layer ReLU networks, especially in the presence of weight decay, remain poorly understood. To this end, we derive a sufficient condition on the hyperparameter settings under which the global minima collapse to the zero solution. Interestingly, our experiments reveal that using AdamW as an optimizer prevents the collapse of the learned parameters, whereas using SGD does not, which may help explain the success of AdamW in deep learning training. In addition, when restricting the input dimension to one, we derive an analytical solution for the globally optimal parameter sets of two-layer ReLU networks and show that $\ell_2$-regularization has a width-invariant effect on connectivity, but its dimensionality-reducing effect becomes stronger as the network width increases. These results provide insight into how width-dependent hyperparameters influence the geometry of regularized loss landscapes.

</details>


### [310] [Half the Experts, All the Code: One-Shot Domain Pruning of Mixture-of-Experts LLMs for Coding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16721)
*Anik Jha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究MoE代码模型（Qwen3.6-35B-A3B和Gemma-4-26B-A4B）的专家剪枝，发现可安全移除一半专家而不显著损失代码生成能力，主要影响非编码能力；但最优剪枝策略因模型而异，且困惑度指标可能误导；轻量微调可恢复约一半损失；剪枝仅在量化低于3比特时优于量化；单次基准测试会夸大压缩惩罚。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE模型的专家池占用大量显存，但普通用户仅需编码能力，大量专家从未被调用。研究者希望探究能否通过剪枝移除冗余专家以降低部署门槛。

Method: 对两种MoE模型（Qwen3.6-35B-A3B和Gemma-4-26B-A4B）采用五种专家选择策略进行剪枝，以代码正确性为主要评估指标，并对比困惑度、量化、微调恢复等维度。

Result: 可移除一半专家而无统计显著的代码能力下降；最优策略因模型而异；困惑度不靠谱（可能给坏模型高分）；轻量微调恢复约一半损失；剪枝仅在量化低于3比特时优于量化；单次基准测试严重低估压缩后模型能力。

Conclusion: 专家剪枝可行但需针对具体任务和模型单独验证，不能跨模型族照搬策略。

Abstract: The strongest open-weight coding models are mixture-of-experts (MoE) networks: most of their size comes from large pools of "expert" subnetworks, of which only a few act on any token. That pool is why these models do not fit on the machines most developers own, yet for a user who only wants coding help, most experts encode abilities that will never be invoked. We ask how many experts can be removed, and which, by pruning two recent open-weight MoE models from different families (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B and Gemma-4-26B-A4B) under five selection strategies, judged the way a user would: by whether the model still writes correct code. Half the experts can be removed from either model with no statistically detectable loss on the primary code benchmark, and the damage lands almost entirely on abilities outside coding, the intended trade. But the winning strategy flips between the two models, so a recipe validated on one family cannot be assumed to work on another. We further show that perplexity, the metric much of the pruning literature leans on, can rate a broken model above an intact one; that a lightweight fine-tune recovers about half of what aggressive pruning loses; and that against quantizing the full model to the same memory, pruning wins only where quantization would have to drop below 3 bits per weight. Five attempts to overturn that crossover, with failure criteria fixed in advance (better calibration, guarded selection, causal expert importance, failure attribution, and an agentic evaluation letting each model repair its failures from execution feedback), all leave it standing; the last shows single-shot benchmarks overstate compression penalties broadly, as one repair turn erases the 2-bit quantization penalty entirely. Expert pruning works, but it demands per-model validation on the task the model will actually serve.

</details>


### [311] [Graph-Embedded Intuitionistic Fuzzy Broad Learning System: A Multi-view Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16728)
*Yogesh Kumar,Manju,Mudasir Ganaie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种多视图图嵌入直觉模糊宽度学习系统(MVGIFBLS)，融合多视图学习、图嵌入和直觉模糊理论，在多个基准数据集上取得了更高的AUC分数和更强的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统BLS对所有数据点同等对待，对噪声和异常值敏感；未考虑数据的几何结构；难以处理多源数据。

Method: 将多视图学习、图嵌入（基于局部Fisher判别分析的内在和惩罚子空间）和直觉模糊理论集成到BLS框架中，并通过核邻域分析捕获局部数据结构。

Result: 在UCI、KEEL和AwA基准数据集上，MVGIFBLS在AUC指标上优于对比方法，且在高斯特征噪声下表现稳健。

Conclusion: 各组件（多视图学习、图嵌入、直觉模糊理论）均对整体框架有正向贡献，MVGIFBLS在分类性能和鲁棒性方面优于传统BLS。

Abstract: The Broad Learning System (BLS) has been widely used for data classification and is based on a layer-by-layer feed-forward structure. However, it gives the same importance to all data points, which reduces its effectiveness on real-world datasets with noise and outliers. In addition, it does not consider the geometric structure of the data and has limitations in handling data from multiple sources. To address these challenges, we propose a Multi-View Graph-Embedded Intuitionistic Fuzzy Broad Learning System (MVGIFBLS) that integrates multi-view learning, graph embedding, and intuitionistic fuzzy theory into the BLS framework. This design enables the model to combine information from multiple sources and learn more discriminative representations. Graph embedding captures the geometric relationships among samples and improves class separation through intrinsic and penalty subspaces based on local Fisher discriminant analysis. Intuitionistic fuzzy theory enhances robustness to noise, while kernel-based neighborhood analysis captures local data structures. We evaluate the proposed framework on several UCI, KEEL, and AwA benchmark datasets using comparative evaluation, Gaussian feature noise analysis, ablation studies, and statistical analysis. The results demonstrate that each component contributes positively to the overall framework and that the proposed MVGIFBLS consistently achieves higher Area Under the Curve (AUC) scores and maintains robust performance under Gaussian feature noise.

</details>


### [312] [BG4Sea: Biogeochemical Seasonal Forecastability via Progressive Information Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16731)
*Gabriela Martinez Balbontin,Anastase Charantonis,Dominique Bereziat,Stefano Ciavatta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BG4Sea是首个全球、数据驱动的海洋生物地球化学季节预报系统，采用模块化架构（列自编码器+潜在预报器+表面强迫调节+水平耦合模块），在BIORYS4再分析数据上实现1/4度、月分辨率的六个月多变量预报，性能优于持久性和气候态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 海洋生物地球化学季节预报对生态系统管理和碳循环至关重要，但全球季节预报产品远落后于物理海洋学，主要受限于过程复杂性和数据稀缺。现有方法缺乏全球尺度、数据驱动的多变量季节预报系统。

Method: BG4Sea采用四模块架构：(1) 列自编码器将垂直剖面压缩至低维潜空间；(2) 潜在预报器在潜空间中进行时间演化；(3) 表面强迫调节模块通过FiLM注入物理边界信息；(4) 水平耦合模块通过交叉注意力融合邻域列上下文。模型在BIORYS4 (NEMO/PISCES)全球海洋再分析数据上训练评估。

Result: 模型在1/4度、月分辨率下生成六个月预报，覆盖溶解化学、生物学和碳库变量。在大多数变量和预报时效上性能优于持久性和气候态基线。论文还对各模块的可预测性贡献进行了归因分析。

Conclusion: BG4Sea作为首个全球数据驱动的生物地球化学季节预报系统，为未来更具表达力的方法提供了可解释的基线。论文讨论了模型的结构性局限性，并指出可预测性归因于各模块的贡献。

Abstract: Marine biogeochemical forecasting is increasingly important for managing marine ecosystems and the carbon cycle, yet global, seasonal forecast products lag far behind physical oceanography, held back by the complexity of the processes involved and by data scarcity. We introduce BG4Sea, which to our knowledge is the first global, data-driven system to produce multivariate seasonal forecasts of the marine biogeochemical state. BG4Sea is a modular architecture with a column autoencoder that compresses the vertical column into a low-dimensional latent space, a latent forecaster propagates this representation forward in time, a surface-forcing conditioner that injects physical boundary information via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), and a horizontal-coupling module that incorporates neighboring-column context through cross-attention. The model is trained and evaluated on the global ocean reanalysis BIORYS4 (NEMO/PISCES), and produces six-month forecasts at 1/4 degree, monthly resolution for dissolved chemistry, biology, and carbon-pool variables, outperforming persistence and climatology across most variables and lead times. We position BG4Sea as an interpretable baseline for future, more expressive approaches, and discuss predictability attribution to each component, alongside the model's structural limitations.

</details>


### [313] [The Anatomy of a Truth Direction: Knowledge-Dependent Dimensionality, a Relational Law, and a Convergent Category Geometry in Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16741)
*Francesco Karim Vicidomini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过无监督SVD方法发现，大语言模型中的“真实性”表示存在于一个知识依赖的低维子空间：对于模型已知的事实，真实性信号集中在一个单一主轴上（AUC 0.938），随着知识减少或材料异质性增加，信号变得分散。研究进一步揭示了注意力层传播真实框架、前馈网络反对当前块框架的规律，并通过跨模型实验证明这种几何结构属于知识域而非架构域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在Bürger等人(2024)证明LLM中的真实性表示具有跨陈述极性的普遍性且存在于多维子空间的基础上，本文旨在回答三个问题：(1)子空间的维度如何依赖于模型的知识；(2)哪个架构组件构建了真实方向；(3)这个方向是由什么混合而成的。

Method: 第一部分使用单模型，通过SVD对隐藏状态最小对进行无监督方向探测（无需训练标签），并设计了七项证伪实验。第二部分跨四个基础模型（两个系列）进行预注册预测，分析注意力层和前馈网络对真实框架的传播与反对关系，并通过因果归因确定SwiGLU值流的作用。此外，利用33个类别、每类888对、六个种子的压力测试验证结果的稳健性。

Result: (1)真实性维度是知识依赖的：已知事实信号集中在一个轴上（AUC 0.938），知识减少时变得分散；(2)分解无需极性标签即可恢复Bürger等人的有监督方向（余弦相似度0.959）；(3)注意力层传播真实框架，前馈网络反对当前块框架；(4)SwiGLU值流是后峰值衰减的因果来源；(5)跨类别真实轴形成语义上有符号的排列，与词汇表面矛盾且跨系列收敛（Mantel p=0.0009）；(6)知识限制条件下跨系列相关性从+0.42提升至+0.74，证明几何结构属于知识域。

Conclusion: LLM中的真实性表示服从一个知识门控法则：其几何结构由知识域主导而非架构域。这意味着无监督SVD探测可有效提取模型的真实知识，且不同模型在知识受限区域呈现出显著收敛的真实方向排列。

Abstract: Bürger et al. (2024) demonstrated that truth representations in large language models are universal across statement polarity but reside within a multidimensional subspace. We extend that framework along three questions: how the dimensionality of the subspace depends on the model's knowledge, which architectural component builds the truth direction, and what the direction is a mixture of. In Part I (one model), a training-free directional probe derived from the SVD of hidden-state minimal pairs shows that the dimensionality of truth is knowledge-dependent: the signal is concentrated on a single axis for behaviorally known facts (held-out AUC 0.938) and becomes diffuse as knowledge decreases or material heterogeneity increases; seven falsification experiments sustain the one-dimensional reading, and the same decomposition recovers the supervised polarity direction of Bürger et al. at cosine 0.959 without polarity labels. In Part II (four base models, two families, pre-registered predictions), a relational law emerges: attention propagates truth frames it did not write, the feed-forward network opposes the frame of its current block, and the genuine post-peak decay is causally attributed on all four models to the SwiGLU value stream; per-category truth axes form a semantically signed arrangement that contradicts the lexical surface and converges across families (Mantel p = 0.0009). Stress tests at three scales (33 categories, 888 pairs per relation, six sampling seeds) expose a sign instability of the per-category orientation, repair it with a declared spectral consensus gauge, and sharpen the convergence into a knowledge-gated law, strengthening from +0.42 on dense mixed-knowledge material to +0.74 on knowledge-restricted categories: the geometry of the mixture belongs to the knowledge domain rather than to the architecture.

</details>


### [314] [Robust Losses from Univariate Base Functions for Noisy-Label Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16768)
*Peng Hu,Jianwei Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种从单变量基函数构建鲁棒多分类损失函数的通用框架，通过两种互补方案（目标分离与二元约简）实现，并基于基函数性质推导出噪声鲁棒性的充分条件，实验验证了该方法在各类噪声场景下的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒损失函数大多直接在最终多分类目标层面设计，难以系统刻画和扩展其鲁棒性；需要一种更通用的框架来理解、设计和扩展噪声鲁棒损失函数。

Method: 提出从单变量基函数映射到多分类损失函数的通用框架，开发了两种互补构建方案：Target Separation（类间独立）和 Binary Reduction（类间依赖），分别分析对称/非对称性质，推导噪声鲁棒性的充分条件。

Result: 在合成和真实噪声标签基准上进行了大量实验，所提损失函数在各种噪声设置下达到竞争性或更优的性能。

Conclusion: 该框架不仅为噪声鲁棒损失设计提供了理论准则，也提供了构建对称损失的新路径，是对基于归一化的对称损失设计的补充。

Abstract: Learning with noisy labels is a fundamental problem in training reliable deep neural networks. Robust loss functions provide a direct and effective way to mitigate the adverse effects of label noise. However, most existing robust losses are designed directly at the level of the final multiclass objective, which makes it difficult to systematically characterize and extend their robustness properties. In this paper, we propose a general framework that constructs robust multiclass losses from univariate base functions. By defining mapping operators from base functions to multiclass losses, the robustness of the induced losses can be characterized through simple properties of the base functions. We develop two complementary construction schemes, Target Separation and Binary Reduction, corresponding to inter-class independent and inter-class dependent formulations, respectively. For both schemes, we analyze their symmetry and asymmetry properties and derive corresponding sufficient conditions, which provide theoretical criteria for noise-robust loss design. The proposed framework also provides a new route to constructing symmetric losses, serving as a complement to normalization-based symmetric loss designs. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world noisy-label benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed losses achieve competitive or superior performance under various noise settings.

</details>


### [315] [On the Potential of Graph Neural Networks as Metamodels for Supply Chain Optimization: Dataset, Architectures, and Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16769)
*Tushar Lone,Neha Karanjkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出使用图神经网络(GNN)作为供应链系统的替代模型，通过构建大型公开训练数据集和SupplyNetPy仿真库，探索GNN在节点和网络层级预测上的应用，并展望其在拓扑梯度优化、快速设计空间探索和敏感性分析等方向的研究前景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 供应链系统传统元模型无法同时处理结构优化和参数优化，而GNN具备跨拓扑泛化的能力，有望成为结合结构和参数优化的替代模型，但目前GNN在供应链问题中的应用尚属空白。

Method: 1) 将供应链问题形式化为图结构问题；2) 创建大型公开训练数据集：通过SupplyNetPy仿真库程序化生成供应链图及其输入参数与稳态性能指标；3) 探索适用于节点级和网络级预测的GNN架构；4) 分析GNN替代模型与仿真之间在准确性与计算成本上的权衡。

Result: 成功构建了供应链图的公开数据集；初步确定了适用于供应链节点和网络层级预测的GNN架构；揭示了GNN替代模型与仿真之间的精确度-计算量权衡关系。

Conclusion: GNN作为供应链替代模型具有巨大潜力，未来方向包括基于梯度的拓扑优化、快速设计空间探索以及敏感性分析。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful, differentiable class of learning models for graph-structured systems. Their ability to generalize across topologies opens the prospect of a surrogate for combined structural and parametric optimization, which classical metamodels cannot offer. Supply chains are a natural target, yet the use of GNN surrogates for supply chain problems is largely unexplored. This paper lays the foundation, presents initial steps, and discusses key research directions. As a foundation, we formulate the problem and create a large public training dataset of programmatically generated supply chain graphs with input parameters and steady-state performance metrics obtained using our SupplyNetPy simulation library. As initial steps, we explore GNN architectures that work well as surrogates for node- and network-level predictions, and analyze their accuracy-compute trade-off against simulation. Most importantly, we outline the exciting directions this opens, namely gradient-based optimization over topology, fast design-space exploration, and sensitivity analysis.

</details>


### [316] [MultiLoReFT: Decoupling Shared and Modality-Specific Subspaces in Multimodal Learning via Low-Rank Representation Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16789)
*Sana Tonekaboni,Viktoria Schuster,Caroline Uhler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MultiLoReFT是一个高效的低秩表示微调框架，通过解耦多模态数据中的共享信息和模态特有信息，实现基于预训练单模态模型的多模态学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态模型训练面临两个难题：一是难以获取大规模对齐的多模态配对数据，二是现有表示常常将模态间共享信息与模态特有信息纠缠在一起，影响可解释性和可控性。

Method: 将低秩适应（LoRA）扩展到多模态场景，学习可解释的投影子空间，用于解耦模态间的共享信息和各模态的特有信息。

Result: 在模拟和真实基准测试中，MultiLoReFT生成的表示不仅支持多模态预测，还能明确揭示共享信息和模态特有信息在各模态间的分布方式。

Conclusion: MultiLoReFT为多模态学习提供了一种高效、可解释的解决方案，能有效利用预训练单模态模型，同时增强模型的可解释性和控制能力。

Abstract: Real-world perception and decision making are inherently multimodal, integrating complementary signals across modalities. However, training multimodal models faces two main obstacles. First, collecting large-scale, well-aligned paired multimodal datasets is often impractical, making end-to-end multimodal training difficult. Second, existing multimodal representations frequently entangle information shared across modalities with modality-specific information, hindering interpretability and control. We introduce MultiLoReFT, an efficient and scalable low-rank representation fine-tuning framework for multimodal learning with pretrained unimodal models. MultiLoReFT extends low-rank adaptation to the multimodal setting and learns interpretable projection subspaces that decouple shared and modality-specific information. Across simulated and real-world benchmarks, it produces representations that support multimodal prediction while explicitly revealing how shared and modality-specific information is distributed across modalities.

</details>


### [317] [Value-Monotonicity Matters: A Concordance Loss for Deep Survival Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16802)
*Meixu Chen,Kai Wang,Jing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出现有深度生存模型普遍使用似然损失函数训练但用C-index评估，两者存在不匹配问题。作者提出了一种值-单调一致性损失（SCL），其损失值能可靠地近似C-index，解决了似然损失在训练中损失值与排序性能脱钩的问题。在18个数据集上的实验表明，SCL在判别性能上与标准似然损失相当，且损失值与C-index的秩相关系数高达0.96-0.99（似然损失仅为-0.03到0.53）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度生存模型评估几乎只用C-index，但训练时使用似然损失（如Cox偏似然、离散时间负对数似然、DeepHit似然）。这种不匹配在端到端训练高容量编码器时，由于频繁计算C-index代价高昂，导致损失值本身成为监控、早停和模型选择的重要信号。作者发现似然损失不可靠，因此需要一种损失值能与C-index单调对齐的替代目标。

Method: 1. 理论证明：严格适当的生存似然损失存在损失下降而C-index不变的方向。2. 提出Sigmoid一致性损失（SCL）：用sigmoid函数近似排序损失，损失值近似于1减去C-index（带温度项），保证损失越低C-index越高。3. SCL架构无关，在线性模型下退化为凸的生存排序支持向量机。4. 在18个数据集（四种模态）上采用五折交叉验证统一评估。

Result: SCL的判别性能与标准似然损失相当，是最好或在一个标准差之内。SCL损失值与C-index的秩相关系数为0.96-0.99，而似然损失仅为-0.03到0.53。校准性能（集成Brier分数）相当。

Conclusion: SCL提供了值-单调的优化目标，其损失值可以作为C-index的可靠替代指标，特别适用于需要频繁监控训练过程的昂贵端到端训练场景。

Abstract: Deep survival models are evaluated almost exclusively by the concordance index (C-index), yet they are commonly trained using likelihood objectives such as the Cox partial likelihood, discrete-time negative log-likelihood, and DeepHit likelihood. This mismatch is usually considered acceptable because the C-index can be recomputed on validation data during training. However, for end-to-end training of high-capacity encoders on small, heavily censored oncology cohorts, frequent C-index evaluation is computationally expensive, making the loss value itself an important signal for monitoring, early stopping, and model selection. We show that likelihood losses are unreliable for this purpose and propose a value-monotone concordance loss. We prove that every strictly proper survival likelihood admits directions where the loss decreases while the C-index remains unchanged, causing the loss value to decouple from ranking performance. We then study a sigmoid concordance loss (SCL), whose value approximates one minus the C-index up to a temperature term, ensuring that lower loss corresponds to higher C-index during optimization. The loss is architecture agnostic and reduces to a convex survival ranking support vector machine for linear models. Across eighteen datasets from four modalities using a unified five-fold cross-validation protocol, SCL achieves discrimination comparable to standard likelihood losses and is the best or within one standard deviation of the best C-index. Unlike likelihood losses, SCL maintains a strong correlation between loss value and C-index during training, with rank correlations of 0.96 to 0.99 compared with -0.03 to 0.53 for likelihood losses. Calibration measured by the integrated Brier score is comparable. SCL provides a value-monotone optimization objective whose value can serve as a reliable surrogate for the C-index during expensive end-to-end training.

</details>


### [318] [Interpretable Anomaly and Drift Detection with Gaussian Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16811)
*Behnam Asadi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了高斯混合模型（GMM）作为一种轻量级、可解释的异常检测和分布漂移检测工具。通过三个实用选择（BIC自动选择组件数、极值理论设定阈值、用“未解释质量”检测漂移），在7个基准上验证了GMM点检测器与多种方法竞争力相当，且提供了可解释性。对于漂移检测，可解释的未解释质量统计量在异常形成新 regimes 时与MMD相当，但在纯重加权场景下诚实失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有异常检测方法（如Isolation Forest、autoencoder等）虽然准确但缺乏可解释性，而可解释方法往往性能不足。作者希望找到一个既轻量、可解释，又能在异常检测和分布漂移检测中保持竞争力的方案，从而让每次报警都能被理解和解释。

Method: 1) 使用BIC自动选择GMM组件数，k-means初始化；2) 基于负对数似然对单个观测评分，用极值理论设定阈值；3) 对于漂移检测，将每个高斯分量视为命名“regime”，用流窗口中无法匹配任何regime的比例（未解释质量）作为漂移信号。与MMD、Cauchy-Schwarz散度、KL散度等对比，并在7个基准上评估。

Result: GMM点检测器与Isolation Forest、LOF、one-class SVM、ECOD、COPOD和autoencoder竞争力相当（虽很少更准确）。对于漂移，MMD是最强的纯检测器，但未解释质量统计量在异常形成新regimes时与之匹配，在纯重加权场景下诚实失败。异常点距离最近regime的中位数为3-10个标准差，而正常点约为1个标准差。

Conclusion: GMM作为一种轻量级、可解释的工具，在异常检测和漂移检测中具有实用价值。虽然纯检测精度不一定最高，但它独特的可解释性——每次报警都能追溯到具体原因——是其他黑箱方法无法提供的。作者公开了所有代码和实验。

Abstract: We revisit Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) as a lightweight, interpretable tool for anomaly detection and, in particular, for detecting distributional drift in data streams. We make three practical choices explicit and evaluate them on seven public benchmarks. First, the number of mixture components is selected automatically by the Bayesian Information Criterion, initialised by k-means, removing the need to fix it in advance. Second, individual observations are scored by their negative log-likelihood under a GMM fitted to normal data, with thresholds set at a target false-alarm rate using Extreme Value Theory. Third, the same interpretable model extends to distributional drift: each Gaussian component is a named "regime," and the fraction of a stream window that matches no regime -- its unexplained mass -- is a drift signal that is itself the explanation. We benchmark this against a model-free kernel two-sample test (Maximum Mean Discrepancy, MMD) and against two GMM-to-GMM divergences (a closed-form Cauchy-Schwarz divergence and a matching-based KL surrogate). Across seven benchmarks ranging from 3 to 64 dimensions and five random splits, the GMM point detector is competitive with -- though rarely more accurate than -- Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor, one-class SVM, ECOD, COPOD and an autoencoder, while uniquely yielding an interpretable model. For drift, MMD is the strongest pure detector, but the interpretable unexplained-mass statistic matches it when anomalies form novel regimes (and honestly fails, as MMD does not, when drift is a pure re-weighting of existing regimes). Every alarm is explainable: anomalies lie a median of 3-10 sigma outside their nearest regime vs. about 1 sigma for normal points, and a drift alarm reports the fraction of the window matching no known regime. All code and experiments are released.

</details>


### [319] [Honest Physical-Support Inference after Latent Dictionary Learning: Collision Singularities and Minimax Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16813)
*Guan-Ju Peng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对潜在字典学习后，如何量化稀疏支持（active physical rays）的不确定性问题，提出了一种基于鲁棒训练矩区域保留所有兼容字典、通过轮廓投影获取置换不变支持空间的置信对应方法。该方法能报告跨片不确定性、群组解析与子歧义或精细支持解析，并在统计代价与决策收益之间建立了理论刻画。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统稀疏支持不确定性量化假设字典已知，但当字典从潜在稀疏混合中学习而来时，该假设会高估置信度并产生依赖标签的结论。尤其当相干原子接近碰撞时，测试信号虽能识别活跃物理群组，但训练数据无法区分群组内的物理射线。因此需要对学习字典后的活跃物理射线进行有效的统计推断。

Method: 在固定维数的高斯训练-测试实验中，保留与鲁棒训练矩区域兼容的所有字典，对测试表示进行轮廓投影，然后将幸存配置投影到置换不变的支持空间上，从而得到置信对应（confidence correspondence）。

Result: 残差块方向首先以三次阶影响潜在训练密度，产生阶为$s^6$的信息量（$s$为块内碰撞尺度）。置信对应提供高概率条件下的条件测试覆盖，其分辨率由父可检测性、测试时支持分离度和学习字典方向分别控制。在解析的固定壳区域中，其投影Hausdorff直径以极小化最优速率$s \wedge (\sqrt{N}s^2)^{-1}$收缩。受限任务定理确定了系数非对称性何时允许测试复制补充训练信息，何时校准不确定性不可约。

Conclusion: 该框架能够给出诚实、分辨率自适应的支持陈述，并指导训练与测试测量之间的资源分配。

Abstract: Sparse-support uncertainty is usually quantified by treating the dictionary as known, an assumption that can produce overconfident, label-dependent conclusions when the dictionary is learned from latent sparse mixtures. Near collisions of coherent atoms, a test signal may identify the active physical group even though the training data cannot distinguish the physical rays within it.
  We develop inference for active physical rays, unit atoms modulo sign, after latent dictionary learning. In a fixed-dimensional Gaussian train-test experiment, we retain all dictionaries compatible with a robust training-moment region, profile the test representation over them, and project surviving configurations onto a permutation-invariant support space. The resulting confidence correspondence can report cross-sheet inconclusiveness, group resolution with child ambiguity, or fine-support resolution.
  We characterize both its statistical cost and decision-theoretic benefit. Residual block orientation first affects the latent training density at cubic order, yielding information of order $s^6$, where $s$ is the within-block collision scale. The correspondence provides high-probability-over-training conditional test coverage, with resolution governed separately by parent detectability, test-time support separation, and learned-dictionary orientation. In the resolved fixed-shell regime, its projective Hausdorff diameter contracts at the minimax-optimal rate $s \wedge (\sqrt{N}s^2)^{-1}$, up to constants. A restricted-task theorem further determines when coefficient asymmetry allows test replication to supplement training information and when calibration uncertainty remains irreducible. The framework thus yields honest, resolution-adaptive support statements and guides the allocation of training versus test measurements.

</details>


### [320] [First-Order Predictable but Pairwise Fragile: Local Task Adaptation in Trained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16821)
*Irina Piontkovskaia,Sergey Nikolenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文测量了9个Transformer模型(82M-7B)在多任务LoRA操作点附近的8种局部近似性质，发现存在共享的单方向有效性窗口(尺度10⁻²)，但成对组合和更新顺序不具有通用半径；成对结构更脆弱，超过三分之一的(模型,任务对)组合存在顺序敏感性，Lie括号H_B g_A - H_A g_B是顺序依赖项的主导项。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管任务算术、顺序微调、激活引导和随机搜索等方法在实践中广泛应用并取得成效，但它们都依赖于一个共同的前提——在已训练检查点附近进行小扰动时，各种局部近似假设(如一阶可预测性、任务更新的低干扰组合、切线空间的稳定性等)应当成立。然而这些假设的有效范围、普适性以及失效条件尚未被系统性地量化验证。

Method: 作者设计了一套统一的评估框架，在9个Transformer模型(82M到7B参数规模)上，围绕多任务LoRA操作点测量了8种局部近似性质。研究采用前瞻性注册(prospective registration)的方式预定义了属性列表、阈值和测试集划分。通过测量扰动对损失的预测性、任务更新的组合性、切线结构稳定性、权重编辑与表示空间的对应关系等指标进行系统评估。

Result: (1) 存在共享的单方向有效性窗口，尺度高达10⁻²，但不存在通用的成对组合或更新顺序半径；(2) 沿单个方向，探针损失变化保持一阶可预测——扰动对损失的影响本质上等同于它在梯度上的投影；(3) 成对结构远更脆弱：超过三分之一的(模型,任务对)组合中，双更新顺序敏感性在窗口内部即出现；(4) 任务梯度子空间在数十步内发生旋转；(5) 全任务向量尺度下的加性假设在若干模型(包括两个7B模型)上失效；(6) 无模型通过全局均值向量权重-引导对应性测试；(7) 顺序依赖项的主导项为Lie括号H_B g_A - H_A g_B，其归一化预测c(η)=ηκ+O(η²)的比值中位数为1.002，起始尺度η†≈0.10/κ跨模型和任务对跨越三个数量级。

Conclusion: 单方向扰动的一阶近似在较宽范围内有效，但成对相互作用(任务组合、顺序敏感性)远比理论上假设的更脆弱，这对多任务学习、持续学习和模型编辑等依赖任务组合性的应用提出重要警示。Lie括号作为顺序依赖的定量预测因子为理解模型微调中的非线性交互提供了理论工具。

Abstract: Task arithmetic, sequential fine-tuning, activation steering, and first-order random search all operate through relatively small perturbations around an already trained checkpoint, and they rely on different local approximations: individual perturbations should be first-order predictable, task updates should compose with controlled interference, useful tangent structure should be stable and possible to estimate, and weight edits should have counterparts in representation space. We measure 8 such properties with the same harness around a multitask LoRA operating point, on 9 transformers (82M-7B), with a prospectively registered property list, thresholds, and test split. We find a shared one-direction validity window up to the tested scale $10^{-2}$, but no universal radius for pairwise composition or update ordering. Along individual directions, changes of the probe loss remain first-order predictable throughout the grid: a perturbation's effect on the loss is essentially its projection onto the gradient, which is also what makes local random search work. Pairwise structure, however, proves to be far more fragile: on over a third of the measured (model, task pair) combinations, two-update order sensitivity sets in strictly inside that window; task-gradient subspaces rotate within tens of steps; additivity under our fixed activation probe fails at full task-vector scale on several models, including both held-out 7B models; and no model median passes the registered global mean-vector weight-to-steering correspondence bar. For two sequential task-gradient steps, the leading order-dependent term is the Lie bracket $H_B\textbf{g}_A-H_A\textbf{g}_B$; its normalized prediction $c(η)=ηκ+O(η^2)$ tracks the measured defect at median ratio 1.002, while the onset scale $η^\dagger\approx0.10/κ$ spans three orders of magnitude across models and task pairs.

</details>


### [321] [Beyond Memory Leaderboards: Evaluating Scientific Memory as Budgeted Context Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16848)
*Maksim Sheverev,David Finkelstein,Sergey Nikolenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了两个科学文献全文记忆基准（PAIM和PTr），评估了八种记忆/检索系统（包括提出的Theoria），发现记忆排行榜在没有完整协议的情况下不可解释，并主张科学记忆应作为有预算的、模态感知的上下文恢复来评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的记忆基准大多评估对话或紧凑摘要，而研究型智能体需要从完整科学论文中恢复证据，缺乏针对全文科学记忆的标准化评估方法。

Method: 构建两个科学全文记忆基准PAIM（81篇论文，66个问题）和PTr（252篇论文，98个问题）；评估八种记忆/检索系统（含提出的Theoria）及无检索基线；采用多裁判和人工校准验证LLM评判的一致性。

Result: 1) 内存排行榜在没有完整协议时不可解释，如Graphiti在PAIM上获胜但使用260万字符检索上下文，控制预算后优势消失；2) 稀疏-稠密混合检索是最有效的干预措施；3) LLM评判与人工评估一致，在10分量表上有约1分的有效分辨率。

Conclusion: 科学记忆应作为有预算的、模态感知的上下文恢复来评估，而非无约束的架构排行榜。代码和数据集已开源。

Abstract: Long-term memory is becoming a core component of LLM agents, but most memory benchmarks evaluate conversations or compact summaries, while research agents need to restore evidence from full scientific papers. We introduce two full-text scientific-memory benchmarks, Public AI Memory (PAIM; 81 papers, 66 questions) and Public Transformers (PTr; 252 papers, 98 questions). We evaluate eight memory/retrieval systems, including our own proposed Theoria, plus a no-retrieval baseline. Our results show that memory leaderboards are not interpretable without the full protocol: ingestion granularity, raw-text preservation, retrieval budget, retrieval modality, rubric audit, and judge choice all affect the outcome. For example, on PAIM Graphiti wins convincingly but uses 2.6M characters of retrieved context per query, and after controlling for retrieval budget the lead disappears. On PTr, for the systems where BM25 retrieval can be added cleanly, the sparse-dense hybrid is the single most significant intervention: hybrid variants of Simple RAG, Mem0, and Theoria tie for the lead within 0.03 points. Multi-judge and human side-by-side calibration show that LLM-as-a-judge rankings are consistent across frontier judges and agree with human evaluation, with an effective resolution of roughly one point on a ten-point scale. We argue that scientific memory should be evaluated as budgeted, modality-aware context restoration rather than as an unconstrained architecture leaderboard, and we release the datasets, harness, raw outputs, judgments, and scripts to reproduce our results and serve as tools for such evaluation. Our code is available at http://gitlab.com/quantellence/research/scientific-recall-bench , and the datasets are available at http://huggingface.co/datasets/quantellence/srb-data .

</details>


### [322] [Principled Direction-Free Intrinsic Motivation through Model-Free Epistemic Free-Energy Estimators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16858)
*Alireza Furutanpey,Schahram Dustdar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于期望自由能（Expected Free Energy）的无偏好内在奖励，通过参数信息增益（参数信息增益）作为探索信号，在混合不确定性环境中实现无监督强化学习，无需预承诺特定方向的惊奇，且能避免噪声干扰和非平稳性问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无监督强化学习的内在动机方法存在局限：惊奇最小化仅限于"不稳定"环境，预测误差好奇奖励包含不可约噪声，而惊奇最小化与最大化的混合切换会引入非平稳性。需要一个单一、平稳的内在奖励信号。

Method: 提出基于期望自由能目标的内在奖励，以奖励最大化形式表达。核心是参数信息增益（下一状态的期望惊奇减去不可约部分），在低熵和高熵区域均适用。用伪计数提供认知价值，基于探针的惩罚捕获偶然方差，短视门保护信息性后继状态。窗口冻结奖励定义对象，确保贝尔曼算子平稳性。

Result: 在非参数估计器下，给出了关于混合性、平滑性、带宽和容量假设的条件一致集中性结果。在主动推理视角下，该方法是无偏好的，在完全可观测下标准似然模糊性消失，增加了非标准转移熵惩罚，在已解析状态空间中自然表现为惊奇最小化。

Conclusion: 参数信息增益是混合不确定性环境下合适的统一内在信号：在未解析动力学区域驱动探索，在已解析区域自动消失，同时偏好低方差转移，无需显式拟合下一状态预测器。

Abstract: Across environments with mixed sources of uncertainty, unsupervised reinforcement learning requires intrinsic motivation that does not precommit to a particular direction of surprise. Surprise minimization is scoped by design to ``unstable'' environments. Prediction-error curiosity rewards total expected surprise, including irreducible noise. Bandit or mixture switching between surprise-minimizing and surprise-maximizing rewards reintroduces non-stationarity by construction. We propose a single intrinsic reward, stationary within each window, derived from the novelty contribution of a preference-free Expected Free Energy objective, expressed in reward-maximization form. Our claim is that parameter information gain, the expected surprise of the next state minus its irreducible part, is the appropriate intrinsic signal in both high-entropy and low-entropy components of the state space. Maximizing it seeks exactly the surprise the model can explain away. In regions of unresolved dynamics, this epistemic term drives exploration. As dynamics become resolved, the epistemic term vanishes, while an aleatoric penalty favors lower-variance transitions, all without fitting an explicit next-state predictor. A pseudocount supplies epistemic value, a probe-based penalty captures aleatoric variance, and a short-horizon gate protects informative successors. A window-based freeze of all reward-defining objects yields a stationary Bellman operator, explicit bounds on learning targets, and a conditional uniform-concentration result for the nonparametric estimators under mixing, smoothness, bandwidth, and capacity assumptions. In active-inference terms, the agent is preference-free where novelty is retained, standard likelihood ambiguity vanishes under full observability, a nonstandard transition-entropy penalty is added, and surprise minimization emerges in resolved regions of the state space.

</details>


### [323] [Persistent Sparse Autoencoders: Learning Feature Timescales in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17117)
*Haoyan Luo,Mateo Espinosa Zarlenga,Mateja Jamnik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Persistent SAEs，在标准稀疏自编码器基础上引入持久性系数，让模型学习特征应持续存在多久，从而捕获跨序列的持久语义信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SAE独立编码每个token，无法捕捉跨序列的持久信息，限制了语言模型在长上下文中的可解释性和监控能力。

Method: 为每个特征学习一个持久性系数，控制特征在时间维度上的衰减速度，使模型能自适应地决定哪些特征应短暂存在（快速特征）或长期保持（慢速特征）。

Result: 在保持竞争性重建质量的同时，学到从局部可解释检测器（快速特征）到主题级语义信息（慢速特征）的多样化时间尺度；在提示注入监控案例中，慢速特征能在长上下文中保持检测信号和因果效力。

Conclusion: Persistent SAEs通过持久语义表示，为语言模型的解释和监控提供了新的途径。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) decompose language model activations into sparse features, but standard SAEs encode each token independently and do not expose information that persists across a sequence. We introduce Persistent Sparse Autoencoders (Persistent SAEs), which extend standard SAEs by learning a persistence coefficient for each feature, allowing the model to learn which features should persist and for how long. Our experiments show that they retain competitive reconstruction quality while learning a spectrum of feature timescales: fast features behave as locally interpretable detectors, whereas slow features concentrate topic-level information in a persistent state. Moreover, as shown in a prompt-injection monitoring case study, slow features preserve detection signals and remain causally effective over long contexts. These results suggest that Persistent SAEs open up new opportunities for interpreting and monitoring language models through persistent semantic representations.

</details>
