### [324] [Bridging battery design and health assessment through virtual sensing and physics-informed learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16864)
*Wendi Guo,Søren Byg Vilsen,Daniel Ioan Stroe,Yaqi Li,Yicun Huang,Ashima Verma,Daniel Brandell*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种物理信息学习框架，通过虚拟传感从标准BMS测量中推断难以测量的电池设计参数，利用数字孪生衍生的颗粒开裂机制作为软约束，仅用2%早期数据即可将寿命预测误差降低6-8倍，并实现容量损失误差降低39%、EOL误差降低17%、预测变异性降低54%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前电池管理缺乏与材料老化根源的关联，导致可解释性差且难以指导电池设计优化；传统方法无法从标准BMS数据中获取关键设计参数（如扩散系数、电极厚度等）。

Method: 提出物理信息学习框架，集成虚拟传感技术，将数字孪生衍生的颗粒开裂机制作为软约束嵌入模型，仅需2%早期观测数据即可进行退化预测；不需要完全解析控制方程，验证的部分机制结合有限数据即可提供足够指导。

Result: 相比SOTA机器学习基线，轨迹和寿命预测误差降低6-8倍；容量损失误差降低39%，EOL误差降低17%，预测变异性降低54%；虚拟传感无需额外传感器即可将充电信号转化为潜在设计变量。

Conclusion: 该框架建立了部署与开发之间的实用反馈循环，展示了实际运行如何持续为上游设计决策提供信息，适用于复杂多物理系统。

Abstract: Supercharging of lithium-ion batteries (LiBs) requires robust health monitoring to ensure durability, safety, and user confidence, particularly for emerging vehicle-to-grid applications with bidirectional energy flows. Yet battery management remains largely disconnected from the material and structural origins of aging, limiting both interpretable health assessment and informed battery design. Here we propose a physics-informed learning framework with virtual sensing that infers hard-to-measure design parameters, including solid-state diffusion coefficient, electrode thickness, ion concentration, and particle size, directly from standard battery management system (BMS) measurements. Across diverse fast-charging strategies and driving profiles, embedding a digital-twin-derived particle-cracking mechanism as a soft constraint reduces trajectory and lifetime prediction errors by 6-8 times relative to state-of-the-art machine learning baselines using only 2% early-life observations. We further show that accurate degradation extrapolation does not require fully resolved governing equations; validated partial mechanisms, jointly refined with limited data, provide sufficient guidance. Virtual sensing transforms standard charging signals into latent design variables without additional sensors, bridging observable battery behavior and underlying aging processes while reducing capacity loss error by up to 39%, end-of-life (EOL) error by 17%, and prediction variability by up to 54%, enabling real-time exploration of new battery configurations. More broadly, the proposed framework establishes a practical feedback loop between deployment and development, demonstrating how real-world operation can continuously inform upstream design decisions across complex multiphysics systems.

</details>


### [325] [HyBDM: Multi-Scale Hybrid Experts for Time Series Forecasting with Bidirectional Dependency Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16882)
*Wenqiang Ma,Chen Cheng,Xue Cheng,Jiarui Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HyBDM是一个多尺度混合时间序列预测模型，通过全局模式专家（BiConv-Mamba模块）和局部变化专家（Local Window Transformer）分别建模全局与局部依赖，并利用多尺度分块器和长短路由实现自适应融合，在六个基准数据集上超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TSF模型难以同时捕获多元时间序列中的异构长程全局模式和短程局部变化，且多数方法未能联合利用时间和特征维度的信息。

Method: 提出HyBDM模型，包含：(1) 全局模式专家：BiConv-Mamba模块（双向卷积+M-SSM层+遗忘机制+GDD-MLP跨通道建模）；(2) 局部变化专家：Local Window Transformer（LWT）实现局部注意力；(3) 多尺度分块器与长短路由实现多分辨率表示和自适应融合。

Result: 在六个基准数据集上，HyBDM在预测准确度和计算效率上均优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: HyBDM有效弥合了全局-局部依赖的建模鸿沟，证明了混合架构在多元时间序列预测中的潜力。

Abstract: Time series forecasting (TSF) is vital to many applications, yet existing models often struggle to capture the heterogeneous long-range global patterns and short-range local variations in multivariate time series. While some approaches partially model these dependencies, they often do not jointly exploit temporal and feature-wise information. To address this challenge, we propose HyBDM, a multi-scale hybrid model that decomposes temporal dynamics into global patterns and local variations, which are modeled by two specialized experts. The Global Patterns Expert employs an enhanced BiConv-Mamba module that integrates bidirectional convolutions, an M-SSM layer, a forgetting mechanism, and a GDD-MLP module for cross-channel modeling. The Local Variations Expert uses a Local Window Transformer (LWT) to perform efficient locality-aware attention with reduced computational complexity. In addition, a Multi-Scale Patcher and a Long-Short Router enable multi-resolution representations and adaptive fusion of the two experts. Experiments on six benchmark datasets show that HyBDM outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both forecasting accuracy and computational efficiency, demonstrating its effectiveness in bridging global-local dependencies for multivariate TSF.

</details>


### [326] [Certified-Gap Dual-Price Policies for Real-Time Truckload Bid Acceptance with Relocating, Clock-Constrained Resources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16891)
*Aswin Chandrasekaran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对卡车运输公司在秒级内需决定是否接单的问题，构建了带有时钟和位置约束的弱耦合动态规划模型，提出了一种基于拉格朗日松弛对偶的实时定价策略。该策略无需训练标签，仅需一次离线对偶求解，即可在0.04–0.09毫秒内做出决策，并在公开基准上击败了基于rollout训练的代理模型，同时提供稳定的最优性证书（57–64%）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卡车运输中，承运人需在数秒内根据车辆状态（位置、HOS时钟、预约窗口）决定是否接单，现有基于占用率的可复用资源模型无法处理此类带有时钟和位置约束的动态决策问题。

Method: 将问题建模为弱耦合动态规划，利用拉格朗日松弛得到上界，并基于同一松弛构造实时对偶定价策略。证明了策略的梯度规则恰好是流体松弛的互补松弛条件，并在亚临界流体 regime 下渐近最优。还通过三车核与复制引理展示了证书的局限性。

Result: 在30个配对种子的公开闭环基准上，该策略在tight场景下比rollout训练代理高2.0个百分点（95% CI [0.5, 3.6]），mild场景下高3.5个百分点（CI [2.4, 4.5]），第三个场景持平。决策速度0.04–0.09 ms（快三个数量级），证书稳定在57–64%最优性区间。

Conclusion: 所提对偶定价策略在效率、可扩展性和理论保证上均优于需要大量计算的rollout方法，且证书虽有其固有局限性（拉格朗日松弛可能始终有界），但整体上提供了一个实用且可认证的实时决策框架。

Abstract: A truckload carrier must accept or reject each load tender within seconds. The decision depends on fleet state, hours-of-service (HOS) clocks, and appointment windows. We model this as a weakly coupled dynamic program in which the resources relocate and carry clocks: serving a request moves the truck to a new market and depletes its clocks, and whether a truck can serve a request depends on its state. Occupancy-based reusable-resource models do not cover this setting. We build a real-time dual-price policy from the same Lagrangian relaxation that gives the problem's upper bound. Policy and bound come from one object, so every run reports a certified optimality gap. We prove three things. First, the certificate is valid for any duals, any discretization, and any surrogate quality. Second, the policy's same-time spatial-gradient rule is exactly fluid complementary slackness, and the policy is asymptotically optimal in the subcritical fluid regime; the fitted prices are also portable across sample paths, by linear-programming basis stability. Third, certificates have limits: per-resource Lagrangian slack can stay bounded away from zero at every fleet size. We exhibit a three-truck kernel with an exact rational certificate and a replication lemma. On a public closed-loop benchmark with thirty paired seeds, the policy -- which needs no rollout labels, only one offline dual solve -- beats a rollout-trained surrogate on two of three scenarios (tight: +2.0 pp, 95% CI [+0.5, +3.6], Wilcoxon p = 0.023; mild: +3.5 pp, CI [+2.4, +4.5]) and ties the third. It decides in 0.04-0.09 ms, three orders of magnitude faster than the Monte Carlo rollout teacher. Its certificates are stable across ten bounded instances per scenario, at 57-64% of optimal, within 3-6 points of what the 1000x-slower teacher certifies.

</details>


### [327] [TVGL-CFM:Generating and Forecasting Time-Varying Trajectories of Dynamic Networks with Conditional Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16894)
*Om Roy,Yashar Moshfeghi,Keith Malcolm Smith*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出TVGL-CFM模型，利用条件流匹配和Log-Euclidean变换，直接在精度矩阵空间上学习时变网络轨迹的分布，实现生成和预测，在多个数据集上优于原始信号基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多复杂系统（如脑网络、金融市场）的图结构随时间变化，现有TVGL虽能提取时变精度矩阵，但缺乏一个统一的生成模型来学习这类轨迹的分布并用于生成和预测。

Method: 1) 使用Log-Euclidean映射将正定矩阵轨迹展平到欧氏空间；2) 在该空间中训练条件流匹配模型；3) 预测时从粗略外推起点开始流匹配，仅需学习小修正。

Result: 在EEG运动想象、混沌系统和基因表达数据上，生成的轨迹保留了类判别结构，预测未来连接比原始信号基线更准确。

Conclusion: 直接生成结构化的精度矩阵轨迹比先生成原始信号再估计连接更忠实于数据。

Abstract: Many complex systems such as brain networks, financial markets, and gene-regulatory circuits are described not by a fixed graph but by one that changes over time. A standard way to summarise such structure at each instant is the sparse precision (inverse-covariance) matrix, and the time-varying graphical lasso (TVGL) turns a multivariate signal into a smooth chain of these matrices. We introduce TVGL-CFM, a single model that learns the distribution of such chains and can both generate new, realistic time-varying network trajectories for a given class and forecast how an observed trajectory will continue. Each precision matrix lives on a curved space of positive-definite matrices, but a log-Euclidean chart flattens an entire trajectory into an ordinary vector space, so a simple conditional flow-matching model can be trained and sampled there while every decoded matrix is guaranteed to be a valid precision matrix. For forecasting we start the flow not from noise but from a rough extrapolation of the recent history, so the model only has to learn a small correction. Across EEG motor-imagery, chaotic systems, and gene-expression data, TVGL-CFM generates trajectories that keep the class-discriminative structure of real data, and it forecasts future connectivity more accurately than raw-signal baselines. Generating the structured precision trajectory directly is therefore more faithful than generating raw signals and estimating connectivity afterwards.

</details>


### [328] [WAR: Workload-Aware Rollouts for Synchronous Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17299)
*Ryan Xu,Atlas Zhao,David Bao,Frank Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WAR是一个面向同步智能体强化学习的工作负载感知 rollout 系统，通过联合优化解码与调度来加速长程 rollout 生成。在低负载时使用无模型推测解码（SuffixDecoding）复用已完成轨迹的后缀模式；在高负载时切换到缓存感知的全局调度，减少 KV-cache 重计算和负载不均衡。WAR 在低负载下提升 1.4x、高负载下提升 1.6x 的 rollout 吞吐量，无需改变底层 RL 算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在智能体强化学习中，长程 rollout 生成已成为主要系统瓶颈。随着智能体与环境的多轮交互，轨迹迅速增长至数万 token，同步 RL 训练的 rollout 阶段日益受限。现有方法缺乏对运行时负载的自适应优化。

Method: WAR 提出两种自适应策略：（1）低负载时采用 SuffixDecoding——一种无模型推测解码方法，复用已完成轨迹的后缀模式作为推测草稿，无需额外草稿模型，避免 GPU 竞争；（2）高负载时切换到缓存感知的全局调度器，基于缓存局部性、轨迹进度和服务器负载将请求分配到不同 rollout 副本，减少冗余 KV-cache 重计算并缓解负载不均衡。

Result: 在低负载下提升长上下文智能体 rollout 吞吐量 1.4x，在高负载下提升 1.6x。实验表明 WAR 有效消除了同步智能体 RL 中的 rollout 瓶颈。

Conclusion: WAR 通过工作负载感知的自适应策略，在不改变底层 RL 算法的情况下显著加速 rollout 生成，为可扩展的长上下文智能体训练提供了实用路径。

Abstract: Long-horizon rollout generation has become the dominant systems bottleneck in agentic reinforcement learning (RL). As agents interact with environments over many turns, trajectories rapidly grow to tens of thousands of tokens, making synchronous RL training increasingly constrained by rollout. We propose WAR, a workload-aware rollout system that substantially accelerates synchronous agentic RL by jointly optimizing decoding and scheduling. WAR is built on a key observation: the optimal rollout optimization strategy depends on runtime load: (1) Under low load, WAR enables model-free speculative decoding with SuffixDecoding, which reuses suffix patterns from previously completed trajectories as speculative drafts for future rollouts. Unlike model-based drafters, SuffixDecoding introduces no additional draft model and avoids GPU contention with rollout generation. (2) Under high load, where saturated batched decoding leaves limited room for speculative speedup, WAR shifts the optimization focus to cache-aware scheduling. A global scheduler places requests across rollout replicas based on cache locality, trajectory progress and server load, reducing redundant KV-cache recomputation and mitigating load imbalance. By combining decoding-level suffix reuse with system-level rollout scheduling, WAR delivers robust throughput improvements across workload regimes without changing the underlying RL algorithm. WAR improves long-context agentic rollout throughput by 1.4x under low load and up to 1.6x under high load. These results show that WAR removes a major rollout bottleneck in synchronous agentic RL and provides a practical path toward scalable long-context agent training.

</details>


### [329] [When Can Safe Controllers Adapt? Information before Commitment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16895)
*Venkatesh Saligrama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究安全自适应控制中，安全约束是否允许控制器收集足够信息以区分不同模型。提出"承诺"概念，证明如果预承诺信息（决策前可获得的KL散度）有界，则均匀安全策略必然存在线性遗憾（Ω(T)），即在约束线性二次调节系统中无法避免固定比例的Oracle差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全自适应控制的分析通常假设闭环系统持续激励，使得数据能区分需要不同控制决策的模型对。在此假设下可行性已解决，只剩收敛速率问题。本文质疑：安全约束本身是否允许这种信息丰富的实验？即在保证安全的前提下，控制器能否收集到足够的信息来做出正确的决策。

Method: 定义了"承诺"（commitment）：消除另一种可行模型安全延续的第一个行动。提出了"预承诺信息"（precommitment information）：承诺前学习者可见的KL散度。建立了一个因果归约（causal reduction）：承诺规则决定了(1)安全承诺在替代模型下的概率，(2)不承诺的目标侧代价，(3)决策时可用的信息。通过信息论论证，有界预承诺信息会导致线性遗憾下界。

Result: 在约束线性二次调节系统（constrained linear system with quadratic regulation cost）中，建立了均匀安全策略的线性遗憾下界Ω(T)。同时也证明了某些特殊情况下可恢复，并为确定性线性-高斯系统推导了半定上界证书。

Conclusion: 安全约束本身可能成为信息收集的阻碍，导致均匀安全策略无法避免线性遗憾。这表明安全与学习之间存在根本性的权衡：为了保持安全，必须牺牲探索效率。

Abstract: Safe adaptive control is online adaptation under a safety guarantee on the learning trajectory itself. The controller may use any causal, history-dependent rule and act differently across environments as data arrive. Only its safety guarantee is uniform: the same rule must satisfy it under every initially plausible model. Performance is measured against a safe oracle that knows the realized model. Many finite-time analyses assume persistent excitation of the uniformly safe closed loop, so the data distinguish every pair of models requiring different control decisions. Under that assumption, feasibility is already settled; only the rate remains. We ask instead: Do the safety constraints permit such an informative experiment at all?
  While an alternative remains plausible, the controller must preserve a safe continuation under it. We call the first action that forecloses such a continuation commitment. Chance safety allows commitment only on an event rare under the alternative, and the evidence must arrive beforehand: the observation generated by the committing action is too late. We define precommitment information as the KL divergence between learner-visible laws stopped before commitment.
  Our main result is a causal reduction. The commitment rule determines (1) the probability that safety permits commitment under the alternative, (2) the target-side cost of remaining noncommittal, (3) and the information available when the decision is made. Bounded precommitment information therefore leaves a fixed fraction of the oracle gap unavoidable. If the gap is Ω(T), every uniformly safe policy has linear regret. We establish the obstruction in a constrained linear system with quadratic regulation cost. We also prove recovery in special cases and derive semidefinite upper certificates for deterministic linear-Gaussian systems.

</details>


### [330] [Enhancing Personalized Bladder Cancer Treatment Through Reinforcement Learning: A Recurrent Patient State Transition Decision Support Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16916)
*Divyansh Chawla,Anshu Garg,Isshaan Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于循环患者状态转移模拟与强化学习的膀胱癌治疗规划框架，通过整合预测状态转移模型、马尔可夫决策过程(MDP)和深度Q网络(DQN)，实现动态、个性化的治疗决策优化，累计奖励达63,918.87，策略改进得分为6.62%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统膀胱癌治疗决策支持系统依赖静态指南或单步预测模型，无法有效捕捉疾病随时间的进展变化，尤其对于复发性疾病中治疗效果随临床事件变化的情况缺乏适应性决策能力。

Method: 提出循环患者状态转移模拟框架，集成预测状态转移模型（估计治疗后肿瘤特征变化）、马尔可夫决策过程(MDP)和深度Q网络(DQN)强化学习环境，通过与模拟患者轨迹交互来顺序优化治疗决策，并生成可解释的治疗轨迹和详细模拟日志。

Result: 累计奖励63,918.87，平均每轮训练损失0.0056，策略改进得分6.62%，在模拟复发治疗环境中展现了有效的顺序学习能力和稳健的治疗优化效果。

Conclusion: 循环患者状态转移模拟结合强化学习可作为灵活的决策支持框架，为个性化膀胱癌治疗规划和AI辅助精准肿瘤学提供有力支撑。

Abstract: Bladder cancer treatment requires personalized and adaptive decision-making, particularly for recurrent disease, where treatment effectiveness changes across successive clinical episodes. Conventional clinical decision support systems typically rely on static treatment guidelines or single-step predictive models, limiting their ability to capture disease progression over time. This paper presents a recurrent patient state-transition simulation framework for bladder cancer treatment planning that integrates predictive state-transition modeling with a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and a Deep Q-Network (DQN) reinforcement learning environment. The predictive module estimates changes in tumor characteristics following treatment, while the reinforcement learning agent sequentially optimizes treatment decisions by interacting with simulated patient trajectories. This framework enables dynamic, patient-specific treatment planning by continuously adapting recommendations to evolving clinical states. It also generates interpretable treatment trajectories and detailed simulation logs to improve transparency and support clinical decision-making. The proposed framework was evaluated against existing reinforcement learning-based treatment planning approaches. It achieved a cumulative reward of 63,918.87, an average training loss per episode of 0.0056, and a policy improvement score of 6.62%, demonstrating effective sequential learning and robust treatment optimization in a simulated recurrent treatment environment. These findings highlight the potential of recurrent patient state-transition simulation with reinforcement learning as a flexible decision-support framework for personalized bladder cancer treatment planning and AI-assisted precision oncology.

</details>


### [331] [Abliteration Is Not a Scalpel: Off-Target Effects of Refusal Removal on Decision Disposition Across Model Families](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17427)
*Aleksander Fafuła*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 通过对比两个MoE系列的基础版与abliterated版模型在21,600次股市决策中的表现，发现abliterated模型不仅系统性更乐观、输出更长、使用更少不确定性词汇，而且置信度变化方向因模型家族而异——说明"去审查"手术并非干净移除拒绝机制，而是改变了模型的决策行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前流行的"去审查"（abliteration）技术被广泛用于生成所谓的"uncensored"开源模型，但该方法是否真正只移除了拒绝机制、不改变模型的其他行为特征，一直缺乏严谨的因果检验。作者希望在一个不会触发拒绝行为的任务中，检测abliteration是否带来了纯粹的副作用。

Method: 使用21,600次不确定性决策（对华沙证券交易所60只股票的18周周度涨跌预测）作为探针任务，通过冷冻pipeline确保决策层模型是唯一变量。严格控制来源（官方BF16检查点、同一abliteration作者、相同服务栈、字节一致的冻结提示），对比两个MoE家族（Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it和Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507）的基础版与abliterated版。

Result: 三个效应在两大家族中稳健复制：abliterated模型更乐观（+12.2pp Gemma, +7.4pp Qwen，预注册端点）、输出更长、使用更少不确定性词汇；一个效应符号反转：Gemma-abliterated更不自信而Qwen-abliterated更自信。两个模型家族均无真正的经济技能（超额收益为beta而非alpha）。此外发现两种污染渠道（不匹配的量化器、过时的社区聊天模板）。

Conclusion: Abliteration并非"干净"的手术，它会系统性改变模型的决策行为（乐观性、长度、不确定性表达、置信度），且效果因模型家族而异。部署"uncensored"模型作为智能体时，实际部署的是一个可测量的不同决策者，而非"基础模型减去拒绝机制"。

Abstract: Abliteration - deleting a model's refusal direction from its weights - is the standard recipe behind popular "uncensored" open-weight models. We show the surgery is not clean. As a disposition probe we use 21,600 decisions under uncertainty - weekly up/down calls on 60 Warsaw Stock Exchange equities over 18 weeks, replayed through a frozen pipeline so the decision-layer model is the only variable. The task elicits no refusals at all, so any between-arm delta is pure side effect. Holding provenance constant (official BF16 checkpoints, a single abliteration author, an identical serving stack, one byte-identical frozen prompt), we compare base and abliterated arms of two Mixture-of-Experts families, Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it and Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507. Three effects replicate across both families (weeks-clustered bootstrap CIs excluding zero): abliterated models are systematically more optimistic (+12.2 pp Gemma, +7.4 pp Qwen; the confirmed preregistered endpoint), justify themselves at greater length, and use fewer explicit uncertainty words in forced self-critiques (both exploratory). A fourth effect reverses sign: the same operation makes Gemma-abliterated less confident and Qwen-abliterated more (family CIs non-overlapping) - one weight surgery, opposite shifts in expressed confidence. Capability covariates rule out instruction-following degradation as the driver, and no arm shows economic skill: the apparent edge of abliterated arms is regime beta, not alpha. Our provenance audit also caught two independent contamination channels - a mismatched-quantizer pilot pair and a stale community chat template that silently mangled the rendered prompt - suggesting toolchain artifacts are the rule in studies of community-modified checkpoints. Whoever deploys an "uncensored" model as an agent is deploying a measurably different decision-maker, not the base model minus refusals.

</details>


### [332] [Investigation of Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) Diagnosis Using Machine Learning Approaches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16941)
*Al Zadid Sultan Bin Habib,Md Asif Bin Syed,Md. Ekramul Islam,Tanpia Tasnim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出结合特征工程与机器学习（AdaBoost+RF特征重要性+最高相关性）的方法，用于早期诊断多囊卵巢综合征（PCOS），在10个特征上达到最高测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PCOS是育龄女性常见激素疾病，传统检测方法依赖临床评估和体检，耗时耗钱。需要更高效、低成本的早期诊断手段。

Method: 采用数据驱动方法，结合特征工程与机器学习。使用CatBoost、XGBoost、LGBM、AdaBoost、RF五种特征选择算法筛选特征，训练ML模型。

Result: AdaBoost结合RF特征重要性与最高相关性（HC）选出的10个特征，取得最高的测试准确率。

Conclusion: 基于特征选择和AdaBoost的ML方法可有效诊断PCOS，有望替代部分传统体检流程，降低成本和时间。

Abstract: Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS) is a widespread hormone problem for women of childbearing age. Women with PCOS may not ovulate; they might have high levels of androgens and have many small cysts on the ovaries. It can cause missed or irregular menstrual periods, excess hair growth, acne, infertility, and weight gain. Machine Learning (ML) can effectively diagnose this disease at an earlier stage as tons of medical data are available now. Traditional approaches to detect PCOS encompass a combination of clinical evaluation, medical history assessment, physical examination, and laboratory tests. These approaches aim to identify the characteristic symptoms and hormonal imbalances associated with PCOS. Physical examination requires good resources and costs time and money. In recent times, data-driven techniques have substantially advanced disease prediction within the medical field. We aim to utilize ML approaches, incorporating unique feature selection algorithms, to predict PCOS. This paper introduces a data-driven approach to PCOS diagnosis, combining Feature Engineering and ML. Several feature selection approaches have been considered to select sets of features for training the ML model, including CatBoost, Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost), Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LGBM), AdaBoost, Random Forest (RF). Results demonstrate that AdaBoost, with ten features selected by RF Feature Importance and Highest Correlation (HC), provides the highest test accuracy.

</details>


### [333] [After the Euclidean Highway: Hyperbolic Expert AI as the Next Innovation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17513)
*Kwan Soo Shin,In Seok Kang,Munho Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HySAT는 손실 계층에만 쌍곡선 기하학을 적용하여 전문가 도메인(계층적 트리 구조)에 적합한 훈련 방법을 제안한다. 어댑터에 동일한 기하학을 적용하면 훈련이 붕괴되지만, 손실 계층에만 배치하면 안정적으로 훈련되며, 이를 6개의 전문가 SLM으로 검증했다.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 전문가 도메인(트리 구조)에서 유클리드 트랜스포머는 깊이에 따라 부모-자식 구조를 희석시키는 문제가 있다. 기존 쌍곡선 접근법은 '네트워크를 얼마나 휘게 할 것인가'에 집중했지만, '곡률을 어디에 배치할 것인가'라는 근본적인 질문을 간과했다.

Method: 손실 계층에만 쌍곡선 손실(Hyperbolic Loss)을 적용하는 HySAT 제안. 어댑터 기반 접근법(매니폴드 위에서의 훈련)과 손실 계층만 쌍곡선으로 하는 접근법을 비교. 4-arm ablation을 통해 보존된 매니폴드 불변량을 분리. 3개의 명제와 1개의 보조정리로 손실 계층 배치의 안정성을 증명.

Result: 어댑터에 쌍곡선 기하학 적용 시 17번의 훈련 붕괴(~220 GPU-시간) 발생. 손실 계층에만 적용 시 단 한 번의 NaN 없이 안정적 훈련. Llama 3.1, EXAONE 3.5 기반 6개 SLM, 18M 샘플 코퍼스, ~317K 옵티마이저 스텝 검증. 4개 모델 운영 배포(1개 라이브, 소비자 대상), 2개 오픈웨이트.

Conclusion: 쌍곡선 기하학의 배치는 '어디에' 두느냐가 핵심이며, 손실 계층에만 배치하는 것이 안정적인 훈련을 가능하게 함을 입증했다.

Abstract: Expert domains are trees; the Euclidean transformer is not, diluting parent-child structure exponentially at depth. The hyperbolic turn left one question unasked: not how much of a network to curve, but where curvature may touch the gradient. Placement is a law, not a knob: the same geometry on a trainable adapter collapses training (seventeen training collapses, ~220 GPU-hours), yet at the loss layer alone it trains without one -- this is HySAT (Hyperbolic Structure-Aware Training), hyperbolic losses at the loss layer only. Across six expert SLMs we constructed and deployed (Llama 3.1 and EXAONE 3.5; four adapter strategies; 18.0M-sample corpus; zero NaN over ~317K optimizer steps), a matched four-arm ablation isolates the preserved manifold invariant, and three propositions and a lemma prove why loss-only placement is stable where adapter-on-manifold is not. Four models are operationally deployed (one live, consumer-facing), two open-weight, with per-step traces and a seventeen-incident failure ledger on Zenodo (CC-BY-4.0).

</details>


### [334] [CADENCE: Closing the Reasoning Gap via Coverage-Adaptive On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16955)
*Satyam Kumar,Saurabh Jha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CADENCE是一个统一的知识蒸馏框架，通过DRIFT机制（逐token前向/反向KL混合调度）及COVA、FTB、CCD、LAP、EMR、BSD六个组件，解决了on-policy蒸馏中的冷启动崩溃、状态无关散度调度和二元奖励稀疏三个问题。在GSM8K和MATH-500上，将0.5B学生模型从1.5B教师蒸馏至69.8%准确率，在单个Apple Mac Studio上即可运行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有on-policy知识蒸馏方法存在三个相互关联的失败模式：(i)冷启动崩溃——新初始化的学生模型对教师偏好的token赋予接近零的概率；(ii)状态无关的散度调度——仅依赖时间步的前向/反向KL插值忽略了学生当前的覆盖状态；(iii)二元奖励稀疏——仅用通过/失败信号丢弃了部分正确轨迹中的信息，导致训练信号不足。

Method: 提出CADENCE框架，核心是DRIFT机制——在学生采样的轨迹上按token进行前向KL和反向KL替代目标的逐token凸混合调度（而非序列级KL梯度估计器）。六个扩展组件：(A)COVA覆盖自适应β调度；(B)FTB分叉token增强；(C)CCD密集奖励；(D)LAP简洁性偏好的正确轨迹强化；(E)EMR熵匹配校准正则化；(F)BSD自举自蒸馏阶段。

Result: 在GSM8K和MATH-500上（修正的512-token协议，5个种子，报告标准差），CADENCE将0.5B学生从1.5B教师蒸馏至69.8±0.5%（预训练基线48.7%，缩小了教师63.2%的差距）；从3B教师蒸馏达72.1±0.4%（缩小76.2%差距），超越最强基线（DRIFT+二元奖励）4.4±0.7个百分点。所有实验在单台Apple Mac Studio（M系列，64GB统一内存）上完成。

Conclusion: CADENCE证明了原则性的蒸馏设计（针对特定失败模式的定向修复）能够在无需数据中心级硬件的前提下实现强大的推理质量，揭示了on-policy蒸馏中调度策略和奖励设计的关键作用。

Abstract: On-policy knowledge distillation transfers reasoning from large teachers to compact students, but existing approaches suffer three compounding failure modes: (i) cold-start collapse, where a fresh student assigns near-zero mass to teacher-preferred tokens; (ii) state-agnostic divergence scheduling, where time-only forward/reverse-KL interpolation ignores the student's coverage state; and (iii) binary reward sparsity, where pass/fail signals discard information from partially correct traces.
  We present CADENCE, a unified framework with a targeted fix for each. Its DRIFT mechanism schedules a per-token convex mixture of forward-KL and reverse-KL surrogate objectives on student-sampled trajectories (per-token surrogates, not sequence-level KL gradient estimators). Six components extend it: (A) COVA, a coverage-adaptive $β$ schedule accelerating the forward-to-reverse transition; (B) FTB, a forking-token boost concentrating gradient at high-entropy positions via a globally-normalized entropy reference; (C) CCD, a dense reward adding numerical-proximity partial credit for incorrect-but-close traces; (D) LAP, brevity-preferential correct-rollout reinforcement; (E) EMR, an entropy-matching calibration regularizer; (F) BSD, a bootstrapped self-distillation phase.
  On GSM8K and MATH-500 (corrected 512-token protocol, 5 seeds, reported std), CADENCE distills a 0.5B student from a 1.5B teacher to 69.8 $\pm$ 0.5% GSM8K pass@1 (from 48.7% pretrained; 63.2% of the teacher gap closed) and to 72.1 $\pm$ 0.4% with a 3B teacher (76.2% closed), beating the strongest matched-compute label-using baseline (DRIFT+binary reward) by +4.4 $\pm$ 0.7 points. All experiments run on a single Apple Mac Studio (M-series, 64GB unified memory), showing principled distillation reaches strong reasoning quality without datacenter-scale hardware.

</details>


### [335] [SurvCF(t): Counterfactual Explanations for Survival Analysis in Predictive Maintenance Multivariate Time Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16969)
*Zara Karazian,Panagiotis Papapetrou,Sindri Magnússon,Erik Frisk,Tony Lindgren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SurvCF(t)，首个为时序数据上的生存模型生成反事实解释的框架，通过最小化、合理且时间一致的修改来延长设备预测寿命，在多个基准数据集上验证了其可解释性和可操作性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代深度生存模型在剩余寿命预测上表现优异，但黑箱特性限制了其在安全关键场景中的使用，亟需可解释且可指导维护决策的反事实解释方法。

Method: 将反事实解释建模为带约束的优化问题，综合考虑有效性（延长寿命）、接近性（最小修改）、稀疏性（少量修改）和合理性（时间一致性），在资产运行历史中寻找最小变化。

Result: 在C-MAPSS、N-CMAPSS及真实Scania Component_X数据集上验证，能生成可操作且可解释的干预方案，桥接了生存预测与规定性维护之间的鸿沟。

Conclusion: SurvCF(t)实现了面向维护策略的可解释、决策导向的AI，使生存模型从单纯预测走向可指导实际维护行动。

Abstract: Predictive maintenance relies on accurate Remaining Useful Life estimation, often formulated using survival analysis over multivariate time-series data. While modern deep survival models achieve strong predictive performance, their black-box nature limits their use in safety-critical settings where actionable insight is required. In this work, we introduce \textit{SurvCF(t)}, the first framework for generating counterfactual explanations for survival models operating on time-series data. \textit{SurvCF(t)} identifies minimal, plausible, and temporally consistent changes to an asset's operational history that increase its predicted life time, framing explanation as a constrained optimization problem combining validity, proximity, sparsity, and plausibility. We evaluate the method on multiple benchmarks, including C-MAPSS, N-CMAPSS, and a real-world case study of the Scania Component\_X dataset, demonstrating its ability to produce actionable and interpretable interventions. Our results show that \textit{SurvCF(t)} bridges the gap between survival prediction and prescriptive maintenance, enabling explainable and decision-oriented AI for maintenance strategies.

</details>


### [336] [PoLoRA: A Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA Optimizer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17620)
*Nikhil Ghosh,Tetiana Parshakova,Robert M. Gower*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PoLoRA，一种针对LoRA微调的新优化器，通过乘积感知的谱更新方向、曲率预条件和幅度规则三个组件，在1.2-1.7倍更少的步数内达到与Adam相当的损失，且对学习率更不敏感。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA微调中使用的Adam优化器忽略了权重矩阵的矩阵结构和乘积结构（将参数视为扁平向量），导致训练效率不高。现有的矩阵感知优化器（如Muon）及其变体无法持续优于Adam。

Method: PoLoRA包含三个关键组件：1) 乘积感知的谱更新方向（product-aware spectral update direction）；2) 基于控制每样本损失变化的曲率预条件（curvature preconditioning）；3) 控制因子更新和合并更新大小的幅度规则（magnitude rule）。

Result: 在1B到8B参数规模的代码和数学指令微调数据集上，PoLoRA以1.2-1.7倍更少的步数达到与调优后的Adam相当的最终保留损失，每步开销最多增加3%。同时，PoLoRA对学习率更不敏感，且最佳学习率在不同秩下保持稳定。

Conclusion: PoLoRA通过专门针对LoRA结构的优化策略，在保持极低额外开销的同时显著提升了训练效率，是对Adam等通用优化器在LoRA场景下的有效改进。

Abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) makes finetuning large language models cheaper by adding to each weight matrix a trainable low-rank update parameterized as the product of two matrices. These matrices are usually trained with Adam, which treats them as a single flat vector of parameters and ignores both the matrix and product structure of LoRA. Applying a matrix-aware optimizer such as Muon to each factor does not consistently improve over Adam, and neither do the product-aware Muon variants proposed in concurrent works. To realize consistent gains, we introduce PoLoRA, a Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA optimizer built from three ingredients: a product-aware spectral update direction, curvature preconditioning derived from controlling the per-sample loss change, and a magnitude rule that controls the sizes of both the factor and merged updates. We evaluate PoLoRA on instruction-tuning datasets for code and math across models from 1B to 8B parameters, and find that it reaches the final held-out loss achieved by tuned Adam in 1.2-1.7 times fewer steps, while adding at most 3% per-step overhead. Compared to Adam, PoLoRA is also less sensitive to the learning rate, and its optimal learning rate is stable across ranks.

</details>


### [337] [Periodic Bootstrap Thompson Sampling For Periodically Non-Stationary Bandit Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16986)
*Boning Shao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出周期性自助汤普森采样（PBTS），通过周期性重置信念和自助探索阶段，解决传统TS在周期性非平稳奖励环境中的偏差问题，实验显示显著降低累积遗憾。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统汤普森采样（TS）在周期性非平稳奖励分布中会累积所有历史观测，导致后验分布产生偏差，无法适应奖励分布的周期性变化。

Method: PBTS通过同步信念重置与已知或推断的周期间隔，并嵌入结构化的自助探索阶段，清除过时数据同时保持不确定性估计。

Result: 在人工构建的偏斜与平衡奖励分布、不同自助比例及周期错位等环境下，PBTS相比传统TS显著降低了累积遗憾。

Conclusion: PBTS通过记忆重置和自助阶段，为周期性奖励上下文中的bandit算法优化提供了新颖有效的方法，未来可研究自适应周期识别等方向。

Abstract: This paper introduces Periodic Bootstrap Thompson Sampling (PBTS), an innovative extension of the classic Thompson Sampling (TS) algorithm tailored for bandit problems with periodic non-stationarity. Conventional TS accumulates all past observations, leading to biased posteriors when reward distributions cycle over time. PBTS overcomes this by synchronizing belief resets with known or inferred period intervals and embedding structured bootstrap exploration phases, effectively purging obsolete data while preserving uncertainty estimates. PBTS is tested in artificially constructed environments, which include skewed and balanced reward distributions, along with different bootstrap proportions and misaligned periodic intervals. Results indicate that PBTS generally achieves statistically significant reductions in cumulative regret against traditional TS in periodic non-stationary environments. Subsequent discussion further articulates the potential of PBTS's real-world deployment. The study mentions limitations like extreme periodic misalignment and proposes future research such as self-adjusting cycle-recognition. With memory reset and bootstrap phase, PBTS introduces a novel approach to optimizing bandit algorithms in periodic reward contexts.

</details>


### [338] [Mobius Learning: Cyclic Depth Folding in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17843)
*Tongtian Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Mobius Learning架构，通过循环深度折叠让同一模块组在不同数据流中扮演浅层和深层角色。实验表明，在124M GPT-2模型上，这种方式比固定顺序的循环Transformer取得更低验证损失，且特别适合内存受限的分布式训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战传统观点——Transformer中不同深度的模块必须固定在有序序列的特定位置，探索同一模块组能否同时承担浅层和深层的不同角色。

Method: 提出Mobius Learning训练架构，基于循环深度折叠（cyclic depth folding），不同数据流遵循循环移位后的模块顺序，使同一模块组对某些数据流位于序列早期（浅层角色），对另一些数据流位于序列后期（深层角色），实现深度角色叠加。

Result: 在四个worker的实验中，使用modded GPT-2 small（124M）模型在2.5B FineWeb tokens上训练（Muon优化器），Mobius Learning在更多Transformer块序列次数下比固定顺序的循环Transformer取得更低的验证损失。

Conclusion: 模块组不必固定在单一的浅层或深层角色，循环深度折叠开辟了新设计空间。该架构天然适合内存受限的分布式训练：原始训练数据保持本地，每个worker只存储一个模块组而非完整Transformer块栈。

Abstract: Transformer-based language models organize computation along an ordered depth axis, where shallow and deep blocks often develop distinct representational roles. We challenge the conventional view that these roles must remain tied to a block's position in the ordered sequence. We introduce Mobius Learning, a training architecture based on cyclic depth folding, in which different data streams follow cyclically shifted block orders. The same block group is therefore applied early in the block sequence for some data streams and late for others, so it is optimized in both shallow and deep roles, a phenomenon we call depth-role superposition. Surprisingly, in four-worker experiments with a modded GPT-2 small (124M) model trained on 2.5B FineWeb tokens using Muon, Mobius Learning achieves lower validation loss than a fixed-order looped Transformer at larger numbers of Transformer block-sequence passes. This counterintuitive result shows that a block group need not remain confined to one fixed shallow or deep role within the block sequence and opens a new design space based on cyclic depth folding. Crucially, this structure makes Mobius Learning particularly well suited to memory-constrained distributed training: raw training data remain local, while each worker stores one block group rather than the complete Transformer block stack.

</details>


### [339] [Counterfactual Shapley Credit Assignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16999)
*Mingxuan Li,Kaizhan-Lee,Elias Bareinboim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出反事实沙普利值（φ-value）作为归因框架，通过因果理论将环境奖励在时间维度上重新分配，解决了强化学习中信用分配问题（区分技能与运气），并提出了φ-PPO算法，在稀疏因果、高随机性和延迟奖励场景中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法在信用分配上存在根本性缺陷：无论是基于时间邻近性还是事后条件奖励重新加权，都无法正确区分智能体的策略（技能）与环境随机性（运气），导致归因偏差。

Method: 基于反事实推理和沙普利值构建φ-value，将环境奖励按因果贡献重新分配；提出一致估计器高效计算φ-value；结合优先轨迹回放（PTR）设计φ-PPO策略梯度算法。

Result: 在稀疏因果、高随机性和延迟奖励的挑战性环境中，φ-value精准对齐任务奖励的真实因果来源，φ-PPO展现出优于现有最先进方法的样本效率，而先前方法无法收敛。

Conclusion: 反事实沙普利信用分配框架为强化学习中的技能-运气分离提供了理论严谨的因果解决方案，能够在不改变最优策略的前提下显著提升信用分配质量与学习效率。

Abstract: The Credit Assignment Problem (CAP) is fundamental to developing efficient and explainable Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents. Existing frameworks, whether relying on temporal contiguity or hindsight-conditioned reward reweighting, frequently fail to attribute properly between an agent's policy (skill) and environmental stochasticity (luck). A principled approach to CAP must isolate the true causal drivers of observed outcomes from spurious correlations and environmental randomness. We introduce Counterfactual Shapley Credit Assignment, a novel framework grounded in causal theory that attributes credit and blame via the Counterfactual Shapley Value ($φ$-value). By redistributing environmental rewards, $φ$-values enhance temporal credit assignment across three critical dimensions: sparse causality, high stochasticity, and delayed rewards, all while preserving the optimal policy. We derive a consistent estimator that computes $φ$-values efficiently, enabling a new class of policy gradient methods, $φ$-PPO, combined with Prioritized Trajectory Replay (PTR). Empirical results demonstrate that $φ$-values align precisely to the ground truth causes of task rewards with superior sample efficiency in challenging environments where prior state-of-the-art methods fail to converge.

</details>


### [340] [MADA-RL: Multi-Agent Debate-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in Compact Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18006)
*Martino M. L. Pulici,Cuong Xuan Chu,Evgeny Kharlamov,Zifeng Ding,Volker Tresp,Yunpu Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出MADA-RL，一种面向紧凑型语言模型（≤4B参数）的后训练框架，通过将模型分工为生成器和评论家角色，并引入反事实评论家优势（counterfactual critic advantage）进行辩论感知训练。仅用全微调1/16的参数，在五个数学推理基准上将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B准确率提升2个百分点，达到精度-训练参数的Pareto前沿。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型推理性能强但训练成本高昂，紧凑型模型（≤4B参数）在有限预算下性能提升困难，现有方法对紧凑模型效果不佳。

Method: 提出MADA-RL框架：(1) 将紧凑模型专化为生成器和评论家角色；(2) 引入反事实评论家优势：评论家奖励减去生成器集成的每实例准确率，作为动态、角色条件的基线；(3) 通过LoRA微调少量参数；(4) 部署时采用轻量级多轮协议组合专化智能体。

Result: 在五个数学推理基准上，DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B准确率从39.9%提升至41.9%（+2.0点，p<0.001），仅用全微调基线1/16的可训练参数，达到精度-训练参数的Pareto前沿；评论家改进率最高，证明学会了纠正生成器错误而非模仿。

Conclusion: MADA-RL证明反事实优势能有效实现紧凑模型间的角色分工与协作，在极低训练成本下取得显著推理性能提升，但尚未超越使用更大数据集训练的强基线（DeepScaleR、STILL-3），推理时间成本也需关注。

Abstract: Large language models achieve strong reasoning performance, but often at prohibitive training cost - a challenge that is especially acute for compact models ($\leq 4 \, \mathrm{B}$ parameters) trained under limited budgets. We introduce MADA-RL, a post-training framework that specializes compact models into generator and critic roles and trains them with a debate-aware learning signal, fine-tuning only a small subset of parameters via LoRA adapters. Our central contribution is a counterfactual critic advantage: a dynamic, role-conditioned baseline that redefines the critic's advantage as its reward minus the generator ensemble's per-instance accuracy. This explicitly optimizes critics to improve over generator consensus rather than to merely reproduce a correct answer, yielding more targeted credit assignment than static mean-reward normalization. At deployment, the specialized agents are composed in a lightweight multi-round protocol. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, MADA-RL raises the accuracy of the DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B model from $39.9 \, \%$ to $41.9 \, \%$ ($+2.0$ points, $p < 0.001$) using $16$ times fewer trainable parameters than fully fine-tuned baselines, placing it on the accuracy-trainable-parameter Pareto front. It approaches, but does not surpass, the strongest baselines (DeepScaleR, STILL-3), which are trained on substantially larger datasets; we analyse this gap and the associated inference-time cost directly. A controlled study isolates the source of MADA-RL's gains: the counterfactual advantage produces the highest critic improvement rate of any model evaluated, indicating that trained critics learn to correct generator errors rather than to imitate them.

</details>


### [341] [Scalable Causal Imitation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17003)
*Eylam Tagor,Mingxuan Li,Elias Bareinboim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出两种基于因果推断的离策略模仿学习算法（Causal SQIL 和 Causal IQ-Learn），通过高效近似序贯π-后门准则，将全时域调整压缩为固定大小滑动窗口，解决了现有因果模仿学习方法在长时域、高维连续控制任务中表现不佳的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有因果模仿学习方法（Causal BC、Causal GAIL）仅适用于短时域、低维场景，在长时域连续控制任务中因复合误差、训练不稳定、样本效率低及序贯调整不可行等问题而表现不佳。

Method: 将因果调整框架与离线策略逆强化学习目标（Soft Q Imitation Learning、Inverse soft-Q Learning）结合；利用连续控制环境的因果结构，通过高效近似将全时域序贯π-后门调整压缩为固定大小滑动窗口，得到因果调整后的状态表征。

Result: 在混淆环境测试中，Causal SQIL 和 Causal IQ-Learn 显著优于现有因果模仿学习算法，在长时域任务中甚至超越专家表现，而所有非因果模仿方法均无法学到有效行为。

Conclusion: 结合因果调整与离策略逆强化学习是解决长时域、高维连续控制中因果模仿学习问题的有效途径。

Abstract: Imitation learning enables learning a policy in an unknown environment with a latent reward signal using expert demonstrations, but it struggles when the imitator's and expert's observations are mismatched and unobserved confounders are present in expert demonstrations. By identifying appropriate adjustment sets via the sequential $π$-backdoor criterion, causal imitation learning (CIL) provides a framework for approximating the expert's policy from confounded data. However, existing CIL methods, Causal Behavioral Cloning (Causal BC) and Causal Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (Causal GAIL), are designed for short-horizon, low-dimensional settings. When applied to continuous control tasks with long horizons and high-dimensional state-action spaces, these methods exhibit poor performance: Causal BC suffers from compounding errors, Causal GAIL is unstable and sample-inefficient, and sequential $π$-backdoor adjustment becomes impractical. We introduce Causal Soft Q Imitation Learning (SQIL) and Causal Inverse soft-Q Learning (IQ-Learn), two off-policy causal imitation learning algorithms that combine the causal adjustment framework with state-of-the-art inverse reinforcement learning objectives. Both algorithms operate on causally-adjusted state representations produced by an efficient approximation of the sequential $π$-backdoor criterion, exploiting the causal structure of continuous control environments to reduce the full-horizon adjustment to a fixed-size sliding window. We evaluate all methods in a suite of confounded environments and find that Causal SQIL and Causal IQ-Learn substantially outperform prior CIL algorithms on long-horizon tasks, sometimes surpassing the expert, whereas all causally unaware imitation methods fail to learn meaningful behavior.

</details>


### [342] [L1 Augmented Attention as an Improved Vector Similarity Metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18027)
*Kurt Godden*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出L1增强注意力机制，在点积注意力中引入可学习的L1距离项，通过低维投影降低计算开销，在WikiText 2上实现高达14.5%的困惑度降低，超越了原始Transformer和RBF L2核方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准缩放点积注意力将方向对齐和向量幅度混为一谈，作为相似度度量时存在局限性。作者希望引入互补的几何信息，同时保留点积的计算并行性。

Method: 在点积分数中减去一个可学习的、头特定的L1距离；将查询和键投影到低维子空间以降低L1计算成本，这些子空间参数专门保留有信息量的L1结构。

Result: 在紧凑型Transformer上，WikiText 2困惑度降低14.5%，优于RBF L2核基线；不同层和注意力头展现出独特的几何角色和头级特化。

Conclusion: 用L1几何丰富注意力机制是改进现代语言模型相似度计算的一个有原则且有效的方法，兼具精度提升和并行效率优势。

Abstract: Scaled dot product attention conflates directional alignment and vector magnitude, limiting its effectiveness as a similarity metric in Transformer models. We introduce L1 augmented attention, a simple and computationally parallelizable modification that subtracts a learned, head specific L1 distance between queries and keys from the dot product score. This hybrid similarity captures complementary geometric information. Dot product rewards directional alignment, while L1 penalizes coordinate deviations. To reduce the cost of L1 computation, we project queries and keys into low dimensional subspaces whose parameters specialize to preserve informative L1 structure. Evaluated on WikiText 2 using a compact transformer, L1 augmented attention achieves up to a 14.5% reduction in perplexity over the original transformer baseline and outperforms an RBF L2 kernel. Analysis of norm variance and learned L1 weights reveals distinct geometric roles across layers and strong head level specialization. These results demonstrate that enriching attention with L1 geometry provides a principled and effective improvement to similarity computation in modern language models, with practical benefits for both accuracy and parallel efficiency.

</details>


### [343] [Regularize or Localize: When Training-Time KV-Cache Geometry Pays Under Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17019)
*Libo Sun,Po-Wei Harn,Zewei Zhang,Peixiong He,Xiao Qin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在标准自回归语言模型预训练中，LeJEPA的反坍缩目标（σ-reg）能否重塑表示，以及由此产生的几何结构如何帮助KV缓存量化。实验表明：σ-reg降低隐藏状态各向异性但不影响KV缓存；直接对KV施加正则化可显著降低缓存各向异性；在粗粒度量化器下该训练干预有效，但在细粒度量化配置下优势消失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索是否可以通过训练时的分布正则化（σ-reg）改善标准自回归语言模型中KV缓存的几何结构，从而在后续量化中减少性能损失。

Method: 训练1.1亿参数的模型在10B FineWeb tokens上。设置三组实验：(1)在隐藏状态上施加σ-reg (λ=0.01)；(2)对比直接对K和V施加正则化与仅对隐藏状态施加正则化；(3)在不同量化方案（无变换对称分组量化、per-channel、KIVI-style配置）下评估量化性能。

Result: (1) σ-reg降低隐藏状态各向异性38%，困惑度增加<0.35%；(2) 直接对KV施加正则化降低缓存各向异性94%，而对隐藏状态施加不影响KV缓存；(3) 在粗粒度（per-channel）量化下，直接KV正则化模型比基线低4.3-7.9倍的DNLL；在KIVI-style（token-local分组、混合KV缩放+零点）配置下所有模型表现接近。

Conclusion: 训练时的分布正则化对KV缓存量化有帮助，但仅限于粗粒度量化器；在细粒度量化配置（如KIVI-style）下优势消失。这是首次针对标准KV缓存几何结构的训练时分布正则化研究。

Abstract: We study whether \sigreg -- LeJEPA's anti-collapse objective -- can reshape representations during standard autoregressive language-model pretraining, and when the resulting geometry helps \kv-cache quantization. We train 110M-parameter models on 10B FineWeb tokens and report three findings. \textbf{(1)} At $λ{=}0.01$, \sigreg reduces hidden-state pairwise-cosine anisotropy by $38\%$ across three paired seeds. Perplexity increases by less than $0.35\%$ in every pair, with no consistent zero-shot loss. \textbf{(2)} This change does not propagate from hidden states to the \kv cache. Applying \sigreg directly to K and V during continued training, however, reduces mean cache anisotropy by $94\%$ across four checkpoints. A matched continuation without the \kv term leaves cache geometry nearly unchanged, and the frozen-trunk retrofits we tested do not reproduce the effect. \textbf{(3)} Under untransformed symmetric group-free quantization, direct \kv regularization is the only training condition that prefers per-channel scaling in all three seeds, and under that same 3-bit per-channel scheme the baseline incurs $4.3$--$7.9\times$ the directly regularized model's \dnll. Under the full simulated KIVI-style configuration (mixed arrangement, zero-points, grouped scales), however, all models reach near-parity, including when storage overhead is approximately matched. In this 110M regime, the training intervention helps when quantizer scales are coarse; the advantage vanishes under the tested combination of token-local grouping, mixed \kv scaling, and zero-points. To our knowledge this is the first training-time \emph{distributional} regularization of standard \kv-cache geometry evaluated against post-hoc cache quantization.

</details>


### [344] [Interpretable Machine Learning for Air Pollution and Respiratory Health Prediction: A Socioeconomic Subgroup Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17024)
*Maede Azani Hassan Abadi,Shouyi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用可解释机器学习框架，基于国家级别周度数据预测呼吸系统疾病发生率与空气质量状态。结果表明PM2.5是呼吸系统疾病率的最主要预测因子，线性模型表现最佳；空气质量分类高度依赖PM2.5；SHAP分析揭示了无PM2.5时社会经济与气象变量的重要性上升；亚组分析显示PM2.5在中低收入国家贡献更大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空气污染与气候相关压力对呼吸健康的影响日益严重，尤其在环境暴露和医疗能力不平等的背景下。现有研究缺乏对预测模型的可解释性分析，难以判断模型是否真正捕捉到了关键污染信号，也无法检验预测模式在不同社会经济群体间的差异。

Method: 使用国家级别周度结构化数据，构建两类监督学习任务：(1) 呼吸系统疾病率回归（每10万人）; (2) 空气质量二分类。比较9种回归模型与9种分类模型，采用嵌套交叉验证。使用SHAP值进行模型解释，并按收入水平和地理区域进行亚组分析。

Result: (1) PM2.5是呼吸系统疾病率的最主要预测因子，线性和正则化线性模型回归性能最强；(2) 空气质量分类在包含PM2.5时准确率高，移除后性能显著下降；(3) 无PM2.5时，GDP、降水量和医疗可及性等变量重要性上升；(4) 亚组回归误差在各收入组相似，但PM2.5对中低收入国家的预测贡献更大。

Conclusion: 仅靠模型准确度不足以支撑气候-健康预测。可解释模型有助于识别主要污染信号、检验结果是否依赖关键污染物变量、以及揭示预测模式在不同社会经济群体间的差异。

Abstract: Air pollution and climate-related stressors are increasingly important concerns for respiratory health, especially in settings with unequal environmental exposure and healthcare capacity. This study evaluates an interpretable machine learning framework for predicting respiratory disease rates and air-quality status using structured country-level weekly data. Two supervised learning tasks were considered: regression of respiratory disease rate per 100,000 population and binary classification of air-quality status. Nine regression models and nine classification models were compared using nested cross-validation. Model interpretation was conducted using SHAP values, and subgroup analysis was performed across income levels and geographic regions. The results showed that PM2.5 concentration was the dominant predictor of respiratory disease rate, with linear and regularized linear models achieving the strongest regression performance. For air-quality classification, models achieved high balanced accuracy when PM2.5 was included, but performance decreased substantially when PM2.5 was removed, indicating strong dependence on pollutant-related information. SHAP analysis showed that, without PM2.5, socioeconomic and meteorological variables such as GDP per capita, precipitation, and healthcare access became more influential. Subgroup analysis showed similar aggregate regression error across income groups, but PM2.5 contributed more strongly to predictions in lower-middle-income countries. These results show that model accuracy alone is not sufficient for climate-health prediction. Interpretable models can help identify dominant pollution-related signals, test whether results depend on key pollutant variables, and show whether prediction patterns differ across socioeconomic groups.

</details>


### [345] [ChemFusion: A Multimodal Cross-Attention Network for Reaction Yield Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17033)
*Qiwei Han,Chi Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ChemFusion是一种混合神经网络，通过交叉注意力机制融合电子描述符和3D原子坐标，显著提升了过渡金属催化反应产率预测的准确性，并能自主识别空间位阻效应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 过渡金属催化反应预测因物理化学变量交织而复杂，现有方法无法有效融合宽泛的电子描述符与反应位点的局部三维几何信息，存在表征鸿沟。

Method: 提出ChemFusion混合神经网络，采用交叉注意力机制，将传统电子特征与显式3D原子坐标融合，使全局电子状态能够动态关注未池化的分子点云中的特定空间约束。

Result: 在多样化的交叉偶联反应库上，ChemFusion的预测性能显著超越传统单模态框架；注意力矩阵分析显示模型能自主学习并惩罚限制性的空间位阻效应。

Conclusion: 空间感知网络能够驾驭复杂反应中的立体化学效应，而标准统计模型通常无法捕捉这些效应，为化学反应预测提供了物理可解释的途径。

Abstract: Forecasting the outcomes of transition-metal-catalyzed reactions is notoriously complex due to the interplay of diverse physical and chemical variables. A persistent computational bottleneck has been effectively merging broad electronic descriptors with the localized, three-dimensional geometry of the reactive site. To bridge this representation gap, we present ChemFusion, a hybrid neural network that fuses conventional electronic features with explicit 3D atomic coordinates. Using a cross-attention mechanism, the model enables global electronic states to dynamically attend to specific spatial constraints within un-pooled molecular point clouds. When benchmarked against a diverse library of cross-couplings, this approach delivers exceptional predictive performance, decisively surpassing traditional single-modality frameworks. Importantly, extracting the attention matrices reveals that the architecture autonomously learns to identify and penalize restrictive steric hindrances. This provides a physically grounded interpretability, demonstrating that spatially aware networks can navigate complex reaction sterics that standard statistical models typically miss.

</details>


### [346] [LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18110)
*Tianzhu Ye,Li Dong,Guanheng Chen,He Zhu,Xun Wu,Shaohan Huang,Furu Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出经验学习（EL）方法，用高带宽的文本反馈替代传统强化学习中的标量奖励，通过将评判模型转变为教练模型，利用经验知识蒸馏来训练策略，在开放任务中优于传统基于标量的强化学习方法，并具备更好的泛化能力和抗奖励攻击能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习在开放任务中将基于规则的评估压缩为标量奖励，损失了丰富的文本反馈信息，且无法区分不同质量的回答，导致学习信号单一、泛化能力差、易受奖励攻击。

Method: 将LLM-as-a-Judge的反馈模型改造为LLM-as-a-Coach，教练模型将评估结果提炼为可迁移的经验知识，用于指导教师模型，并通过上下文蒸馏让策略模型内化这些知识，形成高带宽的密集监督信号。

Result: 在两种策略族上，无论使用自身反馈还是专有模型反馈，EL在保留和未见过的开放任务上均一致优于基于标量奖励的强化学习方法，泛化能力更强，且能缓解奖励攻击问题。

Conclusion: 经验知识作为更丰富、更可泛化的学习信号，为开放任务的后期训练提供了有效替代方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model from an LLM-as-a-Judge into an LLM-as-a-Coach. The coach distills its assessment of each on-policy response into transferable experiential knowledge, which conditions a teacher model and is internalized by the policy through on-policy context distillation. Compared with scalar rewards, this higher-bandwidth feedback channel provides dense supervision and preserves fine-grained preferences among high-quality responses. Across two policy families, with feedback from the policy itself or a proprietary model, EL consistently outperforms rubric-based RL on held-out and unseen open-ended tasks. Notably, EL generalizes better beyond the training distribution, and mitigates reward hacking. These findings establish experiential knowledge as a richer and more generalizable learning signal for post-training on non-verifiable tasks.

</details>


### [347] [Apeliotes: A Diffusion-Based Modeling Framework for km-scale Multi-Level Atmospheric Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17037)
*Evangelia Rafaela Frastali,Achyut Paudel,Maryam Golbazi,Frank Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Apeliotes框架，结合全球再分析数据、预训练气象基础模型和区域训练的生成扩散模型，实现高分辨率（千米级）天气预报，在风速、温度等变量上表现优异（如10米风速相关性0.91，2米温度相关性0.99）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有高分辨率气象数据主要通过动力降尺度生成，计算成本高且难以跨位置、变量和预报场景扩展，因此需要一种基于机器学习的降尺度系统，能够随机生成多个气象变量并直接产生新的高分辨率场。

Method: Apeliotes框架基于全球再分析数据、预训练全球气象基础模型和区域训练的生成扩散模型构建，能够提供千米级气象变量以及全球数据中无法直接获取的多层大气场。

Result: 垂直风廓线预测误差低于3%，10米风速相关性0.91，2米温度相关性0.99，NRMSE分别为0.42和0.17。

Conclusion: Apeliotes在公里级天气预报中取得了极具竞争力的性能，验证了生成扩散模型结合基础模型进行气象降尺度的有效性。

Abstract: High-resolution atmospheric data are required to resolve mesoscale and localized meteorological structures, however such datasets remain limited in many regions of the world. Existing high-resolution weather products are typically produced through dynamical downscaling, which is computationally expensive and difficult to scale across locations, variables, and forecast scenarios. These limitations motivate machine-learning-based downscaling systems that can generate multiple weather variables stochastically while producing new high-resolution fields directly. In this paper we present Apeliotes, a framework for high-resolution weather forecasting. Built on the global re-analysis atmospheric data, a pre-trained global weather foundation model, and a regionally trained generative diffusion model, Apeliotes not only provides accurate kilometer-scale weather variables, but also multi-level atmospheric fields which are not directly available in the existing global atmospheric data. Our comprehensive evaluation demonstrates that Apeliotes achieves highly competitive performance. The model predicts vertical wind profile with less than 3\% error between truth and predicted fields, achieving correlations of 0.91 for 10-m wind speed and 0.99 for 2-m temperature, with NRMSE values of 0.42 and 0.17, respectively.

</details>


### [348] [Solver-Hard Is Not Model-Hard: A Hardness-Controlled Diagnostic for LLM Constraint Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17047)
*Lucky Verma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM约束推理器在接近随机SAT相变区域时的评估偏差，通过控制子句密度、比较不同难度的公式（扩展器-Tseitin vs 阶梯-Tseitin），发现精度差距与求解器冲突代理之间呈现错误符号的相关性，并揭示了模型对表面特征的敏感性及推理token消耗与问题难度之间的不一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM约束推理器的评估往往在随机SAT相变区域附近进行，这混淆了公式密度与求解器硬度。作者希望解耦这两个因素，更严谨地评估LLM的真实推理能力。

Method: 在匹配实例级密度和子句宽度的条件下，对比了证明困难的扩展器-Tseitin公式和证明容易的阶梯-Tseitin公式，以及鸽巢锚公式和密度不匹配的对照组。使用了Glucose求解器的平均冲突代理，并测试了三个LLM模型（每个243个实例），进行了proof-preserving重标定实验和预注册的token消耗分析。

Result: Glucose平均冲突代理差异高达51倍；精度差距范围从-32到+20个百分点，合并差距+1.7点（p=0.74）；正确性与冲突代理之间呈错误符号的相关性（r=+0.15）。proof-preserving重标定使一个模型在所有五个簇中平均精度下降93点，但对另一个模型无显著影响。推理token消耗与代理冲突无一致增长关系。

Conclusion: LLM约束推理器的评估结果对公式的表面特征敏感，且与求解器难度不一致；精度和token消耗与真正的推理难度之间存在脱节，提醒研究者注意评估设计的严谨性。

Abstract: LLM constraint reasoners are often evaluated near the random-SAT phase transition, confounding density and solver hardness. We test instance-level transfer while near-matching clause density. At aligned size bins, with near-matched density and matched maximum clause width, we compare proof-hard expander-Tseitin and proof-easy ladder-Tseitin formulas, pigeonhole anchors, and density-mismatched controls. Theory separates their resolution hardness; a solver-specific Glucose mean-conflict proxy differs by up to $51\times$, and five other solvers preserve the direction. Across three included models (243 instances each; a fourth is excluded for abstention), the near-matched-density accuracy gaps range from $-32$ to $+20$ points, with a pooled gap of $+1.7$ points ($p=0.74$) and a wrong-signed correctness-versus-conflict association ($r=+0.15$). A proof-preserving relabeling lowers accuracy in all five clusters for one model (mean $-93$ points) but not another, exposing model-surface sensitivity. In a preregistered extension, provider-reported completion-token spend does not consistently increase with the proxy after accounting for formula length and censoring. At 16k, the reasoning model spends more on proof-easy matched formulas and exhausts its budget on the solver-easiest UNSAT family; the 32k C1 gap is absent. These scoped dissociations concern verdict accuracy and observed token spend, not certificate solving, exact proof length, or allocation efficiency.

</details>


### [349] [Do Language Models Dream of Binding Molecules? Benchmarking LLMs under Spatial Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18144)
*Thomas MacDougall,Maksim Kuznetsov,Roman Schutski,Rim Shayakhmetov,Maxim Malkov,Vladimir Aladinskiy,Alex Aliper,Alex Zhavoronkov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了通用大语言模型（LLM）在基于结构的药物设计（SBDD）中处理3D空间约束的能力，并与扩散模型等基线方法进行比较。作者提出了3D-Fit基准测试策略，发现LLM虽落后于最先进方法，但在处理多重空间约束方面展现出潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在分子设计中表现出竞争力，但其理解和推理3D空间环境与物理约束的能力尚未被充分探索。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统评估LLM在复杂3D约束条件下的表现。

Method: 提出了3D-Fit基准测试策略，用于评估LLM在多条件约束（包括蛋白口袋、锚定片段、药效团点、口袋-配体强制相互作用）下的3D配体生成能力，并与专门的扩散模型进行对比。

Result: LLM在3D空间分子生成任务上仍落后于最先进的扩散模型，但在同时处理多个空间约束方面表现出一定的能力和可扩展性，具有应用前景。

Conclusion: LLM在SBDD中具备处理多重3D空间约束的潜力，但目前性能不及专用扩散模型，未来仍有提升空间。

Abstract: Structure-based drug design (SBDD) leverages the 3D structure of protein targets, often complemented by other spatial constraints, to generate candidate binding molecules. While diffusion models have dominated as a leading paradigm for high-quality 3D molecule generation, LLM-based methods are rapidly emerging in molecular design and have shown competitive performance in pocket-conditioned molecular generation. However, their ability to reason about physics and 3D spatial environments is largely underexplored. In this work, we systematically analyze whether current general-purpose LLMs are capable of navigating complex 3D constraints compared to established baselines such as specialized diffusion models. We consider 3D ligand generation conditioned on protein pockets together with ligand- and interaction-derived spatial constraints, including anchor fragments, pharmacophore points, and mandatory pocket-ligand interactions. To enable this evaluation, we introduce 3D-Fit - a token-efficient benchmarking strategy for assessing LLM performance on multi-conditioned spatial molecule generation. Our findings reveal a clear pattern in LLM spatial capabilities: while they still lag behind state-of-the-art approaches, they are promising and can handle multiple spatial constraints simultaneously, enabling scaling to heterogeneous setups.

</details>


### [350] [What does a Bayes-filtered transformer believe? A predictive Monte Carlo approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17060)
*Afiq Abdillah Effiezal Aswadi,Haotong Ma,Susan Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出预测性蒙特卡洛（PMC）方法，用于解释贝叶斯滤波变压器（BFT）在训练后内部化的隐式先验和后验分布，直接在隐空间而非预测空间进行分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通过比较BFT的预测与“参考后验”的预测来解释其内部机制，但不同后验可能有相同的均值预测，导致这种预测空间比较方法脆弱且不可靠。因此需要一种直接在隐空间进行解释的方法。

Method: 提出预测性蒙特卡洛（PMC）方法，仅利用BFT的下一词元生成能力，近似推断其隐式编码的先验和后验分布。在三种风格化任务家族（涵盖0-Markov和1-Markov可交换性）上进行验证。

Result: PMC成功恢复了BFT隐式学习到的先验和后验分布，并且先前在预测空间报告中观察到的现象在隐空间分析中仍然可见。

Conclusion: PMC是一种有效的BFT可解释性工具，能够在隐空间而非预测空间揭示BFT内化的贝叶斯推理机制，为理解Transformer的归纳偏置提供了新视角。

Abstract: A Bayes-filtered transformer (BFT) is a transformer trained on sequences that are generated in two steps: first a latent task is drawn from a prior, then observations are drawn conditional on that task. Trained under autoregressive log loss, the BFT's next-token prediction, in the idealized limit, is the Bayesian posterior predictive distribution (PPD) induced by that prior and that conditional law. In practice the trained BFT is only an approximation of this ideal PPD, raising an interpretive question: what prior and posterior over the latent task has the trained BFT actually internalized? Existing work answers this question by comparing the trained BFT's predictions against the predictions of various "reference" posteriors, each standing in for a different candidate algorithm or computation the BFT might be implementing. This prediction-space comparison is fragile: different posteriors can share the same posterior-mean predictions. We use predictive Monte Carlo (PMC) as a general interpretability tool for any BFT: using only next-token generation, PMC returns an approximation to the implicit prior and posterior over the latent task, answering the interpretive question directly in latent space. We apply PMC to three stylized task families spanning 0-Markov and 1-Markov exchangeability. The phenomena previously reported in these settings remain visible in latent space. Code is available at https://github.com/afiq-aswadi/bft-pmc

</details>


### [351] [Robust Assamese Speech Recognition through Controlled Fine-Tuning of Whisper Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17164)
*Ganapati Das,Dwipen Laskar,Hasin Afzal Ahmed,Sanjib Kr Kalita,Kshirod Sarmah,Hem Chandra Das,Manjula Kalita*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对资源匮乏的阿萨姆语，通过硬件感知的优化训练管道微调Whisper模型，在Mozilla Common Voice语料库上实现了显著优于零样本基线的ASR性能，WER达43.17%，相对改进78.26%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 阿萨姆语是一种形态丰富、资源匮乏的语言，现有Whisper模型在其语音识别任务上表现不佳，且缺乏足够的标注语音数据，亟需一种高效的ASR方案。

Method: 基于Whisper预训练模型，在Mozilla Common Voice 24.0-阿萨姆语语料库上进行微调；采用混合精度训练和梯度累积技术，在T4 GPU上实现资源受限环境下的硬件感知优化训练管道。

Result: 微调模型在WER（43.17%）、CER（13.18%）、MER（43%）、WIL（64.81%）上分别相对提升78.26%、93.10%、57.0%、35.19%；BLEU和METEOR分别达30.81和0.5262；幻觉率和实时因子分别改善96.70%和32.38%。

Conclusion: 通过微调Whisper模型能够有效提升低资源形态丰富语言的ASR性能，证明硬件感知优化策略在资源受限环境下可行且高效。

Abstract: Developing Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) for morphologically rich, low-resource languages such as Assamese is challenging due to insufficient annotated speech data. The pretrained Whisper model performs poorly on Assamese speech recognition tasks. This paper presents a controlled, fine-tuned Whisper-based Assamese ASR system trained on the Mozilla Common Voice 24.0-Assamese corpus. A hardware-aware optimized training pipeline is implemented for resource-constrained environments, employing mixed-precision training and gradient accumulation on Tesla 4 Graphics Processing Units (T4 GPUs). The proposed fine-tuned model significantly outperformed the Zero-shot baseline, yielding Word Error Rate (WER), Character Error Rate (CER), Match Error Rate (MER), and Word Infomation Loss (WIL) of 43.17\%, 13.18\%, 43\%, and 64.81\%, respectively, achieving significant relative improvements of 78.26\%, 93.10\%, 57.0\%, and 35.19\% over the baseline. Semantic evaluation of the fine-tuned model also demonstrates notable improvement over a zero baseline, attaining Bilingual Evaluation Understudy (BLEU) and Metric for Evaluation of Translation with Explicit ORdering (METEOR) scores of 30.81 and 0.5262, respectively. Additionally, the predicted hallucination rate and Real-Time Factor (RTF) are substantially improved by 96.70\% and 32.38\%, compared to the zero-shot baseline.

</details>


### [352] [Explaining and Tuning Transformer-based LLMs in Arithmetic Tasks with Human Strategies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17166)
*Luyu Qiu,Jianing Li,Hwanhee Kim,Xiaoyong Wei,Yueyuan Zheng,Janet Hsiao,Lei Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现Transformer大模型在算术任务上的学习模式与人类学习者相似——简单子任务学得快、复杂任务学得慢，并借鉴人类教学策略（任务分解、认知增强方法）显著提升了模型算术准确性，通过XAI验证了这种认知相似性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs在基础算术任务上表现不佳，这引发了对其可靠性、安全性和伦理部署的担忧。作者希望通过探究人类学习策略能否迁移到LLM训练中，来提升模型在算术任务上的表现。

Method: 1) 将整数算术任务分解为明确定义的子任务；2) 进行损失收敛顺序分析与消融研究；3) 借鉴人类学习中的问题解决策略和认知增强方法来改进LLM训练。

Result: 1) LLMs表现出与人类学习者相似的学习模式：简单子任务学习速度快，复杂子任务学习速度慢；2) 应用人类教学策略显著提升了LLM在算术任务上的准确率；3) 通过可视化验证和可解释性分析证实了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: Transformer-based LLMs在算术学习中可能与人类学习者共享认知过程，借鉴人类学习策略能有效提升模型性能，这一发现有助于通过XAI验证增强对LLMs在关键应用中的信任。

Abstract: Transformer-based large language models (LLMs) continue to achieve state-of-the-art performance across various natural language processing tasks. However, their subpar performance on seemingly elementary problems, such as basic arithmetic, raises concerns about model reliability, safety, and ethical deployment. In this study, we demonstrate that the performance of a vanilla Transformer model trained on integer arithmetic tasks can be improved using methods effective for human learners. We begin by decomposing the arithmetic task into well-defined subtasks and conducting loss convergence order analysis together with ablation studies for each subtask. Our findings reveal that LLMs exhibit learning patterns similar to those of human learners, with a faster learning speed for simpler subtasks compared to more complex ones. In addition, we successfully improved the accuracy of LLMs by applying problem-solving strategies and cognitive empowerment methods shown to enhance the performance of human learners. This suggests that transformer-based LLMs may share cognitive processes with human learners in arithmetic. Lastly, we provide a comprehensive demonstration of our method's effectiveness, including significant accuracy improvement experiments, visualization verification, and explanation-based analysis to illuminate the intricacies of LLMs in arithmetic learning. In general, this work explores the potential similarities between transformer-based LLMs and human learners, supported by explainable AI (XAI) verifications, ultimately fostering trust in LLMs for critical and high-stakes applications.

</details>


### [353] [DADIR: Density-Aware Data-level Imbalanced Regression Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17178)
*Shermin Shahbazi,Hossein Mohammadi,Mohsen Afsharchi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DADIR是一个密度感知的数据级不平衡回归框架，通过自适应划分、条件变分自编码器和潜空间过采样三阶段处理，在不修改回归模型结构的前提下生成平衡数据集，显著提升欠表示区域的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的不平衡回归数据级方法通常依赖固定的目标空间划分或合成样本生成，未能联合考虑密度变化和局部特征空间结构，导致对稀疏区域的表示能力不足。

Method: DADIR包含三个组件：(1) 密度感知自适应划分(DAAP)，根据密度变化递归划分目标空间；(2) 密度正则化条件变分自编码器(DR-CVAE)，在保留稀疏区域表示的同时学习潜在特征；(3) 潜空间数据平衡，结合特征级聚类与过采样生成结构一致的合成样本。

Result: 在多样化不平衡回归数据集上，DADIR在欠表示区域和整体精度方面均取得一致且显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: DADIR有效解决不平衡回归问题，其生成平衡数据集可直接应用于现有回归模型，无需修改模型架构或学习目标，具有良好的通用性和实用性。

Abstract: Imbalanced learning addresses predictive modeling problems with underrepresented regions of the data distribution. Although widely studied in classification, imbalanced regression remains challenging because of continuous target variables and heterogeneous density distributions. Existing data-level methods often rely on fixed target partitioning or synthetic sample generation without jointly considering density variations and local feature-space structure. We propose DADIR, a Density-Aware Data-level Imbalanced Regression framework that exploits density information throughout the balancing process. DADIR comprises three components: (1) Density-Aware Adaptive Partitioning (DAAP), which recursively partitions the target space according to density variations; (2) a Density-Regularized Conditional Variational Autoencoder (DR-CVAE), which preserves sparse-region representations while learning latent features; and (3) latent-space data balancing, which combines feature-level clustering with oversampling to generate structurally consistent synthetic samples. Together, these components identify minority regions more effectively, preserve sparse-region information, and generate realistic synthetic data. The resulting balanced dataset can be used directly with existing regression models without modifying their architecture or learning objective. Experiments on diverse imbalanced regression datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in predictive performance, particularly in underrepresented regions, while also improving overall accuracy.

</details>


### [354] [DynImmune-BERT: Dynamic Immune Repertoire Modeling with Neural ODE Driven Continuous Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17244)
*Rong Fu,Yongtai Liu,Xiaowen Ma,Haoyu Zhao,Shuo Yin,Yiqing Lyu,Long Zhang,Wangyu Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DynImmune-BERT，一种连续时间T细胞受体库模型，通过深度自适应CLR初始化、门控神经ODE动力学、有界邻域自注意力、事件状态重启和混合传输目标，实现患者免疫状态预测。实验表明事件感知时序建模可补充静态编码器，但小规模外部队列需谨慎解读。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 静态TCR库语言模型将样本视为序列包，忽略了采样间隔、测序深度和克隆出现模式等时间信息，导致纵向数据中的克隆扩增、收缩、消失和重现信号未被充分利用。

Method: DynImmune-BERT包含：(1)深度自适应CLR初始化；(2)克隆存在门控神经ODE动力学；(3)有界邻域自注意力；(4)事件状态重启；(5)混合传输目标（监督主克隆与稀有克隆质量）；(6)低秩元适配器初始化重现克隆型，参数数独立于观察克隆数。

Result: 事件感知时序建模能补充强静态编码器；小规模外部队列和协议差异需谨慎解读；提供了不确定性估计、校准和阈值诊断；可视化潜在克隆轨迹和注意力邻域。

Conclusion: 当纵向TCR库结构可用时，时间感知模型可有效增强静态方法；但外部验证受限于队列规模和协议差异，需建立更鲁棒的评估标准。

Abstract: Longitudinal T cell receptor repertoires contain signals of clonal expansion, contraction, disappearance, and reappearance after immune perturbation. Static repertoire language models usually summarize a sample as a bag of sequences, so the sampling interval, sequencing depth, and clone presence pattern are only weakly represented. This paper presents DynImmune-BERT, a continuous time repertoire model for patient level immune status prediction. The method combines depth adaptive centered log ratio initialization, clone presence gated Neural ordinary differential equation dynamics, bounded neighborhood self attention, event based state restart, and a hybrid transport objective that supervises dominant and rare clone mass. A low rank meta adapter initializes reappearing clonotypes while keeping the parameter count independent of the number of observed clones. The evaluation separates literature reported baselines from internally controlled temporal comparisons, reports uncertainty for small external cohorts, adds calibration and threshold diagnostics, and visualizes latent clone trajectories and attention neighborhoods. The results indicate that event aware temporal modeling can complement strong static encoders when longitudinal repertoire structure is available, while small external cohorts and protocol differences require cautious interpretation.

</details>


### [355] [Distilled Reinforcement Learning for LLM Post-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17247)
*Chen Wang,Zhaochun Li,Jionghao Bai,Yining Zhang,Hexuan Deng,Ge Lan,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Distilled RL，一种结合强化学习与教师监督的新范式，通过反向重要性采样裁剪、负样本重置和序列级几何归一化，解决RL粗粒度奖励分配和OPD无条件模仿的局限性，在同族和跨族蒸馏中显著优于标准RL和OPD。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM后训练方法中，RL依赖粗粒度的结果监督导致信用分配困难且难以获取新知识；OPD通过KL散度无条件匹配教师logits，陷入"相似教师无新知、差异教师无有效指导"的困境，限制了跨族蒸馏的能力。亟需一种能选择性传递新知识且避免无条件模仿的新方法。

Method: Distilled RL将教师监督整合到RL目标中，包含三个核心组件：1）反向重要性采样裁剪（Reverse Importance Sampling with Clipping），用于选择性传递新知识；2）负样本重置（Negative Sample Reset），处理低质量样本；3）序列级几何归一化（Sequence-level Geometric Normalization），稳定训练过程。三者共同实现对教师知识的选择性迁移而非无条件模仿。

Result: 通过简洁可解释的案例研究证明Distilled RL能有效将教师模型中原本不可获得的知识迁移到学生模型。在广泛实验（包括同族和跨族蒸馏）中，Distilled RL在pass@1和pass@k指标上均显著优于标准RL和OPD。

Conclusion: Distilled RL成功结合了RL的探索能力和教师引导的细粒度监督，突破了OPD仅限于同族蒸馏的限制，为LLM后训练提供了一种更灵活、更有效的知识迁移框架。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) post-training is essential for improving reasoning, adaptation, and alignment. Existing methods mainly follow two paradigms: reinforcement learning (RL) and on-policy distillation (OPD). However, RL relies on coarse-grained outcome supervision, resulting in difficult credit assignment and limited capability to acquire new knowledge. OPD, meanwhile, unconditionally matches teacher logits through KL divergence, which creates a dilemma: similar teachers provide little new knowledge, while substantially different teachers often yield ineffective guidance, largely restricting OPD to within-family distillation. We propose Distilled Reinforcement Learning (Distilled RL), which integrates teacher supervision into the RL objective to provide fine-grained guidance, selectively transfer new knowledge and avoid unconditional imitation. Distilled RL contains three components: reverse importance sampling with clipping, negative sample reset, and sequence-level geometric normalization. Through a concise and interpretable case study, we demonstrate that Distilled RL can effectively transfer previously unavailable knowledge from a teacher model to a student model. Extensive experiments across both within-family and cross-family distillation settings show that Distilled RL substantially outperforms standard RL and OPD in terms of both pass@1 and pass@k. Our code is available at https://github.com/597358816/Distilled-RL.

</details>


### [356] [Node4All: Learning Node Representation Beyond Datasets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17272)
*Dooho Lee,Jaemin Yoo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Node4All 是一个无需针对特定数据集优化即可应用于任意图的节点表示学习器，基于 Channel Graph Transformer 架构和自监督合成图预训练，在 25 个基准上达到第 5 名，并支持零样本/少样本学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有节点表示学习方法高度依赖逐数据集训练和超参数调优，缺乏跨数据集的通用性。设计可复用的、泛化能力强的图模型极其困难，本文旨在解决这一根本性问题。

Method: 提出 Node4All，包含两个互补组件：(1) Channel Graph Transformer (CGT)——一种固定参数即可处理任意图数据集的架构；(2) 基于一系列合成图的自监督学习框架，使模型超越单个数据集的限制实现泛化。

Result: 在 25 个基准上的节点分类任务中，面对 21 个基线方法（均逐数据集调优），单个 Node4All 统一应用即排名第 5。并且支持一次性学习和上下文学习，在这些设置中优于最新的图基础模型 (GFMs)。

Conclusion: Node4All 首次实现了跨任意图数据集的节点表示复用，无需任何数据集特定优化，同时在实践效果上依然保持竞争力。

Abstract: Node representation learning has advanced rapidly, yet most existing methods rely on per-dataset training and hyperparameter tuning. This dataset-specific optimization comes from the difficulty of designing reusable graph models that generalize across diverse graph datasets. In this work, we introduce Node4All, a node representation learner applicable to arbitrary graph datasets without any dataset-specific optimization.
  Node4All is built on two complementary ideas. At the architectural level, we introduce the Channel Graph Transformer (CGT), which enables a single fixed parameterization to process arbitrary graph datasets. At the learning level, we propose a self-supervised learning based on a series of synthetic graphs. Together, these components enable generalization beyond individual datasets, which is infeasible with existing architectures and learning frameworks. We extensively evaluate Node4All on node classification across 25 benchmarks against 21 baselines, covering both supervised and self-supervised methods. Despite all baselines being trained and optimized for each dataset, a single Node4All, applied uniformly across the datasets, achieves a competitive ranking of 5th among 21 baselines. Moreover, Node4All supports one-shot and in-context learning with an appropriate predictor and outperforms recent graph foundation models (GFMs) in these settings. These results demonstrate that Node4All not only achieves reusability across arbitrary graph datasets, but also remains an effective solution in practice. Code and model checkpoints are available in https://github.com/dooho00/node4all.

</details>


### [357] [AIGB-R1: Self-Evolving Generative Auto-Bidding via Hierarchical Planner-Executor Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17281)
*Yuejia Dou,Hesong Wang,Xinyu Zhang,Tianyu Wang,Zhilin Zhang,Chuan Yu,Jian Xu,Bo Zheng,Qi Qi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AIGB-R1框架，通过分层架构（规划器+执行器）结合大语言模型推理能力与自进化机制，解决AI生成出价中的离线数据覆盖不足、任务理解欠缺等问题，在大规模数据集上验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI生成出价（AIGB）范式受限于离线数据的模式覆盖不足和任务状态理解欠缺，难以有效探索最优策略；直接使用LLM面临数值精度低、幻觉和推理延迟等挑战。

Method: 设计分层自进化框架AIGB-R1：高层Planner负责宏观策略规划，低层Executor负责细粒度决策；构建经验驱动的自进化循环实现自主策略探索与优化；提出两阶段管线（离线预训练+后训练对齐）及交互式竞价模拟环境；提出解耦组相对策略优化（D-GRPO）实现端到端优化。

Result: 在大规模公开数据集上的实验验证了AIGB-R1的有效性。

Conclusion: AIGB-R1通过将LLM推理能力与分层自进化框架结合，有效克服了现有AIGB方法的局限，为自动出价任务提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Auto-bidding plays an essential role in online advertising, automatically adjusting bids for advertisers to optimize their commercial goals. The emerging AI-Generated Bidding (AIGB) paradigm widely adopts generative modeling to optimize bidding strategies, yet suffers from the limited mode coverage of offline datasets and inadequate task-state understanding, hindering effective exploration of optimal strategies. Large Language Models (LLMs), with prior world knowledge and reasoning capabilities, offer a promising approach to overcome these limitations. However, directly applying LLMs to auto-bidding tasks faces inherent challenges in limited numerical precision, hallucinations, and inference latency. To address these limitations, we propose AIGB-R1, a hierarchical self-evolving auto-bidding framework aiming to enhance AI-Generated Bidding via LLMs' Reasoning capabilities, comprising a high-level Planner module for macro-level strategy planning and a low-level Executor module for fine-grained decision-making. Building upon this, we design an experience-driven self-evolving loop, enabling autonomous strategy exploration and optimization from accumulated experience. We adopt a two-stage pipeline of offline pre-training and post-training alignment, and build an interactive bidding simulation environment for strategy rollout. Furthermore, we propose Decoupled Group Relative Policy Optimization (D-GRPO) to achieve end-to-end optimization via advantage decoupling. Experimental results on a large-scale public dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of AIGB-R1.

</details>


### [358] [An Iterative Geometric Approach to Optimizing Separating Hyperplanes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17282)
*Akos Hajnal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种几何方法，从初始分离超平面出发，通过逐步调整对齐方向并递增间隔，最终收敛到最大间隔超平面（硬间隔SVM）。该方法每次迭代仅利用当前活动集的局部信息，求解一系列更小的二次规划子问题。实验表明，当初始超平面可用时，该方法在较大数据集上具有竞争力，有时甚至优于直接求解优化问题的现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 给定一个线性可分的二分类数据集，标准硬间隔SVM需要求解一个凸二次规划问题来得到最大间隔超平面。然而，如果已经有一个初始的分离超平面，能否利用它来更高效地到达全局最优解？本文的核心动机就是探索这个方向，希望借助初始解来加速求解过程。

Method: 提出一种几何迭代算法：从初始分离超平面开始，在保持分离性的前提下，逐步调整超平面的对齐方向，持续增加间隔直到收敛到全局最优。每次迭代仅依赖当前活动集的局部信息，将原始的凸二次优化问题分解为一系列更小的子问题（即当前活动集上的最优分离超平面），逐步逼近全局解。

Result: 初步实验评估表明，当初始分离超平面可用时，该方法在较大数据集上具有竞争力，某些情况下能够超越直接求解原始优化问题的现有方法。

Conclusion: 该工作为存在初始解时的SVM加速求解提供了新的几何视角和有效算法，但方法仍处于初步阶段，未来需要更系统的理论分析和更全面的实验验证。

Abstract: Given a binary-labeled linearly separable dataset, and the objective is to compute the maximum-margin separating hyperplane, also known as the hard-margin Support Vector Machine (SVM) classifier.
