Method: 在AgentSelect数据集上微调BGE-base、KaLM-v1.5和EasyRec三个开放检索骨干模型，该数据集将市场可见单元表示为基于公共元数据的能力画像。然后在MuleRun原生智能体和ClawHub基准（50个技能+1000个查询）两个未见过的目录上测试迁移效果。

Result: 微调后的模型在两个未见过的测试目录上均表现提升，验证了检索信号的可迁移性。

Conclusion: 通用文本检索模型可以通过微调适配跨目录的智能体能力检索，且学习到的信号能够迁移到未见过的目录上。

Abstract: Open agent marketplaces list native agents, tool bundles, and reusable skill packages in the same search interface, yet practitioners still have little guidance on how to retrieve across this mixed catalog. We study whether off-the-shelf retrieval models, trained for general text retrieval, can be adapted to match user queries to executable agent capabilities, and whether the learned signal transfers beyond the benchmark used for tuning. We fine-tune three open retrieval backbones, BGE-base, KaLM-v1.5, and EasyRec, on AgentSelect, which represents marketplace-visible units as capability profiles derived from public metadata, and test transfer on two catalogs not seen during training: MuleRun native agents and a ClawHub benchmark of 50 skills with 1,000 queries. Adaptation helps on both catalogs. Code and data will be released upon publication.

</details>


### [605] [The Matryoshka Hypencoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17457)
*Majd Alkawaas,Sean MacAvaney*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出Matryoshka Hypencoder，通过支持多种尺寸的Q-Net，在保持检索效果的同时实现参数减少7倍（域内）和2倍（域外），吞吐量提升1.6-3.4倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Hypencoder将查询编码为浅层神经网络（Q-Net）来估计相关性，但缺乏灵活的参数效率权衡机制。受Matryoshka表示学习启发，本文旨在扩展Hypencoder以支持多种尺寸的Q-Net，实现效果与效率的动态平衡。

Method: 借鉴Matryoshka表示学习思想，在Hypencoder框架中引入多尺度Q-Net结构，允许在推理时选择不同大小的Q-Net，从而在效果和效率之间进行灵活权衡。

Result: 域内任务：以约7倍更少的活跃参数取得可比的检索效果；域外任务：以约2倍更少的活跃参数取得相当效果；对应评分吞吐量提升1.6-3.4倍。

Conclusion: 该工作为Hypencoder的实际部署铺平了道路，证明了多尺度Q-Net设计在检索场景中的有效性。

Abstract: The Hypencoder is a recently-proposed retrieval approach that encodes queries as shallow neural networks ("Q-Nets") that estimate relevance over pre-computed document embeddings. Inspired by Matryoshka Representation Learning, we show that the Hypencoder can be extended to support multiple sizes of Q-Nets, allowing trade-offs between effectiveness and efficiency when deployed. We find that this "Matryoshka Hypencoder" achieves comparable in-domain effectiveness with approximately 7x fewer active parameters in-domain and half as many active parameters out-of-domain, which corresponds to a 1.6-3.4x increase in scoring throughput. This work paves the way for practical deployment of Hypencoders.

</details>


### [606] [HyCoRec: Hypergraph-Enhanced Multi-Preference Learning for Alleviating Matthew Effect in Conversational Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17461)
*Yongsen Zheng,Ruilin Xu,Ziliang Chen,Guohua Wang,Mingjie Qian,Jinghui Qin,Liang Lin*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出HyCoRec框架，通过超图增强的多偏好学习（包括物品、实体、词、评论、知识五方面偏好）来缓解对话推荐系统中的马太效应，在基准数据集上取得了SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法大多在静态或准静态场景下研究马太效应，但用户与系统长期交互会使马太效应不断加剧，对话推荐系统中的这一问题尚未得到充分解决。

Method: 提出HyCoRec范式，利用超图学习多维度偏好（物品、实体、词、评论、知识五个方面），在对话任务中生成回复，在推荐任务中准确预测物品，从而缓解马太效应。

Result: 在两个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，HyCoRec在性能上达到了新的SOTA水平，并且能有效缓解马太效应。

Conclusion: HyCoRec通过多偏好学习有效缓解了对话推荐中的马太效应，代码已开源。

Abstract: The Matthew effect is a notorious issue in Recommender Systems (RSs), \emph{i.e.}, the rich get richer and the poor get poorer, wherein popular items are overexposed while less popular ones are regularly ignored. Most methods examine Matthew effect in static or nearly-static recommendation scenarios. However, the Matthew effect will be increasingly amplified when the user interacts with the system over time. To address these issues, we propose a novel paradigm, Hypergraph-Enhanced Multi-Preference Learning for Alleviating Matthew Effect in Conversational Recommendation (HyCoRec), which aims to alleviate the Matthew effect in conversational recommendation. Concretely, HyCoRec devotes to alleviate the Matthew effect by learning multi-aspect preferences, \emph{i.e.}, item-, entity-, word-, review-, and knowledge-aspect preferences, to effectively generate responses in the conversational task and accurately predict items in the recommendation task when the user chats with the system over time. Extensive experiments conducted on two benchmarks validate that HyCoRec achieves new state-of-the-art performance and the superior of alleviating Matthew effect. Our code is available at https://github.com/zysensmile/HyCoRec.

</details>


### [607] [RAMP: Robust Ad Recommendation Under Limited Personalized-Feature Availability via Masking and Alignment Pathways](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17473)
*Dairui Liu,Zhongyi Lu,Roger Zhe Li,Changhong Jin,Jitao Lu,Xinyang Shao,Bichen Shi,Mete Sertkan,Aghiles Salah,Aonghus Lawlor,Barry Smyth,Tri Kurniawan Wijaya,Ruihai Dong,Xingsheng Guo*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 针对隐私限制下无法获取个性化特征的在线广告场景，提出RAMP框架，通过掩码和对齐路径，在缺少个性化特征时仍能保持高精度的CTR/CVR预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个性化特征（如年龄、性别）能显著提升广告点击率（CTR）和转化率（CVR）预测精度，但隐私法规日益严格，限制了这些特征在训练和推理阶段的使用，导致可用数据大幅减少，需解决在无个性化特征条件下的预测精度下降问题。

Method: RAMP包含三条路径：(i) 个性化路径——双塔组件（相同输入、独立参数），通过输出掩码分离个性化与非个性化信号的预测；(ii) 非个性化路径——仅使用非个性化特征训练；(iii) 蒸馏启发的预测对齐架构——在(i)和(ii)之间进行对齐，提升缺少个性化特征时的预测质量。

Result: 在公开基准和工业数据集上，基于多种骨干模型进行的实验表明：当个性化特征缺失时，RAMP一致优于现有最优方法；当所有特征可用时，仍保持有竞争力的性能。

Conclusion: RAMP有效解决了隐私约束下的广告推荐难题，在不依赖个性化特征时仍能实现高精度预测，具备良好的实际部署价值。

Abstract: Click-through rate (CTR) and conversion rate (CVR) prediction are fundamental tasks in online advertising, aiming to estimate the likelihood of user interactions based on various features. While personalized attributes such as age and gender can significantly enhance predictive accuracy, their use is increasingly restricted by privacy regulations, thereby limiting available data for both training and inference. To address this challenge, we propose RAMP (Robust Ad Recommendation Under Limited Personalized-Feature Availability via Masking and Alignment Pathways), which is designed to improve CTR/CVR prediction accuracy when personalized features are not accessible, thus supporting deployment in privacy-constrained settings.RAMP consists of (i) a personalized pathway built upon a dual-tower component with identical inputs but independent parameters, where output masking separates predictions for personalized and non-personalized signals, (ii) a separate non-personalized pathway trained with non-personalized features only, and (iii) a distillation-inspired prediction-alignment architecture between (i) and (ii) that improves prediction when personalized features are unavailable. We conduct comprehensive experiments using both public benchmarks and industrial datasets to evaluate the performance of RAMP. Our evaluation spans multiple backbone models and different settings: with and without access to personalized features. The results show that RAMP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods when personalized features are missing, while maintaining competitive performance when all features are available. %demonstrating its effectiveness and practicality for real-world advertising systems. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Ruixinhua/RAMP.

</details>


### [608] [MagicSelector: Joint Optimization for Agent Tool Selection via Counterfactual Decomposition and Progressive Reranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17751)
*HONOR Agentic Search Team,Zhengzong Chen,Lei Tang,Lijun Liu,Chuandi Jiang,Fan Yang,Keyun Chu,Chu Zhao,Shihao Liu,Minghang Li,Bo Liang,Can Wen,Hailong Wu,Jingnan Ju,Mian Liu,Nengbin Zhang,Peiqiang Wang,Penghe Nie,Qinhui Gu,Sijia Lv,Siqi Chen,Wei Zhang,Yang Xu,Yuhao Qian,Yuxiang Zhang,Zeng Cheng,Zhen Wang,Zuan Chen,Yuanyuan Zhao,Fei Huang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: MagicSelector是一个联合优化框架，通过反事实任务分解、渐进式重排序和动态Top-K策略，解决智能体中工具检索的噪声和上下文干扰问题，在移动多轮交互任务中显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工具检索方法在OOD场景下容易受到冗余噪声和严重的上下文干扰，且难以将模糊的用户指令转化为可执行的原子子任务，导致检索精度下降。

Method: (1) 偏好引导的反事实任务分解机制，利用反事实奖励量化分解对检索排名的边际因果增益；(2) 自蒸馏难负样本挖掘驱动的渐进式工具重排序，优化点级和列表级相关性；(3) 双语义边界感知的动态Top-K策略，自适应监控重排序分数悬崖和语义偏移，动态截断候选列表。

Result: 在自构建的MTDTool基准上，MagicSelector在工具检索准确率、OOD泛化能力和token效率方面显著优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: MagicSelector通过联合优化框架有效提升了工具检索的精度和鲁棒性，验证了反事实分解与动态重排序在智能体工具调用中的有效性。

Abstract: We present MagicSelector, a joint optimization framework integrating Counterfactual task decomposition, Progressive reranking, and Dynamic Top-K, designed to address the fundamental challenges of tool retrieval in agents. MagicSelector is a specialized framework capable of translating ambiguous user instructions into executable atomic subtasks and guiding high-precision tool retrieval, effectively mitigating redundant noise and severe context distraction in out-of-domain (OOD) scenarios.We empower MagicSelector with these capabilities through three key contributions: (1) a preferenceguided counterfactual task decomposition mechanism that utilizes a counterfactual reward to quantify the marginal causal gain of decomposition on retrieval ranking, effectively imposing fine-grained structural supervision on logical coherence; (2) a progressive tool reranking method driven by self-distillation hard negative mining, which optimizes both point-wise and list-wise relevance to enhance fine-grained discrimination among highly similar tools; and (3) a dual semantic boundary-aware dynamic Top-K strategy that adaptively monitors reranking score cliffs and inter-tool semantic shifts to dynamically truncate the candidate list, maximizing relevant tool recall while filtering long-tail noise. Evaluated on MTDTool, the first task decomposition benchmark we constructed tailored for mobile multi-turn interactions with process-level annotations, MagicSelector yields promising performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MagicSelector significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of tool retrieval accuracy, OOD generalization capability, and overall token efficiency, thereby demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed framework.

</details>


### [609] [Remote Awareness of Seafloor Images Collected by AUVs over Low-Bandwidth Communication Links](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18013)
*Adrian Bodenmann,Cailei Liang,Miquel Massot-Campos,Samuel Simmons,Alexander B. Phillips,Alberto Consensi,Matthew Kingsland,Rashiid Sherif,Stan Brown,Adam Riese,Blair Thornton*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种利用AI技术从AUV采集的大量图像中自动筛选代表性图像或与查询最相似图像的方法，结合元数据和压缩技术，通过低带宽通信链路（如卫星或水下调制解调器）实时传输给岸上操作人员。在英国和加那利群岛的三次实际部署中，该方法实现了近40万倍的数据压缩，将2小时47分钟的测绘任务数据摘要压缩后仅需34分钟即可通过低带宽卫星传输完成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AUV在执行水下任务时会采集大量图像数据，但受限于低带宽通信链路（如卫星通信或水下调制解调器），无法实时将全部图像数据传输到岸上操作人员。传统方法只能等待AUV回收后才能获取数据，导致任务期间操作人员无法了解水下采集情况，无法及时调整任务策略。

Method: 利用AI技术从AUV采集的图像数据集中自动筛选出最具代表性的图像子集，或根据查询图像自动找出最相似的图像。结合更大图像集的元数据，对选中的图像进行压缩，通过卫星链路或水下调制解调器传输给岸上操作人员。

Result: 在英国和加那利群岛的三次部署中，使用不同的AUV和成像系统进行了实地验证。该方法实现了近40万倍的数据压缩比，能够将原本2小时47分钟的测绘任务数据摘要，通过低带宽卫星通信在仅34分钟内传输完成。

Conclusion: 该方法能够在AUV仍处于部署状态时，实时向岸上操作人员提供关于水下采集图像类型的有价值信息，有效解决了低带宽通信环境下的数据传输瓶颈问题，为AUV远程监控和任务调整提供了可行方案。

Abstract: This paper introduces a method for real-time processing and transmission of autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) imagery over low-bandwidth communication links. It leverages artificial intelligence (AI) techniques to identify a set of images that best represent an entire dataset, or automatically finds the most similar images to a given query image for transmission to operators. Combined with metadata of a larger set of images, compressed versions of the selected images can be transmitted over satellite communication links or underwater modems, and provide operators on shore with information about the type of imagery the AUV is collecting while it is still deployed. Data from three deployments off the coast of the UK and in Gran Canaria using different AUVs and imaging systems demonstrate the method in the field. It achieved an almost 400,000-fold reduction in data volume compared to the raw data size, enabling transmission of data summaries of a 2-hour 47-minute-long mapping mission in just over 34 minutes over low-bandwidth satellite communication.

</details>


### [610] [Evidence-in-the-Loop: Trace-Driven Optimization for Customer-Service LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18039)
*Chunming Wu,Dafei Qiu,Congde Yuan,Charles Quan,Jun Wu,Suipeng Li,Mo Wu,Gavin Xie,Hope Chen,Max Yao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于证据的客服机器人工作流，通过混合RAG证据构建、证据驱动决策和追踪驱动优化三种模式，在实际客服场景中实现了可控的LLM应答，确保模型不逾越证据边界、策略规则和人工交接安全机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生产环境中的客服机器人需要在多次迭代中提升回答质量，但大语言模型不能绕过证据边界、策略规则和人工交接的安全保障，因此需要一种可控、可审计的LLM客服工作流。

Method: 方法包括三个可复用模式：(1) 混合RAG证据构建——使用BM25召回、标题向量召回、描述向量召回、加权RRF融合和交叉编码器重排序构建可审计的FAQ证据；(2) 基于证据的问题/动作决策——证据引导的决策模块结合FAQ证据和场景特定规则证据选择动作；(3) 追踪驱动的RAG和重排序改进——通过追踪诊断失败来源，并在重排序微调中评估领域内增益和遗忘风险。

Result: 该工作流已在真实客服环境中部署，通过多通道检索和重排序构建了可靠的FAQ证据，并结合策略引导的编排（LangGraph DAG）将RAG证据、场景规则证据、对话记忆和澄清状态整合在一起，实现了可控的LLM决策。

Conclusion: 本文贡献了三种可复用的部署模式，为生产环境下的客服机器人提供了证据驱动的可控LLM决策框架，有效平衡了回答质量提升与安全约束保障，并通过追踪机制实现了持续优化。

Abstract: Production customer-service bots must improve answer quality across iterative releases, yet large language models must not bypass evidence boundaries, policy rules, or human-handoff safeguards. We present an \textbf{Evidence-Grounded Customer-Service Agent Workflow} deployed in a real-world customer-service setting. BM25 recall, issue-title-vector recall, issue-description-vector recall, weighted RRF fusion, and cross-encoder reranking construct grounded FAQ evidence for controlled LLM decisions. Policy-guided orchestration then combines this RAG evidence with scenario-specific rule evidence, conversation memory, and clarification state inside a fixed LangGraph DAG~\cite{langgraph2024}. The paper contributes three reusable deployment patterns: \textbf{hybrid RAG evidence construction}, where multi-channel retrieval and reranking produce auditable FAQ candidates; \textbf{evidence-grounded issue/action decision}, where an Evidence-Grounded Decision Module selects an issue/action from typed FAQ evidence and scenario-specific rule evidence; and \textbf{trace-driven RAG and reranker improvement}, where traces diagnose whether failures come from recall, ranking, final candidate selection, clarification, rule-derived evidence, or action policy, and where reranker fine-tuning is evaluated not only for in-domain gain but also for forgetting risk.

</details>


### [611] [FinSAgent: Corpus-Aligned Multi-Agent RAG Framework for Evidence-Grounded SEC Filing Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18102)
*Jijun Chi,Zhenghan Tai,Hanwei Wu,Tung Sum Thomas Kwok,Hailin He,Zixing Liao,Bohuai Xiao,Chaolong Jiang,Jianliang Lei,Jerry Huang,Peng Lu,Muzhi Li,Liheng Ma,Yihong Wu,Sicheng Lyu,Jingrui Tian,Yihan Li,Yanzhang Ma,Dingtao Hu,Yufei Cui,Ling Zhou,Lei Ding,Xinyu Wang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: FinSAgent是一个基于证据的多智能体框架，通过注入语料库条件来修正模型先验与SEC披露文件之间的错位问题，在检索覆盖率和答案正确性上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检索增强和多智能体系统在SEC文件问答中存在"先验-语料错位"问题：直接从用户问题生成检索查询，并按语义相似度排序，导致遗漏语料特有的证据，且语义重排序倾向于主题相似但证据无效的虚假正例块。

Method: FinSAgent提出三项核心设计：(1)角色专精智能体，锚定于强制性的10-K项目结构；(2)数据库感知的查询分解，基于轻量级摘要视角的本地语料库来条件化每个智能体的子查询；(3)多路径检索与学习到的特征门控重排序器，分离证据有效性与语义相似度。

Result: 在五个离线金融问答基准上，FinSAgent在检索覆盖率和答案正确性上超越了强单智能体和多智能体基线；在包含1000名匿名用户评分的三臂随机在线实验中，也获得了更高的用户评分。

Conclusion: 该工作证明了在金融领域结构化文档问答中，通过注入语料库条件来矫正模型先验是一种有效的范式，能够显著提升证据检索的精确性和答案的质量。

Abstract: Financial question answering over U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) filings requires retrieving and synthesizing heterogeneous evidence dispersed across long, standardized, and highly redundant disclosures. Existing retrieval-augmented and multi-agent systems typically derive retrieval queries directly from the user's question and rank candidates by semantic similarity. Together, these choices create prior-corpus misalignment: a mismatch between model priors and the target filings' structure, terminology, and evidence standards. As a result, query generation misses corpus-specific evidence, while semantic reranking favors topically similar but evidentially invalid false-positive chunks. We propose FinSAgent, an evidence-grounded multi-agent framework that reframes SEC filing QA as corpus-aligned retrieval planning and corrects both ends with a single principle: inject corpus-side conditioning wherever model priors would otherwise dominate. FinSAgent combines (1) role-specialized agents anchored to the mandated 10-K item structure, (2) database-aware query decomposition that conditions each agent's sub-queries on a lightweight, summary-level view of the local corpus, and (3) multi-path retrieval with a learned feature-gated reranker that separates evidential validity from semantic similarity. Across five offline financial QA benchmarks, FinSAgent improves retrieval coverage and answer correctness over strong single-agent and multi-agent baselines; in a three-arm randomized online experiment with 1,000 anonymous user ratings, it also receives higher scores than baselines.

</details>


### [612] [jina-reranker-v3.5: An Efficient Listwise Reranker with Hybrid Attention and Self-Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18152)
*Christina Nasika,Feng Wang,Antonis Krasakis,Han Xiao*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了 jina-reranker-v3.5，一个0.6B参数的listwise重排序模型，通过混合注意力机制、多领域训练和三阶段自蒸馏，在BEIR上达到63.20 nDCG@10，性能媲美4B模型，参数减少约7倍，半结构化检索提升9.6点，推理延迟降低1.56倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生产部署中的listwise重排序器需要同时满足效率、领域鲁棒性和半结构化数据的流畅性，现有方法难以兼顾三者。本文旨在设计一个在不牺牲跨文档比较能力的前提下，同时满足这些需求的高效重排序模型。

Method: 保留前代模型的LBNL交互机制，沿三个方向改进：1) 混合注意力机制：3层滑动窗口+2层全局注意力，终端层保持全局；2) 多领域训练数据：涵盖法律、医疗、金融、多语言和结构化检索的混合数据集；3) 三阶段自蒸馏：全注意力教师设定上限，稀疏注意力学生在分阶段适应协议下恢复性能。

Result: BEIR上达到63.20 nDCG@10，与4B模型性能相当但参数少7倍；在MIRACL和RTEB上超越前代；半结构化检索提升9.6个nDCG@10点，领先所有同规模重排序器；推理延迟降低1.56倍。

Conclusion: jina-reranker-v3.5证明了一个小模型可以通过精心设计的架构和训练策略，在多个维度上同时达到甚至超越大规模模型的表现，特别是在半结构化数据上取得了显著优势。模型权重已在Hugging Face上以非商业许可发布。

Abstract: Listwise rerankers are the discriminative core of agentic retrieval pipelines, yet production deployment demands efficiency, domain robustness, and fluency on semi-structured data at the same time. We present jina-reranker-v3.5, a 0.6B-parameter listwise reranker that meets these demands together without sacrificing the cross-document comparison that makes its predecessor jina-reranker-v3 effective. jina-reranker-v3.5 keeps the last-but-not-late (LBNL) interaction of jina-reranker-v3 and reworks it along three axes. It replaces uniform global attention with a hybrid schedule of three sliding-window layers followed by two global layers, pinning the terminal layer to global as LBNL readout requires. It trains on a curated multi-domain mixture that spans legal, medical, financial, multilingual, and structured retrieval. It transfers quality through a three-stage self-distillation recipe in which a full-attention teacher sets an upper bound that a sparse-attention student then recovers under a staged adaptation protocol. jina-reranker-v3.5 reaches 63.20 nDCG@10 on BEIR, matching a 4B model at roughly 7x fewer parameters, and improves over jina-reranker-v3 on MIRACL and RTEB as well. Its largest gains come on semi-structured retrieval, where it lifts nDCG@10 by 9.6 points over jina-reranker-v3 and leads all rerankers of comparable size. The hybrid schedule further cuts listwise inference latency by up to 1.56x. We release the model weights on Hugging Face under a non-commercial license.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [613] [EII-SCL: Harnessing Emotional Inertia for Multimodal Emotion Recognition in Conversation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17366)
*Zilong Huang,Kong Aik Lee,Chong-Xin Gan,Zezhong Jin,Ruichen Zuo,Man-Wai Mak*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出情感惯性引导的监督对比学习模块(EII-SCL)，利用时间窗口内的情感惯性先验改进多模态对话情感识别，在IEMOCAP和MELD上超越SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MERC方法过度关注复杂上下文依赖建模，忽视了对话中情感转移的**情感惯性**影响，导致次优性能。

Method: 提出EII-SCL模块：在时间窗口内构建受惯性影响的样本，将情感惯性作为先验信息注入监督对比学习目标，可无缝集成现有MERC模型。

Result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD数据集上，该方法一致性地优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 情感惯性是一种有效的先验知识，通过对比学习融入可显著提升多模态对话情感识别性能，且无需额外数据。

Abstract: Multimodal emotion recognition in conversation (MERC) achieves accurate predictions by integrating multimodal and contextual information in dialogues. While current MERC approaches focus on modeling complex contextual dependencies in conversation, they often overlook the impact of contextual emotional inertia in emotion shift, leading to sub-optimal performance. To address this issue, we propose a novel Emotional Inertia-Informed Supervised Contrastive Learning module (EII-SCL) that informs the contrastive objective by constructing inertia-affected samples within temporal windows, effectively leveraging emotional inertia as a prior while enabling seamless integration with existing MERC models without requiring additional data. Extensive experiments on IEMOCAP and MELD show that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [614] [GEAR: Reconstruction of Classical Paintings via Geometry Grounding and Appearance Restitution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17519)
*Qinyu Zhang,Xinda Liu,Yunchen Li,Yunzhuo Liu,Chenxi Hu,Kang Li,Guohua Geng*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出古典绘画转3D（CP3D）新任务及GeAR框架，通过几何锚定与外观还原两阶段方法，从单幅古典绘画中恢复几何合理、外观忠实且支持新视角合成的3D表示，并构建了包含10,160幅高分辨率艺术品的HeriArch基准数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 古典绘画包含丰富的空间、文化和历史内容，其3D重建对数字保存、沉浸式展览和文化参与具有重要价值。然而古典绘画常以单视图、风格化方式呈现，缺乏自然照片中的强烈透视、光照和深度线索，现有基于自然图像先验的3D重建方法难以从中恢复几何合理且视觉忠实的3D表示。

Method: 提出GeAR，一个免训练的两阶段框架：1) 几何锚定阶段：将输入绘画转换为具有更连贯明暗和光照线索的几何锚定表示，提升3D高斯重建稳定性；2) 外观还原阶段：在空间约束和多视角一致性下恢复艺术品忠实外观，还原在锚定过程中弱化的绘画纹理和细节。

Result: 构建了HeriArch基准（10,160幅高分辨率古典绘画），大量实验和用户研究表明GeAR在几何合理性、外观忠实性和人类偏好上持续优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: GeAR有效解决了古典绘画单视图3D重建的几何-外观协同难题，为文化遗产数字化提供了可行方案。代码和数据集将公开。

Abstract: Classical paintings preserve rich spatial, cultural, and historical content, making their reconstruction as explorable 3D scenes valuable for digital preservation, immersive exhibition, and cultural engagement. Yet, unlike photographs, they often depict scenes in a single-view, stylized manner, with weak perspective, lighting, and depth cues. Existing 3D reconstruction methods are largely built on natural-image priors, making it difficult to recover geometrically plausible and visually faithful 3D representations from such inputs. To address this challenge, we introduce Classical Painting-to-3D (CP3D), a new task that aims to recover a 3D representation from a single classical painting while jointly ensuring geometric plausibility, appearance fidelity to the source artwork, and plausible novel-view synthesis. We further propose GeAR, a training-free two-stage framework for Geometry Grounding and Appearance Restitution. GeAR first converts the input painting into a geometry-grounded representation with more coherent shading and illumination cues, improving the stability of 3D Gaussian reconstruction. It then restores artwork-faithful appearance across views under spatial constraints and multi-view consistency, recovering the painterly textures and details weakened during grounding. In addition, we construct HeriArch, a curated benchmark of 10,160 high-resolution classical artworks for systematic evaluation of CP3D. Extensive experiments and user studies show that GeAR consistently outperforms strong baselines in geometric plausibility, appearance fidelity, and human preference. Code and dataset will be released publicly.

</details>


### [615] [Toward Site-Aware MR Art Exhibitions: A SLAM-Based Deployment Pipeline for Spatial Coherence and Exhibition Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17665)
*Yawei Zhao,Yuming Zhu,Hao Li,Yuqi Liang,Ao Yu,Anca-Simona Horvath,Pan Hui*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向大规模MR艺术展览的实用管线，将空间对齐既作为技术机制也作为体验设计决策，通过用户研究和系统评估验证了SLAM-based方法在技术稳定性和观众沉浸感方面的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MR展览系统多为原型或个案部署，缺乏可指导大规模实际实施的通用方案，技术选择（如空间对齐方法）对展览体验的影响也未得到系统研究。

Method: 先进行 pilot study 比较 marker-based 和 SLAM-based 两种空间对齐方法，基于结果开发SLAM管线，并通过系统开销测量和用户体验反馈进行评估。

Result: 空间对齐不仅影响技术稳定性，还显著影响展览连贯性、观众连续感、沉浸感以及艺术作品解读。

Conclusion: 该研究为未来大规模MR艺术展览部署提供了基于实证的参考，证明了将技术选择与策展体验设计结合的重要性。

Abstract: Mixed Reality (MR) is increasingly being used in exhibition settings to bring digital artworks into relation with the physical environment. However, existing MR exhibition systems are often confined to prototypes or case-specific deployments, offering limited guidance for large-scale practical implementation. To address this gap, this paper presents a practical pipeline for designing and deploying large-scale MR art exhibitions, treating spatial alignment not only as a technical mechanism but also as an experiential design decision. We first conducted a pilot study comparing marker-based and Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM)-based alignment methods in an MR exhibition setting. Based on the results, we developed a SLAM-based pipeline for MR exhibitions that integrates technical deployment with exhibition curation. We then evaluated the pipeline through both system overhead measures and users' experiential feedback. The results show that spatial alignment influences not only technical stability, but also overall exhibition coherence, visitors' sense of continuity and immersion, and artwork interpretation. These findings provide an empirically grounded reference for future large-scale MR art exhibition deployment.

</details>


### [616] [FillGauss: Fine-Grained Filling-Aware Impact Sound Generation for 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17773)
*Chen Yang,Ganye Wen,Bin Huang,Jiayi Lyu,Zehai Niu,Linlin Shen,Jinbao Wang*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文提出FillGauss框架，结合3D高斯泼溅与内部状态条件，从视觉观察生成物理合理的撞击声，解决了现有方法忽略物体内部填充状态的关键问题。同时构建了包含5000+真实录音的FillImpact数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D感知音频生成方法仅建模空心刚体表面几何，完全忽略了内部填充状态（如水、米）这一显著影响声学共振与阻尼的关键物理因素。

Method: 1) 构建FillImpact多模态数据集（88个真实物体、5000+录音，涵盖不同填充物、填充水平与敲击材料）。2) 提出FillGauss生成框架，融合3D高斯泼溅几何特征、3D空间敲击坐标与细粒度文本物理条件，基于潜在扩散架构实现位置感知、敲击器感知与填充感知的音频生成。

Result: 实验表明，FillGauss能生成高保真且遵循物理原理的撞击声，在该物理驱动的跨模态音频生成任务上达到新SOTA。

Conclusion: 本文通过引入内部填充状态感知，填补了视听交叉模态中物理真实感声音生成的关键空白，数据集与框架为后续物理驱动的多模态AI研究奠定基础。

Abstract: Synthesizing physically plausible impact sounds from visual observations remains a great challenge in multi-modal AI. Existing 3D-aware audio generation methods primarily model the surface geometry of hollow rigid bodies. However, they fundamentally overlook internal filling states, a critical physical factor that drastically modulates acoustic resonance and damping. To address this issue, we have defined a new task called Fine-Grained Filling-Aware Impact Sound Generation. As a foundational step, we first introduce the fine-grained fill-aware dataset (FillImpact), a pioneering multi-modal collection comprising over 5,000 rigorous acoustic recordings from 88 diverse real-world objects. It captures impact interactions with varying internal contents (i.e., water, rice), a continuous range of fill levels, and distinct striker materials. Furthermore, comprehensive acoustic analysis confirms that the collected data closely aligns with established physical laws governing acoustic resonance and damping, indicating its suitability for physically grounded modeling. Building on this dataset, we propose a novel generative framework (FillGauss) that integrates 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) with internal state conditioning for sound generation. By fusing 3DGS geometric features, precise 3D spatial strike coordinates, and fine-grained textual physical conditions within a latent diffusion architecture, FillGauss enables position-aware, striker-aware, and filling-aware audio generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach could generate high-fidelity impact sounds that adhere to underlying physical principles, establishing a new state-of-the-art for physically grounded cross-modal audio generation.

</details>
